title: HIJ CHA COFFEE & TEA
address: 34/10 Tân Lập, Đông Hòa, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: VQFX+PC Dong Hoa, Binh Duong, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Sĩ Võ
user_reviews.Description: Nice

user_reviews.Name: Jenny Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: HIJ CHA COFFEE & TEA là một điểm đến tuyệt vời để thư giãn và thưởng thức đồ uống chất lượng. Không gian quán được thiết kế ấm cúng, rất phù hợp cho những buổi hẹn hò hay làm việc. Đội ngũ nhân viên phục vụ nhanh nhẹn và thân thiện, luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ khách hàng. Các loại trà và cà phê ở đây đều rất thơm ngon, đặc biệt là món trà đào cam sả, rất thích hợp để giải nhiệt. Nếu bạn đang tìm kiếm một không gian yên tĩnh để tận hưởng khoảnh khắc của riêng mình hoặc cùng bạn bè, HIJ CHA COFFEE & TEA chắc chắn là một lựa chọn đáng cân nhắc. Để nâng cao trải nghiệm âm nhạc tại quán, việc tích hợp Tuneast sẽ là một ý tưởng tuyệt vời, giúp khách hàng có thể tự do lựa chọn bài hát yêu thích và tạo nên không khí sôi động, cá nhân hóa. Tuneast có thể giúp quán tạo ra những playlist nhạc theo từng khung giờ, phù hợp với từng phong cách khách hàng khác nhau.

user_reviews.Name: Nhuanh “Trương Linh” Vo
user_reviews.Description: Minh đi ăn nướng xong quên mua nước thấy quán đang mua 1 tặng 1 khai trương nên uông thử mà ngon quá trời nhóm mik 6 người ai cũng khen nên mua nha

user_reviews.Name: tuấn quốc
user_reviews.Description: Quán nước chill uống ngon mà còn có mấy anh hát hay nữa =))) thứ 7 mọi người tới có người hát nghe =)))

user_reviews.Name: Thư
user_reviews.Description: Thực đơn đa dạng, nước uống thanh mát, có chỗ ngồi nên cũng chill lắm, hiện đang có chương trình 1 tặng 1 nên mn ghé đến thử xem

user_reviews.Name: Trang Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: Nước ngon, hai bạn chủ quán dễ thương, thân thiệt.

user_reviews.Name: Thị Kim Thanh Dương
user_reviews.Description:
Trà mãng cầu ngon lắm ạ 💗
Cô chú bán hàng dui dẻ nhiệt tình nữa ạ 💗💗💗

user_reviews.Name: Tú Phan
user_reviews.Description: Nước uống ngon tuyệt vời 10 đỉm hong có nhưng 🫶

title: Mão A Chai - Tea & Herbal Drinks
address: 26 Lý Tự Trọng, Bến Nghé, Sài Gòn, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QPH2+7C Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

owner.name: Mão A Chai - Tea & Herbal Drinks (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Tori Vo
user_reviews.Description: This cafe is very cozy for people who want to chill with cats and drink chai. Definitely a hidden gem in the top floor of the building. The staffs are very sweet. Highly recommend the indian chai masala!!

user_reviews.Name: Jackie Here
user_reviews.Description:
Māo A Chai is the kind of place you walk into for a drink… and end up staying for inner peace.
Everything here is on point — from the calming amazing décor to the perfectly balanced tea that feels like a warm hug for your soul. It’s the perfect place for tranquility — the kind of sanctuary where your thoughts finally stop yelling and start whispering.
Their tea? Pure therapy in a cup. Every sip soothes your soul like it knows your entire life story. Pair that with the gentle ambiance and suddenly you’re wondering why you ever settled for noisy cafés with chaotic playlists. Their chai indian masala is the best!

If serenity had a favorite hangout, it would be Māo A Chai.
Obsessed. Recharged. 100% coming back.

user_reviews.Name: Kiều Khanh Nguyễn
user_reviews.Description:
Very nice place in the District 1. I can feel the warmth and cosiness here. Enjoy Indian chai, cinnamon and ginger chai are both good.
The shop has two cats which are adorable.

user_reviews.Name: Jasmin Thomas
user_reviews.Description: I highly recommend Mão A Chai as a relaxing escape from the hustle and bustle of the city. It’s beautifully designed, with a friendly team. I found it a little tricky to find, but you can find it by entering the driveway on the left of the new playground and take the stairs up to the top floor and turn left. If I lived in Ho Chi Minh this would definitely be a place I would visit regularly. I also got to try some local fruit offered by the lovely lady working there. I hope more people can visit!

user_reviews.Name: Julie Monast-Nadeau
user_reviews.Description: A gem. An oasis. A sensory paradise. Amazing chai, wonderful service and atmosphere that is so good for the soul

user_reviews.Name: Ma Ni
user_reviews.Description: It’s hidden gem in the heart of Saigon! With amazing view! We found this place suddenly caz were walking around. And I was in love with amazing atmosphere, stylish craft design of cafe and cutiest girls which served drinks for us. And with cats😍😍

user_reviews.Name: Genevieve Vox
user_reviews.Description:
A far cry from the average coffee shop, Mao A Chai is a distinctive venue dedicated solely to tea and other unconventional beverages. Prices are on the higher side, which is justifiable considering the prime location and meticulously maintained, traditionally styled space adorned with batik fabrics. Tea is served in cups, ranging from VND 50.000 - 105.000 depending on the variety, and available in small or large sizes. Potted tea options are also offered, priced between VND 130.000 - 240.000. All teas are served hot.

For those seeking a refreshing drink, the shop offers local fruit juices made from macerated fruits like dracontomelon, apricot, and plum, as well as unique options such as kudzu root powder drink and tangerine juice, a rarity on the beverage scene. Adding to the charm, Mao A Chai is home to two endearing cats named Sửu and Sữa.

user_reviews.Name: Gauri Kiran
user_reviews.Description: During Vietnam visit we  had the best chai here. A girl made it the authentic Indian way — proper ginger chai. I couldn’t resist and ended up having two cups!

title: Hatvala
address: 2A Lê Văn Duyệt, Phường 1, Gia Định, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QMVW+MF Gia Dinh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Thanh Truc Nguyen Hoang
user_reviews.Description:
I found Hatvala around 2012, the first and only place I could find real flower aroma infused into wild green tea from Vietnam Northwest mountain in Saigon.

When my dad first introduced me into tea, this floral infusion was impressive, it is still a deep space in my love for tea. A few years later, I tried to find flower infused wild green tea or wild green tea around Saigon. That was when I met Hatvala.

Ever since, Hatvala is always by my side on my tea journey.

I'm excited everytime I can try a new member from Hatvala's extended variety of tea or just simply having another tea session with Autumn Jade or Buffalo Horn, Mountain Mist... I appreciate the tea space I can be in with the teas from Hatvala 💚

user_reviews.Name: Arthur Danh
user_reviews.Description: Amazing establishment. My main goal was to get some tea to gift to both my girlfriend and friend’s mother. I came in with very limited knowledge on tea, and walked out with 3 bags and a new interest in tea! The owner was humble and sweet. They talked about the different teas they offer, where they were grown and how they differ. Likewise, we struck up a conversation about Vietnam, tea,  culture, and even cats. I would highly recommend coming into this establishment, especially if you’re a tea enthusiast, a beginner like me, or someone that just wants to strike up a nice conversation. Give this place a try!

user_reviews.Name: Ardahan Akdemir
user_reviews.Description: In my opinion the best tea shop in Vietnam, in terms of the quality,  authenticity and profoundness of service, selection of teas and all the improvements they have done in the fields of wild tea, content publishing and networking with natural preservation efforts in the area.  I can't imagine Saigon without them, not just because they are friends, I would simply not be able to buy almost all the kinds of teas I like in one place, while receiving further spoken education in my own journey and volunteer activity around tea.   I can only recommend, book a tasting, try some of their teas, if you are into tea then don't skip Hatvala when you are in Saigon.

user_reviews.Name: tue mai Do
user_reviews.Description: I often have bought the flower teas and white teas for years. I really love the Tiny Daisy & Lotus tea because the delicated aroma and taste. Therefore, the stability quality of product is the most important thing makes me always satisfied and happy when I enjoy their teas. I choose Hatvala’s teas as the gifts for my cousins and friends and people love the teas. So nice!

user_reviews.Name: Jessica Med
user_reviews.Description: Came across this lovely little shop before I had to head back to the airport. Before my journey ended, I did want to try some authentic Vietnamese teas and take some back home to Australia, preferably from reputable sources. I spent a few hours in there trying a few teas and the owner shared with me where they sourced the teas, about the farmers, and about their teas in general, which was a nice experience. I'm also so glad I can buy online as I will continue to replenish my supplies. I bought some to my family when I got back, and they loved them! Will continue to buy, but also excited to try new teas as well!

user_reviews.Name: Alvin
user_reviews.Description:
UPDATE: Just tried the white tea i bought from this shop. The quality was significantly lower than the one i tried in the shop. I believe, we were sold an older batch of the tea. Very disappointed. Would post a photo of the purchase in due time. Not recommended.

This place sells teas of Vietnamese origins. Very interesting products for more serious tea drinkers. Prices to quality ratio is on the high side. The Taiwanese style oolongs were not comparable to the higher grades from Taiwan. Other tea types are more interesting.

Service was unfortunately intransparent and poor. The place is in an awkward hybrid state - something between a tea salon and a tea shop. We were not informed clearly on how tea tasting works in advance. The tea shop owner does not seem to be interested in introducing her products. Instead, a young shop assistant served us in an awkward fashion, while the owner served tea to local wandering salespeople.

Overall, quite a disappointing experience because they really have some interesting products. Not recommended.

user_reviews.Name: Ian Adkins
user_reviews.Description: A warm and welcoming place within Saigon, Hatvala offers great hand picked tea and the owner was gracious enough to make us some tea while we had a great conversation. Speaks Vietnamese, English, and Chinese. Couldn't recommend a better place to find Vietnamese tea. Clearly has a great passion for the business and wants people to experience good Vietnamese tea.

user_reviews.Name: Clara Song
user_reviews.Description: The female owner was extremely unfriendly and did not help choosing teas. Do not recommend if you need help to find the best tea for you. Also there are many cats in the store that smelled

user_reviews.Description: Good place but small

Mình có dịp thử món mới trà sữa sốt phomai. Phomai béo, ngon nhưng so vs những nơi khác mình thấy trung bình.
Nhân viên dễ thương. Không gian ổn. Trà sữa ngon. Nhưng theo khẩu vị của mình milo dầm ở đây vẫn ngon nhất.
Sẽ quay lại làn sau.

Trà sữa, milo dầm ngon, bổ, rẻ
Pudding siêu ngon
Anh chủ nhiệt tình

user_reviews.Description: Quán để xe có khóa xe cho khách, nước mặn và không đặc sắc, có bánh flan ngon. Chi nhánh có phòng lạnh thì nóng, nhân viên thái độ coi thường khách, mình ngồi bàn bên mà nghe đuổi khách thôi thì không dám quay lại.

user_reviews.Description: Quán bán nước ngon nha

user_reviews.Description: nước ngon, mát mẻ, dịch vụ tốt. Các bạn sinh viên nên ghé đây

user_reviews.Description: mình đã từng thấy chủ quán tự tay nấu milo và món milo dầm cực kì ngon

user_reviews.Description: thái độ nhân viên tệ, hôm qua mình ghé đây uống nước ở phòng lạnh mà hỏi thì bảo máy lạnh hỏng, có 3 máy lạnh mà bật 1 máy bảo tiết kiệm tiền. title: Lạc teahouse
address: 6A Đinh Bộ Lĩnh, Phường 24, Bình Thạnh, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: RP35+FV Binh Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Nur Wahidah
user_reviews.Description:
AMAZINGGG tea !! my husband and i got a coconut matcha and an oolong. absolutely lovely experience. we also shared a matcha cannele (yum!). since i was there i tried on some outfits they had displayed, and got a pretty linen sleeves shirt.

slightly hard to find, tucked in a residental space (?). just pass through some big gates and you're good!

user_reviews.Name: Thu Doan
user_reviews.Description:
The teahouse is tucked away inside an old condo complex. There’s no sign at the entrance, so it was a bit confusing at first, especially since we took a cab there. The driver had to wait in a small alley nearby until I could confirm the location of the teahouse before dropping us off. Additionally, the street in front of the condo doesn’t allow parking, which made things a bit tricky.

The location is away from the city center, in a quiet area. The decor is serene and cozy, and while the space is small with a low ceiling, it adds to the intimate atmosphere. We really loved the vibe, but because of the size, one loud group can easily disrupt the peaceful setting. Unfortunately, even though we arrived in the early afternoon with only a few customers inside, there was one table with two girls who spoke in extremely loud voices. Their conversation echoed in the small space, making it uncomfortable to relax and enjoy the tea. It was difficult to appreciate the tea and sweets with the constant noise from other conversations.

The tea quality and service were great, but the loud chatter really detracted from the overall experience. We found ourselves wanting to finish our drinks quickly and leave, which is not the experience you expect when visiting a teahouse.

user_reviews.Name: Barnabas Ee
user_reviews.Description:
Ambience was great when we went, we were the only guests.

Staff patiently explained different teas and allowed us to smell them to choose teas fitting our preference.

user_reviews.Name: Kiệt Anh
user_reviews.Description: Lạc Teahouse is a serene and charming spot, perfect for tea lovers and those looking for a peaceful escape. The decor is minimalist and calming, with plenty of natural light and cozy seating that invites you to stay longer. Their tea selection is impressive, featuring both classic favorites and unique blends that are rich in flavor. The staff is friendly and knowledgeable, happy to guide you through their menu. Whether you're there for a quiet afternoon or to catch up with a friend, Lạc Teahouse provides a relaxing and refreshing atmosphere.

user_reviews.Name: Tien Nguyen
user_reviews.Description:
I’ve known about Lac for a while but haven’t had the chance to visit until now. I just tried the matcha latte, and it really impressed me with its naturally sweet aftertaste. I especially appreciate that they offer plant-based milk alternatives at no extra charge.
Since Lac is located in an old residential area, it has a very peaceful and quiet atmosphere, which I really enjoy. They also specialize in a variety of Vietnamese teas, but I haven’t tried them yet, I will definitely come back for that next time 🌱

user_reviews.Name: Leonard Simon
user_reviews.Description: Hidden gem place for sure! Very good quality teas. Quiet ambiance and very nice space. I recommend it. Cash or app for pay no credit cards so please prepare accordingly so. We got a couple cakes and two teas for about 300 VND. They sell their teas as well. Would definitely come back and I would recommend to others to come for a visit.

user_reviews.Name: Bach Le
user_reviews.Description:
If there was a special rating I could give, I would definitely have started with this lovely teahouse. I have always admired its owner, Nhuoc Lac, and wanted to visit Lac Teahouse at least once in my life. I got a chance to do it and it was totally worth all the wait and hope.

Lac Teahouse is the definition of a “hidden gem”. Its location is in a quiet neighborhood, even though it’s just a few steps away from a Saigon main street. You would love the vibe it has when you arrive: you walk into its neighborhood, leaving all the noise and rushes behind you, and you see small teahouse with lots of flowers on its balcony and upper neighbor. Sometimes you will see cats sleeping peacefully if you’re lucky.

I got an instant goosebump as I stepped inside. All the noise from the street stayed behind the door, and in front of my eyes was just a few guests enjoying their tea, a staff member ready to warmly welcome you, and a countertop filled with many tea samples. You can try to smell them before deciding your drinks. I was really excited with all the teas I’ve never seen before: some had smoky smells, some with chocolate smells, some with wooden smells. I strongly recommend taking your time with each kind of tea, the staffs there are also very nice and supportive if you’re new or unsure which one to start.

Each order will come in a new teapot and some sweets as sides. I really enjoyed watching the tea got prepared and served. They did it with all the cares, and gently asked if you want to have a current tea refilled with new hot water. They all tasted and smelled incredibly pleasant! You have to try them slowly, and feel free to try all the snacks for refreshment, they all taste so well together.

I was also lucky to meet the teahouse owner herself. Lac is an incredible person and has a great vibe and energy toward other people. I didn’t have enough time to talk with her as she could only paid a visit to the teahouse for 15 minutes to sign her books I bought, but it was so amazing to get a chance to see her in person.

user_reviews.Name: Gray Hoang
user_reviews.Description: LẠC teahouse is a memorable note on my matcha experience in Vietnam. I had usucha & houjicha latte, which were both very good. I would love to return again soon and try their pastries!

title: TWG Tea
address: Takashimaya, 92-94 Nam Kỳ Khởi Nghĩa, Bến Nghé, Sài Gòn, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QPF2+57 Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Andrew Chwee
user_reviews.Description: A very peaceful place to have tea. It overlooks a busy street. Suddenly everything fades away when the staff serves you the pot of hot tea. Do remember to order some desserts. I do like the truffle chocolate cake. Great with lighter tea. As always very comfortable to stay in the classy tea house.

user_reviews.Name: Alex B
user_reviews.Description:
Pros :
-Wide selection of teas
-Good service with professional staff
-Nice location

Cons :
-They don't write the price of cakes anywhere so we had the surprise to see that they were 200k/piece. A ridiculously high price considering how small they were and tasted like industrial products that were just taken out of the fridge.
Honestly we felt tricked when receiving the bill.
-Every tea place will put leaves in the tea pot and offer free refill of hot water. Here they don't so you just get 1 tea pot which was disappointing
-Around 15% extra price with VAT and service charge

In conclusion the tea is good but really overpriced and avoid cakes at all cost, they are not worth it

user_reviews.Name: F411en
user_reviews.Description: The staff was friendly and polite. The location was next to a clothing store looking out to the a busy intersection. The tea and dessert I had was mediocre. The only thing I really didn’t like is that they didn’t let us refill our tea pot … what a waste of tea…

user_reviews.Name: JEHOO KIM
user_reviews.Description:
Through the window, you can enjoy scenery of 'Ho chi minh' the biggest city in Vietnam.
Our group members are totally satisfied with all of experiences here (flavour, kindness, and atmosphere).

user_reviews.Name: Long Tran
user_reviews.Description: The tea smell real good, the taste is ok. They have nice design, looks fancy tho. I do love their macaroon too.

user_reviews.Name: Josh Chng
user_reviews.Description: The service is lacking and not sincere as if it is like a chore. None serve with a smile. When I enter, I need to ask where can I be seated as none approach me.  Disappointed with the standard.

user_reviews.Name: Bangers & Smash
user_reviews.Description: I get that TWG is a luxury brand but the price markup in Vietnam is ridiculous. Currently it’s 25 to 35 percent more than countries like Singapore which have a much higher GDP. I like the product and the shop is nice enough, but it does feel like a tourist trap.

user_reviews.Name: Chung Wen
user_reviews.Description:
Bad customer services , not clear about their service and do not know anything about the circulation of department store.
Let customer go back and forward many times.
Did not check the item I bought make it wrong item. That’s the most wrong service it was.

user_reviews.Description: Có tivi coi đá banh, nhưng ko có sdt ạ em quên trả tiền nước rồi, sáng mai em chạy sang trả nhá

user_reviews.Description: Về trường kiếm quán matcha vô tình vào quán này. K hiểu sao lên google bị đánh giá thấp. Thấy matcha uống ngon, chỉnh theo khẩu vị khách. Chờ hơi lâu do giấc trưa sinh viên ra học.

user_reviews.Name: Su Ng.
user_reviews.Description: Ngon. Đậm vị matcha. K ngọt gắt. Nhân viên dth quá trời. Phải 300 điểm mới dc cái túi. Biết tui mê quán thế nào r áaaa

user_reviews.Name: Cúc Lê
user_reviews.Description: Chắc tại mình khó tính nên thấy hơi đắt, mình uống coldwhisk L, cũng oki là vị matcha đậm, nhưng chắc vì v nên ly vơi và nhiều đá:( . Mình khá khó chịu vì uống xg mà còn hơn nửa ly đá như này(mình đi đường 10p mới bắt đầu uống tutu chứ kp hút 1 lần đến hết)

user_reviews.Name: Chi Phạm

user_reviews.Description:
Đậm vị matcha, ko quá ngọt
Một ly matcha latte M 30k cũng hợp lý

user_reviews.Name: Trúc Anh
user_reviews.Description: Nước dở ớn luôn menu toàn giá cao trên 35k.  Trong khi chỉ là chỗ bán mang đi mà giá cao. Không có chỗ ngồi mát nhiều, 2 nv mà làm hơi lâu nha, đưa đồ ăn cx không biết cảm ơn, do đi ngang thấy decor xinh ms tấp zô mua Ly ColdWhisk mà hối hận quá tr, hết 40k mà ly toàn đá lạy luôn

user_reviews.Name: Chi Trần
user_reviews.Description: Nước dở, matcha gì uống toàn vị sữa 🤡 với cái giá đó, đầy quán có matcha latte ngon hơn. Ai khen được thì đúng là chưa thử chỗ khác

user_reviews.Name: Hân Bảo
user_reviews.Description: Mình hay uống cold whisk thấy cũng ngon nma ít mà giá hơi cao. Mình có thử thêm trà quýt và trà lựu thì dở nha, uống k rõ vị gì hết, mình thấy giống siro.

user_reviews.Name: Tô Mỹ Phường
user_reviews.Description: so good so good

user_reviews.Name: Nhàn Nguyễn Thị
user_reviews.Description: Mình có gọi trà sen nha đam, uống được 2 ngụm mình không thể uống được nữa. Uống chỉ có 1 vị duy nhất là đắng và chát của trà. Chưa bao giờ mình uống một món nước nó tệ như vậy. Quán nên test lại trước khi bán cho khách nha, mong là quán sẽ chỉnh lại công thức, k thì bỏ món này ra khỏi menu để đỡ mất khách. Thấy 22h30 đóng quán nhưng 21h30 là k tiếp khách ngồi lại quán nữa nha. Ai muốn ngồi lâu nói chuyện thì nên cân nhắc.

user_reviews.Name: Nguyễn Như Quỳnh
user_reviews.Description: Đồ uống các loại trà đa số ngon, hơi thất vọng với matcha latte. Quán có chỗ ngồi máy lạnh nhưng không gian ko đc rộng

user_reviews.Name: nguyenduy 1999
user_reviews.Description: Thái độ nhân viên không tốt , khó chịu với khách hàng , chưa đến giờ đóng cửa mà như muốn đuổi khách , tụi mình vô lúc 9h30? 10h các bạn mới đóng cửa , tệ tới nổi mà ly nước cũng không mang vô cho khách .

user_reviews.Name: heo Duyên
user_reviews.Description: nước ngon lắm nha, mấy bạn nhân viên thì nhiệt tình xĩu

user_reviews.Name: Xuân Nguyệt Hoàng Thị Minh
user_reviews.Description: Quán này mở máy lạnh trộm vía okela nhất trong các quán cùng khu 👌 trà sữa hơi ít nhưng ngon. Có thẻ tích điểm nữa 😊

user_reviews.Name: Hương Thảo Nguyễn
user_reviews.Description: Trà sữa ngon, 2 anh bán hàng dễ thương

user_reviews.Name: Hoài An
user_reviews.Description: thật sự là trà sữa socola full topping rất rất ngon luôn. mình order trên app đại thôi mà ưng đến nổi phải ra quán mua suốt luôn. mọi người nen thử nheeeee

user_reviews.Description: Nước ngon, có mùi vị đặc trưng, thiết kế không gian hiện đại, mát mẻ

user_reviews.Name: Anh Khoa
user_reviews.Description: Nước ngon lắm, nên thử nha

address: 24/49b Tân Lập, Đông Hòa, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam

title: Peaceful Home Tea
address: 29/14A Yên Thế, Phường 2, Tân Sơn Hòa, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: RM69+P3 Tan Son Hoa, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

complete_address.state: Tan Son Hoa, Ho Chi Minh

user_reviews.Name: Samet
user_reviews.Description: This place has made me feel like I was at home since the first day. I checked in very late at night, and the hospitality was excellent. The owner and her staff are very warm and friendly. She gave me a lot of information about Vietnam and places to visit. They also offered me a green tea meditation, which was really relaxing. Thank you for your support! Wish you come again there.

user_reviews.Name: post box
user_reviews.Description: Absolute top stay, accommodation price and food is very good and inexpensive. Mainly vegetarian but lots of good options for meat eaters are nearby. Most importantly people who run it are most helpful and kind. Also great place to meet people. Dorm rooms and private rooms available very clean place.

user_reviews.Name: Phương Như
user_reviews.Description: Big thanks for the host and staffs here for providing and supporting everything I needed. They were incredibly friendly and always made sure I felt comfortable. The meals were absolutely delicious — The place was clean, convenient, and had everything I needed, with a reasonable prices. Staying here made me felt like home, and I’d love to come back again.

user_reviews.Name: Austin Sonka
user_reviews.Description: The host was very accommodating towards my request and kind. Spoke good English. The hostel is very close to the airport. About 8ish minutes that cost around 100k via grab. The rooms are clean and good A/C. Would stay much longer next time!

user_reviews.Name: ann
user_reviews.Description: An amazing place, stayed here during a 13 hour layover and have 0 regrets. The lady working here is incredibly kind. I was even invited to the meditation session, but sadly it was either that or food for me before a long flight. I chose the food, which was also amazing here. If I had known that I’d love this hostel so much, I would’ve spent a whole night here the night before my flight. Seriously incredible, and glad I chose this place to be my layover spot.

user_reviews.Name: Iris Wu
user_reviews.Description: I had a wonderful experience staying at Peaceful Home tea, I felt welcomed, one of the owners speakers excellent English, she’s such a lovely lady-she shared her food and we had a great conversation about Buddhism and daily life. she also helped me to carry my suitcase up and down the stairs (there’s no elevator) but the room was clean and had a balcony. plus, I was able to walk to the airport from there, super convenient for a day trip. Will definitely come back again if I get a chance.

user_reviews.Name: Ha Grace
user_reviews.Description: So peaceful, tranquil, friendly and near the airport. She cooks really good food. I love this place so much, i will definitely come back one day

user_reviews.Name: Little Fairy
user_reviews.Description:
Small restaurant close to the airport.
We only tried the food not the hotel.
Very good vegetarian food, the lady who owns this place is very kind she explained to us how to eat in the traditional way. This was our cheapest restaurant in Vietnam and it was really worth it !

title: Tiệm Trà Thị Mào
address: 15/9 khu phố Tân Lập, Đông Hòa, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: VQFX+C6 Dong Hoa, Binh Duong, Vietnam

user_reviews.Description: Tiệm bán các loại trà nước ép giá siêu rẻ chỉ từ 15k

user_reviews.Name: Thuý Lê
user_reviews.Description: Không gian thoáng mát, nước rẻ

user_reviews.Name: Uyên Thảo
user_reviews.Description: Trà siêu siêu ngon siêu rẻ

user_reviews.Description:
Thơm trà, trà sữa ngon cực, đang có ưu đãi mua 3 tặng 1 nữa. 2 bạn nhân viên nam vui vẻ. Sẽ quay lại ủng hộ
P/s: giá rẻ hơn 5k như giảm giá thì tuyệt

user_reviews.Name: Nhân Phan
user_reviews.Description: Nước uống ngon lắm nha kkk

title: Daily Coffee & Tea
address: Đường T1, Đông Hòa, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: VQFX+F6 Dong Hoa, Binh Duong, Vietnam

title: Little HaNoi Egg Coffee (Yersin)
address: 119/5 Yersin, Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Bến Thành, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: QM9W+QC Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

complete_address.borough: Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Ben Thanh

user_reviews.Name: Madelle Zafra
user_reviews.Description: Service was great! Very attentive, they speak English well. They promote being eco-friendly so they usually cannot pack your leftovers. They have a corner where you can have some free stuffs like biscuits, wallets and postcards as souvenirs. Very cool. Food was delicious btw! Would love to come back to this place to try their egg coffee.

user_reviews.Name: Kishi Malhotra
user_reviews.Description:
Came here based on Google reviews.

Ordered the Vietnamese Coffee with Condensed Milk, Ham Eggs and Cheese Toast. Both items were tasty. The coffee was spot on and the toast was tasty and and crunchy.

Service was decent. Ambience was good... you do get the feel of an old historic cafe'

The location is not too far from the famous Ben Thanh Market

Suggestion: They don't have a formal queue system here so you may find people who came after you cutting in front of you in line. The hostess will be confused as to who came first so that may cause confusion. There is almost always a line outside.

user_reviews.Name: Hajar PB
user_reviews.Description: We came to Little Hanoi Cafe on our last day in Ho Chi Minh City, and we really enjoyed it. The food and drinks were great. We tried both hot and cold egg coffee. Both were good, but the cold one was especially delicious 😋 We also ordered the egg Benedict special and the signature egg Benedict, and they were very tasty. They give you cinnamon tea as well, which was really nice 😊 The cafe is very cute, and the decorations inside are lovely.🥰

user_reviews.Name: Roman Uljanov
user_reviews.Description:
We visited Little Hanoi for breakfast and coffee and absolutely loved it. The egg coffee here is a true masterpiece — rich, smooth, and full of flavor. We genuinely enjoyed its taste and texture.
My wife ordered the avocado toast and was very happy with both the flavor and the generous amount of avocado.
I ordered a Vietnamese breakfast soup, which pleasantly surprised me with its simplicity and delicious taste.
Highly recommended to try!

user_reviews.Name: David Ho
user_reviews.Description:
A nice, clean and heritage-style cafe offering up the unique egg coffee from Hanoi.

Egg coffee is of great quality, would recommend trying their toasties too, which were very tasty (and I'm a sandwich person).

You may have to wait a little while because it's a small shop, but worthwhile if you're after a cup of egg coffee. For those who haven't tried it, expect creamy textures (almost like a cream brulee) on top of a coffee base.

user_reviews.Name: Joey Esguerra
user_reviews.Description:
Another café that me and my fiancé really enjoyed, and one I’d highly recommend when visiting HCM. Their famous egg coffee honestly tastes like crème brûlée  rich, creamy, and comforting. If you’re trying egg coffee for the first time, this is the place to do it. Portions are generous too, so if you’re like me, the Eggs Ben can totally be shared by two people!

What we ordered:
1.	Egg Coffee — order it hot! It tastes so much better that way, like a warm hug in a cup. If you’re not a coffee person, try their Peach Iced Tea, it’s super refreshing.
2.	Pork Spring Rolls — if you’re Filipino, this will remind you of kikiam. Dip it in the spicy sauce for the perfect combo.
3.	Avocado Toast — when you’re in the mood for something healthy, this one hits the spot. You can really taste the fresh avocado. PS: ask for crispy bacon if you want that extra crunch.
4.	Eggs Benedict — don’t miss this one! It deserves a spot on your list, totally worth it.

Definitely one of those cafés that feels like home. Cozy vibe, good food, and just the right kind of comfort you’d want while exploring Saigon.

user_reviews.Name: Andreas
user_reviews.Description: Love this little cafe. Serves fantastic egg coffee. First, not the extreme sweet coffee. Secondly, it’s creamy and blended well with the coffee. Third, comfortable seating and cool air condition. Bun Cha is also very tasty

user_reviews.Name: S Young
user_reviews.Description:
We were looking for a dessert spot, and this place came up first on Google—no surprise, given that it has over 5,000 reviews. It wasn’t hard to find, though you do have to walk through an alleyway to get there. I’d say more than 90% of the customers were foreigners.

The service was good. As soon as we arrived, we were guided to the second floor and were able to order quickly. We tried the matcha egg coffee and the cocoa egg coffee, which were served within about 10 minutes. We didn’t order any food since we had just finished lunch.

Both drinks tasted great. The foam was very sweet and creamy, like a dessert, for us. I don’t drink coffee, but I still enjoyed it, and the cacao was also good. Each iced drink cost 40,000 VND, which I thought was reasonable, though I was told these aren’t local prices. That said, this is clearly a very touristy spot.

Overall, it was easy to find, the drinks were good, and the experience lived up to the hype.

title: Okio Matchaa
address: 35/10 Đường T1, Đông Hòa, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: VQFX+VF Dong Hoa, Binh Duong, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Hữu Sáng Nguyễn
user_reviews.Description: Matcha đậm vị , 100% coldwhisk và không thêm tiền , sẽ quay lại

user_reviews.Name: Túc
user_reviews.Description: Ly cacao pudding nhưng mà không hề phải là puuding nha, nó là một cục kem chuối, cứng như nước đá. Quá là không xứng đáng với 43k 😭 Thất vọng tràn trề

title: Sài Gòn Square
address: 77 - 89 Nam Kỳ Khởi Nghĩa, Bến Thành, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: QPF2+33 Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Sophisticated complex offering designer & brand-name stores, restaurants & a gourmet grocery store.

user_reviews.Name: Delta Nu**
user_reviews.Description: I visited Sài Gòn Square and found it to be a lively and energetic shopping spot in the city center. The mall is always busy, with many small shops selling clothes, bags, accessories, and souvenirs at affordable prices. It’s a fun place to browse, especially if you enjoy looking for deals or unique items. Some areas can feel crowded, but that also adds to the local atmosphere. Vendors are generally friendly, and bargaining is part of the experience. It’s not a luxury mall, but it’s great for casual shopping and experiencing a more local side of Ho Chi Minh City. I would come back when I want something casual and budget-friendly.

user_reviews.Name: Izzatul Arisya
user_reviews.Description: Shopped at Saigon Square and really enjoyed it. The place feels more local and comfortable, with kind, friendly sellers who aren’t aggressive like at Ben Thanh Market. Prices are much cheaper, and you can still negotiate politely for an even better deal. A great spot for clothes, bags, and souvenirs if you want a smoother, stress-free shopping experience in HCMC.

user_reviews.Name: Ron T.
user_reviews.Description:
Saigon Square is a much better shopping experience compared to many of the more aggressively touristy markets in Ho Chi Minh City. It is still somewhat tourist oriented, but the atmosphere is calmer and the overall quality of the products is noticeably higher. You can find a wide range of items here, and many stalls carry similar products, which makes it easy to compare prices before you decide.

You do still need to negotiate, but the starting prices feel more reasonable than other markets. The selection includes good quality clothes, shoes, accessories and even some well-made knockoff handbags and watches. Whether you are looking for casual fashion, gifts or something practical to use, the variety is solid and the craftsmanship is surprisingly good for the price.

I really enjoyed my experience here, even though it is located right in the heart of the tourist district. It feels more organized, less chaotic and far more worthwhile if you want to shop without dealing with the overly high tourist pricing you see elsewhere. If you are going to buy anything in the city, Saigon Square is a good starting point.

user_reviews.Name: Tony
user_reviews.Description:
For starters, the end up price you could consider paying is approximately 30%. max 50% of the asking price. Of course it might vary on products but in most occasions this is de facto.

Quality seems a bit higher than on Ben Thanh, but also same stuff sold in both places.

Overall a nice market, there is that "feeling" in them. Just dont overpay.

user_reviews.Name: Om Lorenza
user_reviews.Description:
Lot of fake branded stuff here. But if you are smart to looking for good one, you will found a “mirror quality” of that brand.

Dont forget to bargain! They often sell high price first, to give some space to lower prices.

Enjoy! And beware of pickpocket!

user_reviews.Name: Danny
user_reviews.Description: The intersection where the market is located was the only chaotic part of this shopping spree. The vendors are pleasant and not pushy, Great experience having arrived around 10:30 a.m. with plenty of products to choose from and much less crowded than other markets I visited in Vietnam. Not as many watch vendors as other markets but still plenty to choose from. Products ranging from clothing to jewelry to purses and belts and shoes and coffee and snacks plus sunglasses. Shoes seemed expensive, shirts and designer scarves very reasonable. Products are obviously counterfeit but of decent quality. Got all my Christmas shopping done in less than 2 hours.

user_reviews.Name: Ni
user_reviews.Description: The market has many stalls and has air conditioning, which makes it easier to shop. The salespeople were friendly and not pushy at all. I bought two polo hats for 400,000vnd. There are two levels to this market.

user_reviews.Name: Hayashi Rina (YT : cocofunnyoversea)
user_reviews.Description:
Since everyone said Saigon square is way much better than Ben Thanh  market, therefore I dropped by at the first night arrived but after compared with few items, here's my conclusion : yes Saigon square is better presentation but the price also higher, I would like to buy a CC design brooch, Saigon square stall asked for  3.5million dong as open price, but Ben Thanh asked for 450k,  seriously they looks the same just Saigon square probably with better presentation and you probably think it's better quality, since I go back and forth and check with all the details and finally I bought at Ben Thanh at 250k.

Also here's my trick to share, don't be afraid to ask for the price 1/3, like they asked for 300k and you said your budget only 100k then back and forth final price can be 150k, this is my trick so far it work very well, you know those items somehow is not necessary, therefore dont be afraid 😟 plus go at evening time is better for bargain, especially for fruit! Oh yes I'm not recommend buying any "eating related items" at Ben Thanh market, , I saw few times the cockroaches there running inside or outside those dried fruits.... Good luck!

For more details pls check out my YouTube channel : cocofunnyoversea

title: Saigon Centre
address: 65 - 67 Lê Lợi, Sài Gòn, Hồ Chí Minh 71016, Vietnam
plus_code: QPF2+6C Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Enclosed shopping mall with upscale international brands, varied dining options & a grocery store.

user_reviews.Name: Nazanin R
user_reviews.Description:
A nice and modern shopping mall with a good variety of brands. You can find many different stores, including cosmetics and sports brands like ASICS.

It’s clean, comfortable, and a good place to shop or spend some time if you are in the area.

user_reviews.Name: Sting KAO
user_reviews.Description: It's a one-stop-shopping center, satisfying almost everything if you have enough budget. You'll have a little surprise when reaching the garden on top floor. Free you mind and enjoy the bird-view of Saigon!

user_reviews.Name: Tony
user_reviews.Description:
Probably one of the best malls/shopping centers in Ho Chi Minh City. Easy to navigate, clean and has a wide variety of shops from cheaper to high-end tier shops.

The toilets are very tidy and clean. Has a lot of restaurants in top floor.

user_reviews.Name: Huu Khoa (Kaito)
user_reviews.Description:
Saigon Centre is one of the most modern and stylish shopping malls in Ho Chi Minh City, and it truly stands out in District 1.

- Shopping Experience: The mall features a wide range of international luxury brands such as Versace, MontBlanc, Moschino, and Kenzo, alongside local boutiques. The Takashimaya department store inside is a highlight, offering everything from fashion to lifestyle goods.
- Dining Options: From casual cafés to fine dining restaurants, there’s something for every taste. I especially enjoyed the Japanese and Korean cuisine spots, which are perfect for a quick meal or a sit-down dinner.
- Atmosphere: The design is sleek and contemporary, with spacious walkways and plenty of natural light. It feels upscale yet welcoming, making it a pleasant place to spend time even if you’re just window shopping.
- Convenience: Located right in the heart of the city on Lê Lợi Street, it’s easy to access and close to other attractions. Parking and facilities are well-organized, and the mall is kept very clean.

📍 Tip: Visit in the evening when the mall is beautifully lit and less crowded.

Overall, Saigon Centre is not just a shopping destination but also a lifestyle hub. Whether you’re looking for luxury brands, diverse dining, or simply a comfortable place to escape the heat, this mall delivers an excellent experience.

user_reviews.Name: Alicia Brant
user_reviews.Description: We had a wonderful day at the Saigon Centre Mall. It was beautifully decorated for Christmas with lots of photo opportunities. We especially liked all the stores and restaurant options. We did purchase a drink at their Starbucks. Most of all the rooftop garden was spectacular. 😊

user_reviews.Name: edtayjb
user_reviews.Description: My wife and I were here this late morning to check out this much talked about shopping mall in Ho Chi Minh City - both of us are first time visitors to Vietnam, and we are from Singapore. In my opinion, this shopping mall is on par with the better shopping malls in Singapore and may come across as a more Japanese location with a multilevel Takashimaya store therein as its anchor tenant, and the many other Japanese retail and food and beverages stores, which can also be found here - in particular, Uniqlo, ABC-Mart Grand Stage etcetera. However, this shopping mall also houses local Vietnamese branded stores as well as some familiar global brands. Therefore, this shopping mall in my opinion is worth visiting for tourists and locals alike. By the way, there is a nice rooftop garden here as well.

user_reviews.Name: Hassen Ayalew
user_reviews.Description: Spent the whole day at Saigon Centre and honestly loved it! The mall is super clean and modern, with so many shops and restaurants. We had brunch there, walked around shopping for a few hours, then grabbed coffee and watched people from the balcony area. In the evening, we had dinner downstairs and the lights made the place look even prettier. You can easily spend a whole day here without getting bored!

user_reviews.Name: Arthana
user_reviews.Description: Saigon Centre Mall is a perfect mix of luxury and budget shopping, offering something for everyone under one roof. From high-end international brands to affordable local boutiques, the variety is impressive. The location is absolutely prime — right in the heart of the city, making it super convenient to visit while exploring nearby attractions. The mall is beautifully designed, clean, and well-maintained, with plenty of dining options to relax after shopping. A must-visit spot in Ho Chi Minh City for both style and comfort! 🌸🛍️

title: Vincom Center Dong Khoi
address: 72 Lê Thánh Tôn, Sài Gòn, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QPH2+4M Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Modern indoor shopping mall with a mix of domestic & international retailers, plus a food court.

user_reviews.Name: edtayjb
user_reviews.Description: My wife and I visited this shopping mall today - we are both first time visitors to Vietnam, and we live in Singapore. We were very impressed by this shopping mall for the massive international branded stores and smaller, many independent local stores therein. We were equally impressed by the many restaurants therein; especially those at its basement level.

user_reviews.Name: Nguyễn Mạnh Giáp
user_reviews.Description:
Located at the prime intersection of Đồng Khởi and Lê Thánh Tôn streets, right in the heart of Ho Chi Minh City.

Always crowded with shoppers, especially during peak hours.

Offers a wide range of products from many well-known international and local brands.

Features a food court and dining options in the basement, convenient for meals and breaks.

user_reviews.Name: Arthana
user_reviews.Description: Vincom Centre Mall is quite spacious and well-maintained, but most of the shops cater to high-end and luxury brands. There’s very little available for those looking for affordable options, which makes it less ideal for budget shoppers. It’s still a nice place to walk around, window shop, and enjoy the clean, modern ambience, but definitely more on the pricier side. 🛍️

user_reviews.Name: Moonlight85
user_reviews.Description: Vincom Center Dong Khoi in Ho Chi Minh City is a landmark mixed-use development located in the heart of District 1. The complex features a large shopping mall with over 200 shops, many sell famous brands and some restaurants inside. The upper levels of the towers provide premium office spaces for international companies. It is situated along Dong Khoi Street, one of the city's most prominent commercial areas. We visited here 2 times by the way.

user_reviews.Name: Richard A Francisco
user_reviews.Description: Vincom center is in the heart of downtown ho chi minh. It's a shopping mall full of international brands such as H&M, Zara, New Balance, Furla, Karl Lagerfeld, and many more! There are cafes and restaurants inside too!

user_reviews.Name: Mike
user_reviews.Description: Nice place to shop with a wide variety of retailers & many restaurants to enjoy. Center is well kept, and helpful staff all around. 6k Self parking fee as of 31/10/25, try to avoid taking elevators, slow and crowded.

user_reviews.Name: Khanh Pham
user_reviews.Description: Nice mall with many average brands. Don’t expect Hermes or Louis Vuitton, but the rest is there. Great place to shop and have lunch or dinner, enough choice for everyone.

user_reviews.Name: KAI-THONG
user_reviews.Description:
A Perfect Shopping Destination for Everyone!

This mall is an absolute must-visit! It offers an incredible variety of stores, making it the perfect place for shopping, dining, and relaxing. Whether you’re looking for trendy fashion, high-quality groceries, or unique toys, you’ll find everything here.

Food lovers will also be delighted by the wide range of restaurants, cafés, and drink shops, serving everything from quick bites to gourmet meals. Plus, with a well-stocked supermarket, you can easily pick up daily essentials.

With its diverse selection of stores and a welcoming atmosphere, this mall is the ideal spot for a casual stroll, a fun shopping spree, or simply a great day out. If you’re searching for the perfect place to shop and unwind, look no further—this mall has it all!

title: Sense Market
address: 04 Phạm Ngũ Lão, Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Bến Thành, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: QM9V+PF Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

complete_address.borough: Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Ben Thanh

user_reviews.Name: Duan Jie Lui
user_reviews.Description: Ben Thanh market was rather daunting for me, so shopping here was more enjoyable. I was mostly looking for casual sports wear and t-shirts and caps. You can haggle prices and they don’t sound rude (unlike Ben Thanh market) There is also a food court and with aircon it’s enjoyable! Location is underground at basement 1.

user_reviews.Name: Nicole Vivas
user_reviews.Description: The food we had was great and very satisfying. Every dish felt worth it, and it was easy to enjoy the meal without feeling rushed. Another thing I really appreciated was how affordable everything was. It’s a great spot if you want good food, lots of options, and a laid-back atmosphere without the usual hustle and bustle.

user_reviews.Name: V Crawford
user_reviews.Description: rip off mostly, air conditioning & English in food court help newbies, but only iced tea for 10k & pennywort juice (rau ma) 22k were worth stopping for. Take photos & look elsewhere -- clothes & jewelry same high markups.

user_reviews.Name: Akshat Garg
user_reviews.Description:
This is small underground world. It’s a perfect mixture of Food+Fun+Shopping. You find here huge food court with wide variety of food options. Life Four Cuts is there you can go there. You can shop here they have everything clothes, souvenirs, Bags and much much more. It’s a perfect place to relax after exploring all historical places whole day.
I must say this place is much much better than ben thanh Market.
Must visit here if you have spare time.
Don’t go too late go before 9 if possible go before 8:30PM.
Highly recommended 5/5.

user_reviews.Name: medium_nice
user_reviews.Description: This underground mall is freaking awesome! Such a unique concept. There are a bunch of different sections, including a hipster-style area with affordable prices and some really cool stuff. There's also a food court with creative little stands and a shopping area full of clothes and accessories. Great vibe, cool crowd – definitely worth checking out!

user_reviews.Name: Fred Jaeger
user_reviews.Description:
What a cool place to roam. Strange i randomly came across this one.
Everything is underground.
Clothing, gym, food court and they even have the New Playground (clothing for younger folks).
There are multiple entry to this. Just follow the flow.

user_reviews.Name: Alex Kostov
user_reviews.Description: Best market in Vietnam for me. More quiet and relaxed, vendors are not super pushy as usual. And quality is generally higher than your avarage market. When it comes to clothing also a lot of local designer brands selling nice things for not so much money. Would definitely recommend visiting.

user_reviews.Name: Jacky Chan
user_reviews.Description:
I had a great experience going to this place since it was definitely less hectic than the Ben Thanh Market & Saigon Square. The vendors weren’t as pushy and suffocating as some other places

I also didn’t have to bargain much as I already received pretty decent prices to start with from the vendors.

There’s also a gym one of the entrances for all you gym rats and a food court downstairs.

title: Aeon Shopping Mall - Tan Phu
address: 30 Tân Thắng, Celadon City, Tân Sơn Nhì, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: RJ28+JX Tan Son Nhi, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Spacious indoor mall with stores selling clothes & home goods, plus a food court & movie theater.

complete_address.state: Tan Son Nhi, Ho Chi Minh

user_reviews.Name: MH Tham
user_reviews.Description:
A spacious mall with an impressive variety of shops offering a wide range of products.

Although it can get crowded, the generous space ensures it never feels congested. Prices are reasonable for both tourists and locals.

The strong air con is especially appreciated during the afternoon heat.

user_reviews.Name: FrancisP
user_reviews.Description: This is a very large shopping mall, arguably the largest in Ho Chi Minh City today. It houses stores from most famous brands; numerous supermarket spaces, convenience stores, other shops, a children's play area, a cinema, restaurants, and cafes. The building also has a large parking area on the ground floor, basement, and rooftop. This shopping mall attracts a large number of customers for shopping, dining, and entertainment. It caters to a diverse range of customers, from budget-conscious to high-end. It is always kept clean, and the staff are professionally trained and friendly.

user_reviews.Name: Ha Le
user_reviews.Description: I take my kids here at least once a month. Super crowded on weekends. Much better on week days, but on weekends they have lots of promotions and food testing in the supermarket. My kids love the kids stores and playgrounds and cafeteria on the 3rd floor. You can do lots and lots of shopping here. Kids clothes, accessories, stationery, adults clothes, shoes, cosmetics, groceries, etc. They have literally EVERYTHING 😁

user_reviews.Name: Geoff Edwards
user_reviews.Description:
Nice experience plenty of choice. Prices high. But good selection. Lovely food Hall. And good supermarkets.
parking is free for all... Very clean toilets and wheelchair accessible.... Definitely worth a vist

user_reviews.Name: Azeez Oboodi
user_reviews.Description: A huge and beautiful mall that's worth visiting

user_reviews.Name: Emma W
user_reviews.Description: This place was packed when we arrived, so had to wait outside until a table was ready. Now I understand why. Cha Ca was so delicious - very fresh and crispy. Spring rolls were not bad either. Service was efficient and friendly. If I’m ever in Hanoi again, I’ll definitely return!

user_reviews.Name: A G
user_reviews.Description: Was very lucky didn’t have to wait long for a table on a Saturday night with many local Hanoi families coming here to eat too, they only had 1 dish on the menu and it came right up almost immediately. Enjoyed it while service demonstrated the local way of eating and enjoying the fried fish. Perfectly balanced meal

user_reviews.Name: Phuong Huynh
user_reviews.Description: Interesting, very convenient, totally a suitable place for weeking shopping and relaxing for the whole family. There are lots of promotion, served in professional manners and services.

title: AEON MALL Binh Tan
address: 1 Đường Số 17A, Bình Trị Đông B, An Lạc, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: PJV6+3Q An Lac, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

complete_address.borough: Bình Trị Đông B, An Lac

user_reviews.Name: Daniel Tran
user_reviews.Description:
Visit: October 2025

Always loved this mall. They have a good mix of brand name shops and the aeon specific shop (which is where I did all of my shopping) with good quality items at a good price. Will likely come back here next time if I want to do shopping without having to deal with haggling

user_reviews.Name: Roy
user_reviews.Description:
Good AEON in Quan Binh Tan. Big, have everything inside. You can spend few hours there, no problem.

Recommended 👌

user_reviews.Name: Iam “TheTraveler” TheTraveler
user_reviews.Description: Sept 6th 2025. The air conditioning is on and it gets several degrees hotter every floor you go up. If you're planning to come here to eat on the top floor, you might want to change plans there are a couple food choices at one floor down but still rather sticky the air conditioning is cool but not dry it's very humid and therefore it's sticky and uncomfortable sweating the entire time inside the mall. This was going to be a one-star review until I saw the cool baby holder in the men's room. It's very uncommon for men to have the baby in Asia but I'm a foreigner and I have my baby with me all the time! The baby holder device in the men's room is really cool more malls should have them!

user_reviews.Name: Mike Horrod
user_reviews.Description: Highly recommend their bicycle shop. I bought both my children  bicycles from them in July. Disappointingly one of the bikes was broken shortly after however the shop was happy to help us replace the broken part under the warranty. Thank you.

user_reviews.Name: FQL
user_reviews.Description: Excellent mall. Japanese grocery store, dollar stores, bakery, etc. Lots of good stuff. Cat Cafe with lots of chill friends. Good AC and clean bathrooms. Lots of parking and easy Grab  pick up.and drop off. The security guards are friendly and will help not just look at you with defensive face. Hope to visit again when in town.

user_reviews.Name: H A
user_reviews.Description: Lots of choices and surprisingly quite a few of halal items. Even found halal cut chicken and beef parts/pieces here. The cashier are fast and efficient and take effort to properly wrap fragile items like crockery and flowers.

user_reviews.Name: Trinity
user_reviews.Description: The staff were rude and impolite. We ate at YAKIMONO restaurant in Aeon Binh Tan - a Japanese BBQ restaurant! and bought bottled water there. After dinner, we went down to the supermarket to shop and brought the bottled water we bought at the restaurant with us. The staff and security guards stopped us and accused us of stealing the bottled water and they didn't offer a single apology after their stupid mistake. How stupid and so rude. I've never been treated like this on a trip in a country I consider cultured. We’ll never be back here.

user_reviews.Name: Ann Ng
user_reviews.Description: o far, so good. It’s not a big shopping center, but there are a lot of food and drink options. Free parking is a plus. We’ve visited a few times for movies, dining, bowling, and the cat cafe. It’s also conveniently close to my place. Overall, it’s a good place to visit.

title: Vincom Mega Mall - Thao Dien
address: 161 Võ Nguyên Giáp, Thảo Điền, An Khánh, Hồ Chí Minh 70000, Vietnam
plus_code: RP2R+X9 An Khanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Modern multi-story mall with a variety of retail shops & a cinema, plus an upper-floor food court.

user_reviews.Name: Delta Nu**
user_reviews.Description:
Vincom Mega Mall Thao Dien is a very convenient and enjoyable place to spend a few hours, whether you are shopping, dining, or simply escaping the heat. The mall is clean, modern, and well organized, making it easy to walk around and find what you need. There is a good mix of international brands, local shops, restaurants, cafés, and entertainment options, including a cinema, which makes it suitable for both families and visitors.

I especially appreciated the comfortable atmosphere and the spacious layout. Even when it becomes busy, it still feels manageable and not too crowded. Staff in the stores were generally friendly and helpful, and the overall environment felt safe and welcoming.

This mall is a great stop in Thao Dien if you want a relaxing indoor experience with many choices in one location. I would happily come back again for shopping, food, or a quiet break during the day.

user_reviews.Name: Tony
user_reviews.Description:
Very clean and so to say "good looking" shopping centre. Located just by the Subway it is easy accessible. Five (or more) floors of which top two are hailed to restaurant and bars. Theres childrens drop off area and for bigger children an awesome gaming area.

Also shops that are not in other malls so that was a nice ++.

user_reviews.Name: 澤田規
user_reviews.Description: This shopping center is very clean and has many shops inside. There are also many affordable restaurants. It appears to be a five-story building with one basement floor. There are many food shops on the fourth and fifth floors. The shopping mall also has a game center, an amusement park for small children, and a facility where you can ride go-karts. The shopping center is medium-sized, with many small stores gathered together. Each store is not very large, but is of average size.

user_reviews.Name: MTC
user_reviews.Description: A convenient and rich shopping mall, which brings together major brands and also has a showroom that representative domestic cars of Vietnam. It is just outside the MRT An Phu Station. You must come here to spend crazily to stimulate economic development.

user_reviews.Name: Hassen Ayalew
user_reviews.Description: Visited Vincom Mega Mall Thao Dien during my trip to Saigon and was impressed by how modern and organized it is. The mall has a wide variety of shops and restaurants, plus it’s air-conditioned and very clean. I had lunch there and enjoyed walking around after — a great spot to relax and escape the heat for a few hours.

user_reviews.Name: Waquefa Barnard
user_reviews.Description:
There's a petting zoo on the 4th floor. There's alpacas, chickens of all sizes and other animals. The alpacas and the baby chicks are in bad shape,  the alpacas seem to have an infection and the baby chicks are losing hair. The pens of the animals stink and they don't look like they've been cleaned for a few days.

Feeding the birds was pretty cool and the I door slide for my kid was great.

user_reviews.Name: Princess Jael Mundiz
user_reviews.Description: The area surrounding the mall is very busy, but the inside of the mall is so quiet. Their grocery is Winmart located at B1, so the choices are a bit limited.

user_reviews.Name: Peter Vu
user_reviews.Description:
Vincom Mega Mall Thảo Điền is an excellent destination for shopping, dining, and entertainment! The mall offers a wide variety of stores, ranging from local brands to international retailers, making it a one-stop shop for everything you need.

The food court is impressive, with numerous options to suit all tastes, whether you’re craving Vietnamese cuisine, Western dishes, or quick snacks. I also loved the spacious layout, modern design, and how clean the entire place is.

The cinema and play areas make it a great spot for families, while the supermarket downstairs is convenient for grocery shopping. Parking is well-organized, and the mall is easily accessible by public transport.

Highly recommended for anyone visiting or living in Thảo Điền!

title: Trung Tâm Thương Mại Vạn Hạnh
address: 11 Sư Vạn Hạnh, Hòa Hưng, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QMC9+6X Hoa Hung, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Popular mall with international brands, a cinema & food court, plus a hypermarket & kids' play area.

owner.name: Trung Tâm Thương Mại Vạn Hạnh (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: GRay.86
user_reviews.Description: Nice Mall, got local and international brand. Toilet are clean and Aircond is cold. Food court available, also Can Go to book store to buy some souvenirs

user_reviews.Name: Yenny Lam
user_reviews.Description:
This mall is absolutely fantastic! I had a wonderful time exploring the various shops and stores, which offered a wide range of products to suit different tastes and preferences.

From clothing and accessories to souvenirs and gifts, there's something for everyone here. What impressed me the most was the reasonable pricing, making it an ideal destination for shoppers on a budget.

The mall's cleanliness and sparkle were evident throughout, creating a pleasant atmosphere for visitors. The staff were friendly and approachable, always willing to lend a helping hand or offer recommendations.

The food options were plentiful and delicious, with a variety of cuisines to choose from. Whether you're in the mood for a quick snack or a full meal, you'll find something that suits your cravings. The drinks were also top-notch, with plenty of options to quench your thirst.

Overall, I'd say this mall is a must-visit destination for anyone looking for a great shopping and dining experience. With its clean facilities, friendly staff, and wide range of products and food options, it's a place where you can find everything you need and more.

I'll definitely be back!

user_reviews.Name: ThanhNhi
user_reviews.Description:
The mall opens later than others, but famous and very cloudy fastly, in especially genz. There are so many shops in fashion, food, beverage. Besides, having the gym and cinema is the plus point for this location.
although some sad things occured here, the mall try to become better

user_reviews.Name: Nguyen Hoang Hiep
user_reviews.Description:
I recently visited Vạn Hạnh Mall and had a great overall experience. The mall is spacious, clean, and well-organized, with a good balance of shopping, dining, and entertainment options
Variety of stores: From local brands to international names, there's something for everyone.
Food: Lots of choices, from fast food to Vietnamese dishes. Everything I tried was fresh and tasty.
Facilities: Clean restrooms, good air conditioning, and plenty of seating areas made the visit comfortable.
Family-friendly: Great place to hang out with kids, with a cinema and game zones available.

user_reviews.Name: Stefano DS
user_reviews.Description: It's a great mall but feels very incipid once inside. I think it's lack of variety or natural light that comes in... Other than that, it's a place that has everything you need.

user_reviews.Name: M C
user_reviews.Description:
I had an enjoyable time shopping at this mall. It has a huge supermarket on the ground level, plenty of eateries, a newly open Popmart, and toilets on every level.

There are sitting benches along each level, but it could be more.

user_reviews.Name: bee HS
user_reviews.Description:
Me and my family came to visit and buy our phone cases and tempered glass ,, the price was okay and transparent but maybe this lady think that I don’t know how to count Vietnamese dong ,,

I’m waiting for my change while sitting then she tried to act like she’s busy ,

I type in my Google translate and told her where’s my change , she said no change .
Giving me hand sign ,
Then i type again in my app and told her I need my change and show her my calculator .

I love vietnam but its sad coz some Vietnamese tried to scam you 😮‍💨😞

user_reviews.Name: DoraSPS
user_reviews.Description: A combination of everything you'll ever need from a Mall: fun activities, good food, groceries, cosmetics shops,... with top tier quality. Always worth a visit!

title: SC VivoCity
address: 1058 Đường Nguyễn Văn Linh, P, Tân Hưng, Hồ Chí Minh 70000, Vietnam
plus_code: PPJ3+39 Tan Hung, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Indoor shopping center with 5 floors of stores, eateries & kids’ play areas, plus occasional events.

user_reviews.Name: Kenny Tang
user_reviews.Description: Modern mall with some mid to low range brands. Massive Coop supermarket on the 2&3rd floors. Also a 4Ps Pizza which is deeeeeelicious! Carpark if available

user_reviews.Name: Ady Owen
user_reviews.Description: Super clean shopping mall. Plenty of shops to browse around and lots of choices.

user_reviews.Name: Artsy Li
user_reviews.Description: Boring place. Probably third tier mall by international standards. More like a neighborhood mall. Not worth the trip here if you're a tourist. Weird child outdoor playground place with super loud speakers blasting silly music that would damage little kids ears. This makes me question the management of this mall. An embarrassment to Singapore with Vivo branding.

user_reviews.Name: Viren Lohana
user_reviews.Description: Good Mall with Many popular stores. Decent big but some part of it on 2nd and 3 rd floor is yet vacant. There are options for food.

user_reviews.Name: J A
user_reviews.Description: Good shopping mall equipped with all the necessities for family crowd

user_reviews.Name: Luke Phạm
user_reviews.Description: Bad choice, bad experience. Price be too high compared with value of food, it was not reasonable. The worst chendol that i did have, even i can not drink. Roasted eggs were so bad, they should be made by duck egg. Only Fried chicken be quite good. Bean with samba sauce made me feel bad, I used to like it so much until now. Service also really really bad. Tom-yum also was very bad also, salty and nothing. I will never be back, disappointed, and dont recommend.

user_reviews.Name: Sean Yam
user_reviews.Description: It’s a relatively small, four-story mall featuring a supermarket, clothing stores, coffee shops, and a few F&B outlets. The place looks not new but isn’t very crowded.

user_reviews.Name: Ed Chung
user_reviews.Description:
This is a huge shopping mall located in District 7. I last visited it few years ago (but not in most recent trips last 2~3 years). As it was Sunday, it was very crowded and there's a flea market at the ground floor that attracted a lot of people.

Of course, the X-tra hypermarket was also crowded, besides the cafes and fast food restaurant like McDonalds. But the higher end boutique shops were customers-empty.

One can really shop here as there are fashion, shoes, bags, babycare, toy shops etc among others here and there will be something that cater to the needs of people from various age groups.

title: THE GARDEN MALL BULDING
address: 190 Đ. Hồng Bàng, Phường 12, Chợ Lớn, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: QM34+VQ Cho Lon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Indoor mall decorated with tropical plants offering a bookstore, gift shops & restaurants.

user_reviews.Name: B
user_reviews.Description:
Place looks like it's under semi-permanent renovation...
Edit - apparently the place is haunted with the three (abandoned) residential blocks resembling 3 incense sticks for Chinese prayers...

user_reviews.Name: thu minh nguyen
user_reviews.Description: Book store -PNC, and many kind of famous branch in F&B such as: McDonal, Koi, maku, beer club, Baoz Dimsum , Vietnamese foods ..... Please come to enjoy

user_reviews.Name: Nguyễn Ngọc Tiến Thành
user_reviews.Description: renovated from the old Thuan Kieu Plaza, this place is quite and comfortable with Chinese restaurant and some fast food restaurant in Ground floor. the first floor is not crowded.

user_reviews.Name: Ha Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: The mall is not opened, looks like it’s been shut down for a while but the surrounding area is bustling if you don’t mind the heat.  Wasted our time going to a space we thought was air condition and shops being inside but it’s closed.  Instead, Go to the nearby Hung Vuong Plaza, only a couple min drive on.

user_reviews.Name: Earth Guide
user_reviews.Description: Not much left, some stores closed. But a couple of great options for eateries around.

user_reviews.Name: Huy Đỗ Phước
user_reviews.Description: Open too late, service not good, attitude of staff is very bad.

user_reviews.Name: Yen-Thanh Le
user_reviews.Description: This place is beautiful. Have a lot of good restaurants here

user_reviews.Name: Aznill Leong
user_reviews.Description: Interesting but its normal. Nothing spectacular or impressive.

title: Saigon Garden
address: 99 Nguyễn Huệ, Bến Nghé, Sài Gòn, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QPF3+8G Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Nazanin R
user_reviews.Description:
Today I went to Saigon Garden. On the ground floor there were a few cafés and two restaurants. I wanted to take the elevator to go upstairs, but the person standing in front of the elevator asked where I wanted to go and said that upstairs there are only restaurants.

I decided not to go. Obviously, if a tourist goes upstairs around 12 pm, it’s probably for lunch. Their English was also very limited, which made communication difficult.

Their attitude was not appropriate either. They stood in front of the elevator and blocked the way, asking where I was going.

Honestly, it was disappointing.

user_reviews.Name: Karl Xavier
user_reviews.Description: Good food and friendly service, but also extremely slow and the dishes came one by one, sometimes with 15-20 minutes in between. In the end we had to leave before the last dish came - that was over an hour after ordering. Beware the staff soeak basically no english so you just have to point on the menu, which is fine as there are pictures. Otherwise it was a nice atmosphere and nice view. We sat on the top floor.

user_reviews.Name: Wanga
user_reviews.Description:
Very chill place. Good for people watching. There is nothing much to do or see except to just get a drink and watch the people go by.
There are those live performers and people selling balloons and cotton candy opposite.
But I wouldn’t call this a place to come or do anything. It’s just a place of interest whereby you come here and people watch. Nothing much to buy either.

user_reviews.Name: Ak
user_reviews.Description: This is a small shopping plaza that has restaurants and cafes in it. There is also a bathroom here and a little garden inside. You can actually go through here to go to the street next to it and it’s actually pretty convenient.

user_reviews.Name: Mark “Pugsley” Phenna
user_reviews.Description: Nice place to sit down. Have a coffee and watch the world go by.

user_reviews.Name: Vu Dang
user_reviews.Description: Enjoy a dinner on sunday here at Snowee and Gogi so goos but so convenience for using restroom while we have to take the receipt in order to use wc…so funny we still not finish the dinner and how we get the receipt

user_reviews.Name: Yuki
user_reviews.Description:
The restaurant location is 4th floors of Sai Gon Garden.
The view is good. You can see the night view city. Close to Nguyen Hue Walk Street.
The good foods. I like the sauce of salad. The Avocado smoothie is good as well.
Staffs are very friendly and polite.

user_reviews.Name: tarah shaw
user_reviews.Description:
Nice place
Stopped at the Starbucks for a coffee
Didn't really shop here but was mesmerised by all the people dining and hanging out in all the malls

title: Gigamall Shopping Center
address: 240 - 242 Đ. Phạm Văn Đồng, Hiệp Bình, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: RPHC+4H Hiep Binh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: The MY World
user_reviews.Description:
It's shopping mall. It's kinda big one. They have 1st shop of Sizeria. So it's nice. But
It's not too crowded, so easy to visit and park your motorcycle. There are a lots of restaurants at basement and also at the other floor, so it's good place for lunch and dinner. There are many kinds of shops like pharmacy, books, cloth, cafe, etc.

user_reviews.Name: MA Reyes
user_reviews.Description: One of the best malls I’ve visited in Saigon. Although it’s a bit far from the city center and not the usual spot for tourists, I really enjoyed strolling around. The mall offers plenty of shopping and dining options, including Jollibee on the lower ground floor and Kohnan Japan. The upper levels even have a gaming and recreational area, giving the place a really cool vibe!

user_reviews.Name: Jaap Brasser
user_reviews.Description: Gigamall is a fun spot to visit, especially during the holidays. The Christmas decorations are fantastic; bright, festive, and the panda displays are adorable and great for photos. Clean, lively, and a nice place to stroll, shop, and enjoy the seasonal atmosphere.

user_reviews.Name: Dale Rowan
user_reviews.Description: As Asian malls go this one is quite ordinary.  Underwhelming in every aspect.  It's not Giga. Not even Mega. The arcade is archaic,  still uses coins, half the machines are broken or just poor quality.  Food court is mediocre.  If your in HCMC pick another mall. Best view is near the toilets on one of the floors. Not many shops. Crap mall.

user_reviews.Name: Gia Thanh Dang
user_reviews.Description: I recently visited Gigamall Shopping Center in Thu Duc City, Ho Chi Minh City, and was really impressed by its modern design and diverse offerings. The mall features a wide range of stores, including both international brands and local shops, making it a convenient place for shopping. What sets Gigamall apart is its combination of shopping and entertainment – there’s a cinema, an indoor playground, a VR Game Zone, and many dining options with both Vietnamese and international cuisines. The mall is clean, well-maintained, and not overly crowded, even on weekends. Staff at most stores are friendly and helpful. Overall, Gigamall is a great place to shop, eat, and relax with friends or family. I would definitely recommend it to anyone visiting the area.

user_reviews.Name: Ellenstein Katie
user_reviews.Description:
A truly versatile shopping center. This commercial complex features 8 floors in total, including 2 basement levels, 7 above-ground floors, and a rooftop area.

Located right on Pham Van Dong Boulevard, the center boasts a spacious layout with plenty of dining and entertainment options. It also has a wide range of well-known brands, offering something for everyone.

It’s an ideal weekend hangout spot for groups of friends or families looking to enjoy food, fun, and shopping all in one place.

user_reviews.Name: Prinsesa Mercado
user_reviews.Description: The lady in the toilet was not good! I have a photo of her. No need to yell at me! Please be good to your customers. Toilet near in the Bread Talk she's wearing red shirt and black pants!

user_reviews.Name: Hà Trang Minh (Bryan Trang)
user_reviews.Description:
Situated at 240-242 Phạm Văn Đồng, Hiệp Bình Chánh Ward, Thủ Đức City, Gigamall is a premier shopping and entertainment hub in Ho Chi Minh City’s eastern region. Opened on January 12, 2019, this modern mall spans 110,000 m² across seven floors, two basements, and a rooftop, offering a vibrant “shoppertainment” experience. Its standout feature is the Di.Crystal LED system and interactive LED floor, a first in Vietnam, creating a visually stunning atmosphere inspired by a grand piano.
Gigamall houses over 1,000 stores, featuring top brands in fashion, electronics, cosmetics, and home goods. Its culinary scene shines with diverse options like Haidilao hotpot, Kichi Kichi conveyor-belt lẩu, and Asiana Food Town, serving Asian street food. Entertainment is a highlight, with JP World on the 6th floor offering cutting-edge 3D mapping, VR, and AR experiences, alongside CGV cinemas and the JPARK dinosaur park for kids. The rooftop Sky Zone provides free play areas and scenic dining. With its strategic location, modern amenities, and family-friendly vibe, Gigamall is a must-visit destination for shopping, dining, and fun in Saigon.

title: Crescent Mall
address: 101 Đ. Tôn Dật Tiên, Khu đô thị Phú Mỹ Hưng, Tân Mỹ, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: PPH9+CC Tan My, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Bright, contemporary venue with 5 floors of stores & restaurants, plus a lakeside green space.

complete_address.borough: Khu đô thị Phú Mỹ Hưng, Tan My

user_reviews.Name: Ravinder K
user_reviews.Description: Crescent Mall provides a commendable shopping experience. The diverse range of stores and accessible layout contribute to an agreeable visit. 🛍️ The establishment maintains a clean and inviting atmosphere. 🌟 Overall, it is a well-maintained commercial center. ✨

user_reviews.Name: Daniel Tran
user_reviews.Description:
Visit: October 2025

Mall with a lot of brand name stores. Very fancy, clean, lots to see, but even better because they have a climbing gym inside 🤩

user_reviews.Name: Peter Collipp
user_reviews.Description: Great place to bring the kids for a day. Lots of activities and shopping options. We went rock climbing, got some great sushi for lunch and went to Tiniworld. The kids loved it. There was plenty of food and drink options, good air conditioning and places to sit.

user_reviews.Name: Natz
user_reviews.Description: Spenthoura shopping in the mall. Nice place with quite a lot of options. Lot of cloth shops. A good book shop available, it has lot of ornaments too. There is a food court also you can have tasty food. We have tried a place where you can prepre your own meal. It was quite wonderful and novel for us as it is not common in SL

user_reviews.Name: John Winter
user_reviews.Description:
On our last full day in Ho Chi Minh City, we decided to explore Crescent Mall before heading over to the nearby Starlight Bridge and park.
