Và thế là mình chuyển thành công (màn hình ck mình để dưới đây) và lúc đó bạn nữ nhân viên đấy lại nói với mình giọng điệu khó chịu “mình đã bảo bạn quét lại thanh toán giúp mình mã QR khác” , mình cảm thấy khó hiểu và đưa màn hình ra là mình đã chuyển rồi. Và sau đó, bạn nữ ấy lại càng khó chịu hơn và lẩm bẩm (vò đầu bứt tóc) gì đó rồi lúc đó bạn nữ nvien mới chịu chụp màn hình ck để xác nhận mình thanh toán rồi.
Mình cũng biết là bạn này đã làm lâu rồi mà chuyện này cũng ko phải lần đầu mà kể cả 3 4 lần mình thanh toán trước đây bạn ấy cũng đưa mình quét nhầm thanh toán và cũng nhận lại thái độ khó chịu bạn ấy y chang lần này là lần cuối để mình fback.
Làm lâu rồi mà kỹ năng dịch vụ vẫn thiếu sót và lần sau mình đeo khẩu trang đã dày rồi thì nói to lên cho người khác nghe nhé!

user_reviews.Name: fantacola0x0
user_reviews.Description:
Không để bảng giá lúc ra tính tiền mới biết giá thấy mắc.
Cho 5 sao vì có bạn nhân viên nấu mì rất ngon. Thường xuyên quay lại chỉ vì mì trộn của bạn ấy.

user_reviews.Name: Minh Lương Đắc
user_reviews.Description: Siêu thị quá kẹt sỉ đông khách đến mấy cũng chỉ có 1 nhân viên

user_reviews.Name: QUY LEVAN
user_reviews.Description: Siêu thị này bán đồ quá mắc, mua 1 món đồ chơi cho bé mà giá mắc gấp 4 lần ở ngoài

title: Circle K Viet Nam
address: 82 Nguyễn Huệ, Bến Nghé, Sài Gòn, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: QPG3+34 Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Ak
user_reviews.Description: An average convenience store located along the walking street where there are lots of tourists. It has the usual selection of snacks, drinks, and essentials — nothing special, but convenient if you need to grab something quickly while exploring the area.

user_reviews.Name: Lé Frost
user_reviews.Description: Perfectly fine convenience shop along Nguyen Hue, Ho Chi Minh City. It houses a decent selection of products despite its smaller size, and manages to not feel cramped layout-wise either. Service is cordial and efficient.

user_reviews.Name: Now Supplement
user_reviews.Description: Bad, none of the outlet work to charge my phone, 3% but i have to go to another store to charge

user_reviews.Name: Lay O.
user_reviews.Description:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I always have a great experience at Circle K! The store is clean, well-organized, and stocked with everything I need, from snacks and drinks to household essentials. The staff is friendly and efficient, making checkout quick and easy. I also appreciate the fresh coffee and hot food options, which are perfect for a quick stop on the go.

user_reviews.Name: Son Tran
user_reviews.Description:
The store close for some reason but still open door and when customer walkin the staff is very rude try to cast customer out
Updated to reply for the response of Circle K below: No, I only walked-in to buy some stuff, the staff asked what I want to buy and then told me (very rude) that Circle K was not operating at that moment. (Why border asked what I want to buy?)

user_reviews.Name: Trân
user_reviews.Description: This convenient store is right at Nguyen Hue walking street so it is always full of customers. Staff was nice and friendly when I was there, I can pay by cash, credit card or even transfer money using my Vietnamese bank account. Price of products are not cheap but acceptable.

user_reviews.Name: Mei Lee
user_reviews.Description:
Convenient location on Nguyen Hue. We walked here from our hotel, Royal Saigon, to get snacks and drinks.

It is quite small and very narrow. When there are a lot of people in line, the walkway always gets congested. Which gets frustrating. There is no real sense of order. Has most of what you'll need.

user_reviews.Name: Huy Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: the staff is not happy with customer. Hope that the store manager will see my review and train the staff carefully

title: Circle K Viet Nam
address: S02 BS07, Vinhomes Grand Park, Long Bình, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: RRWV+64 Long Binh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Je Se
user_reviews.Description:
Extremely under-stocked on many items. Either there is too much customer traffic severely wiping out the inventory or some person(s) cannot order stock correctly. Which means incompetent staff.

**"I'll take Incompetent Staff for 100 Alex!"

**This is most likely the reason the store is wiped out constantly. In addition, most of the staff seem customer friendly and customer focused. But there are a few that shouldn't be employed in this type of business.

Also, those few unworthy employees will demonstrate with poor customer service: not scanning everything by leaving it aside and/or discrimination - especially to foreigners. One when I was there, a young female (probably new, since never seen before) did this by taking a fellow Vietnamese customer and servicing them, when my things were directly there on the counter. They ignored me and serviced them.

I have been to several Circle K stores in the Vincom sector, from the BS-xx+ to S-xx areas, and those in between. Every one, they had excellent customer service and well stocked!

title: 7-Eleven
address: 118 Pasteur, Bến Nghé, Sài Gòn, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: QPF2+6M Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Pit stop for snacks, drinks & daily essentials

user_reviews.Name: Matt Freeland
user_reviews.Description:
The staff politely asked this livestreamer to leave the convenience store but lied to the young workers. This foreigner is rude and obnoxious to all the customers and workers. Please do not allow this man inside again. It happened yesterday in the afternoon, 24/01/2025.

When I went inside, he had his speaker too loud and was talking a storm of swear words out loud. Please protect the privacy of your customers!

user_reviews.Name: Nesmah Zahran
user_reviews.Description: My Hong was very nice and took care of us. She sold us the new tea!

user_reviews.Name: Balram Patil
user_reviews.Description: Quys and tan so good. Staff was veey helping, nice experience.

user_reviews.Name: Chitra
user_reviews.Description: A guy was extremely and utterly drunk. Absolutely bombed out of his tree; hammered out of his gourd. He had to be carried out of the store by 2 of his friends. Best 7/11 experience ever.

user_reviews.Name: Philipp Sendler
user_reviews.Description:
I’ve always appreciated 7-Eleven for its convenient service, especially when it comes to ready-to-eat meals like noodles or toast. At every other 7-Eleven I’ve visited, the staff have always prepared the items for me and handed them over ready to enjoy—quick, easy, and professional.

Unfortunately, my recent experience at this particular location was quite the opposite. The staff member on duty seemed entirely uninterested in helping. She insisted that I prepare everything myself and even told me to clean up my own trash afterward—tasks that are normally handled by staff as part of the service. I understand self-service to a certain extent, but this felt more like being dismissed than being served.

Compared to the consistent quality I’ve come to expect from 7-Eleven, this experience was a major letdown. I hope management takes note, as it’s disappointing to see employees who clearly have no interest in doing their job properly. Respect and basic customer service shouldn’t be optional.

user_reviews.Name: Kim Gill
user_reviews.Description: The employees Quy and Tan makes great drinks

user_reviews.Name: Ros Read
user_reviews.Description: Hong and Linh is very helpful, everyday I come for breakfast and they never failed to make my day because of their friendliness and always go out to help me! Thank you to Hong and Linh so much!!! Keep up the good job!!!

user_reviews.Name: KAI-THONG
user_reviews.Description: Have lots food and water to buy a snack too. The store is about the medium large.

title: Circle K Việt Nam
address: 273 Lê Thánh Tôn, Bến Thành, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: QMCW+M7 Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Sergio
user_reviews.Description: Very small for the center

user_reviews.Name: Mr Noel
user_reviews.Description: Handy like 7/11 stores but smaller they sell a variety of thing even beer. atm out front.

user_reviews.Name: jake
user_reviews.Description: Easy to get to good prices

user_reviews.Name: Vo Khoi
user_reviews.Description: good

user_reviews.Name: Thinh Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: ok

user_reviews.Name: Van Mai
user_reviews.Description: nhân viên giới thiệu cho khách chương trình khuyến mãi. Rồi mình mua theo giá trị của bạn nói xong mà không nhận dc đồ khuyến mãi. Nếu vậy bạn đừng giới thiệu làm gì

user_reviews.Name: Lars Lekken
user_reviews.Description: Todella pieni kauppa verrattuna vastaaviin. Tosin erinonomainen viini ja vodka tarjonta, parempi kuin muissa vastaavissa. Siisti ja puhdas. Henkilökunta ystävällistä.

user_reviews.Name: Thị Thu Hà Thái
user_reviews.Description: Khách hàng không có tiền chuyển khoản, muốn trả tiền mặt thì nhân viên khó chịu. Việc quầy k đủ tiền thối là vấn đề của cửa hàng chứ đâu phải của khách hàng. Nhân viên thái độ, nói chuyện trả treo với khách hàng

title: Beautiful Saigon Hotel
address: 40/27 Bùi Viện, Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Bến Thành, Hồ Chí Minh 70000, Vietnam
plus_code: QM9V+7J Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Laid-back hotel offering unfussy rooms, a restaurant & an outdoor pool, as well as cooking classes.

complete_address.borough: Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Ben Thanh

user_reviews.Name: Mark Brazil
user_reviews.Description:
Beautiful Hotel Saigon 3 needs a lot of help. I stayed in the only room with a balcony,  #101.

The table lamp was missing a light bulb. They did replace the lamp on day 2.
The small refrigerator didn't work. They said that they would fix it, and failed to do so for 3 nights.

I paid for 4 nights and left after 3 nights. I couldn't wait to leave, even though I knew that there would be no refund.

The location is ok for frequent visits to Bui Vein Walking Street, however this small alley can be noisy up to 3 am. I'm not sensitive to noise at night, but it may affect you. I was on the lowest floor, and the room is well insulated, so it wasn't too bad.

The front desk gentleman was very nice, but I cannot recommend this hotel.

user_reviews.Name: Erik Neville
user_reviews.Description:
Bad Management.

I booked a basic room on Agoda, over the new year holiday. When I arrived to check in, I was informed that my room had been given to another guest, who opted to extend their stay prior to my arrival (this was approved by management, knowing I had the room booked, this was a conscious decision). I was not notified by the property prior to check-in that my room would be unavailable. I was then offered a different room for approximately double the price of my original booking. After long conversations with the receptionist, who was frequently on the phone with the manager, I decided to take the room for double the price (manager requested I cancel the booking myself on Agoda, major red flag). I was in the room for about 2 minutes, when the receptionist came back to inform me that the manager needed me to switch rooms, because the one I was given was a more expensive price. (None of this was my fault, and zero discount or accountability was taken by the manager for me not having my original booked room). I was then taken to a different room that had a view of a wall out the window, for double the price of my original booking, to which I declined. The receptionist was very apologetic, and helpful to me throughout the entire process, as all of this was out of her hands.

I recommend that if you choose to stay in this hotel, to not book online. They will not honor online bookings, and will try to upsell you to higher class rooms for more money. This was my experience.

user_reviews.Name: M1679PItomj
user_reviews.Description: We had a great time in the villa. The staff were so friendly and happily helped us with so much throughout our stay! ||I 100% recommend staying here. It’s the first place in Vietnam where they didn’t ask for a review on trip advisor or Google, but deserves really deserved a great one. ||The room was spacious, clean, comfortable & modern. The shower was strong and hot. It was perfect for us! Thank you for having us. If we are ever back in Hoi An we would definitely stay here again!

user_reviews.Name: jeremy teahan
user_reviews.Description:
I paid for a deluxe room with a king size bed

The hotel refused to give me the room I paid for and said there’s nothing they could do?
The guy at the front desk was not helpful to  I asked why they were selling these expensive rooms but don’t let people actually check In?  Do not stay here! nothing like the pictures also very  uncomfortable small bed. Sad experience checking into this place Will never return here.

user_reviews.Name: Rob Anthony
user_reviews.Description: DO NOT BOOK HERE ONLINE.  We arrived with a booking and were told that all the rooms were taken.  The front desk clerk said that they purposely overbook weekends to make sure they are full.  We got stuck with no rooms for the night even though they could see our booking online.  We were also informed if you don't arrive before 6 pm they give the booking away.

user_reviews.Name: Jennifer “Nacho / Pizza Snob” Bernardo
user_reviews.Description:
I can only speak about the bar service.
We came in for a celebration cocktail and we were ignored for 15mins.
Cocktails were overpriced and just ok.
So many better places to spend your money

user_reviews.Name: IceBear PR (Rene)
user_reviews.Description:
My stay is so far great. It located nearby entertaining places.
Three criticisms are (1) the serving cup wasn’t cleaned. It still has a stained of coffee from previous guests when I arrived, (2) the hot water was not working well, and (3) the blanket is kinda thin that I couldn’t get warm under it.

user_reviews.Name: mohammed idres
user_reviews.Description:
I had a disappointing experience during my stay at this hotel.
Upon arrival, I found that the air conditioner in my room was not working at all. I reported it to the front desk, but there was no real response. I also informed the staff on the next shift, who said they would fix it later, but nothing was done.

In such hot weather, a working AC is not optional — it’s essential. The room felt uncomfortable and it affected my rest.

While the location is convenient, the service was lacking, and the staff showed little interest in solving issues.
The room itself was basic, and cleanliness was average at best. For the price paid, I expected better value and care.

I truly hope the hotel management works on improving their service — from the moment of booking until the guest checks out.

title: Kim Hotel
address: 40/18 Bùi Viện, Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Bến Thành, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: QM9V+3Q Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Functional rooms, some with balconies, in a humble hotel offering complimentary Wi-Fi.

complete_address.borough: Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Ben Thanh

user_reviews.Name: Nash1066
user_reviews.Description: I love this hotel. It's in a perfect location just off Bui Vien but tucked down a quiet alleyway. The hotel is surrounded by great places to eat and close to all the locations you may want to visit in the city. The room is spacious, clean and very comfortable, with great AC and shower. The owner is lovely and has treated us really well. We have stayed here twice now and will definitely stay again when we return to Vietnam. Thank you Kim hotel for such a wonderful stay in Ho Chi Minh City.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: This place is awesome. The staff are super friendly and will do whatever they can to help. Very clean place. Far enough off the busy street so it’s quiet at night. Definitely worth the money to book a room!

user_reviews.Name: Darren Masters
user_reviews.Description:
“Great location and staff”

Li the manager is lovely. Great location in a laneway off the main Bui Vien street so you can have some peace and quiet without the noise of the main party area. Stayed in the upstairs deluxe room (6A) with balcony. Not 5 star but certainly clean and comfortable. Lee the manger is so welcoming and her hospitality is exceptional. Helpful friendly staff. Recommend and will be back.

user_reviews.Name: Norbert Wojtan
user_reviews.Description:
Hotel with a great location and wonderful staff. We stayed for a couple of nights with my fiancée. Although we arrived in Saigon around midnight, there were no problems with accommodation.
The location is also excellent. Even though Bui Vien Street is nearby, the rooms are well soundproofed, so you don’t hear much noise, which is not common in this area.
There is also an elevator, so carrying luggage up the stairs is not an issue.
If you have room on higher floor there is also a nice view for the alley when evening comes.
Highly recommended for both short and long stays!

user_reviews.Name: Don Jon
user_reviews.Description: Stayed at the Kim Hotel twice in Saigon these past two weeks. Great location, clean and cold rooms, friendly staff, it’s the perfect place to stay if you like to walk around and see all that Saigon has to offer. Easy walk home from Beer street too with plenty of food, massage, store and bar options all around. Will stay here again if I come back!

user_reviews.Name: Shane Cosgrave
user_reviews.Description: Fantastic hotel in a great location in Ho Chi Minh City. Clean and tidy. Despite being close to lots of bars there is no noise in the rooms at night. All of the staff are extremely friendly. I would recommend to anyone.

user_reviews.Name: Guenter Haas
user_reviews.Description: It’s a small and nice hotel, but…. the noise coming from the party zone „Bui Vien“ meanwhile is simply crazy. It‘s a mixture of various bands and techno clubs melting into a constant noise-level, which won‘t end until 3 in the night. It’s not the fault of the very nice and attentive staff, but if you want to find some sleep you have to stay away from Bui Vien.

user_reviews.Name: Melissa Berry
user_reviews.Description:
Kim Hotel was absolutely amazing!
It was a third  of a different hotel we stayed at and way better.
It's perfect location with great food, shopping and night-life within metres.
Despite being just off the main strip, it is very quiet in this hotel and you can't hear anything.
The staff clean the hotel very well daily and the owner is super friendly and helpful.
It has everything you need, good air con, big fridge, endless hot water, good toilet.
Couldn't recommend any higher!!
Great value for money in a perfect location.

title: Novotel Saigon Centre
address: 167 Hai Bà Trưng, Phường 6, Xuân Hòa, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QMMW+P9 Xuan Hoa, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Contemporary rooms in modern hotel offering a casual restaurant, 3 bars, a pool & a fitness room.

user_reviews.Name: Carla Maria - foodieagencyco
user_reviews.Description:
Novotel Saigon Centre truly felt like home in the heart of the city. Perfectly located, beautifully designed, and filled with everything you could ask for in a stay.

My room was so cozy and comfortable, with the perfect bed and a view that gifted me the most beautiful sunset. The Executive Lounge was such a highlight - indulging in some of the best macarons and cakes I’ve had, paired with stunning city views.

Attentive and professional staff, a lovely breakfast buffet, great pool and gym, and the rooftop stole my heart. Panoramic views over Saigon, a delicious mocktail in hand, and the perfect atmosphere to unwind and enjoy the evening.

If you’re visiting Ho Chi Minh City, this hotel truly has everything you need. Thank you, Novotel Saigon Centre, for such a wonderful stay.

user_reviews.Name: Andreas Wiehn
user_reviews.Description:
I recently stayed at Novotel Saigon Centre and had an overall very good experience.
I appreciated the complimentary upgrade to the Executive Floor, which offered a fantastic view from the 16th floor. Check in and check out was quick and friendly. The rooftop bar was truly a highlight — breathtaking views combined with excellent cocktails prepared by the outstanding bartender Hung. Breakfast was another strong point, with a wide variety of fresh and delicious options.

There are, however, two areas that could be improved. The pool is rather small and only partially open to the outside, giving it more of an indoor-feel. Additionally, the service team at the pool bar would benefit from further training to meet the hotel’s otherwise high standards.

user_reviews.Name: Hung Phan
user_reviews.Description: The seafood is very fresh and delicious, and the preparation is very pleasing the palate. I especially like lobsters, the kids really like beefs. Very tender and delicious. We had a cozy evening here. The professional, welcoming and attentive of the staff is a major plus for our wonderful experience journey.  Esspecially thanks to  Mr. Viet and team ( An, Tam, Tram). You all to making my birthday truly memorable.

user_reviews.Name: Fiona K
user_reviews.Description:
Had a great stay at Novotel Saigon. The service was excellent from the moment we arrived. The room was clean and comfortable.
The breakfast buffet was amazing with many choices. The rooftop bar has a beautiful view and a great atmosphere. We also tried the in-house spa, which was very relaxing.
Good location and very convenient. Highly recommended.

user_reviews.Name: Mohie5kb
user_reviews.Description: We checked in here last moment and got rooms. Location was great althogh not at District 1. Its located in district 3 but is nearby and I feel the location is rather more luxurious and open. Walkable to few restaurants and supermarkets.  Very spacious rooms and clean. Service is prompt and staff is cooperative. Nice coffee by the way it has in its restaurant. Veg options in breakfast could be increased.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: Nice hotel in an excellent Location, gym is too small though and if you have a Room facing the Beer Garden you will have free Live Music until Late evening in you room. Make sure you will get a room facing the other side of the building which is quiet.

user_reviews.Name: Nhan Tran
user_reviews.Description:
We stayed here for a few days while getting ready to go back home.

Pros: The facility is well maintained.
Price is reasonable for the quality
Staff was great all around.
The room didn’t have that funky smell when you first go into it like others do. The temperature is always well maintain…doesn’t shut off when you leave like others.
Breakfast was ok. Nothing to brag about but that was simple.
The locations was good for overall going around.

Overall we enjoyed our stay. It is a tries 4 star rated hotel and not over rated like a lot of places that will leave you majorly disappointed because the place was over rated.

user_reviews.Name: O D
user_reviews.Description:
The atmosphere is comfortable and welcoming, making it a great place to unwind in the evening or meet friends after work. The drink selection focuses on beers and wines, offered at reasonable prices for a rooftop bar in the city center. The staff are friendly, attentive, and professional.
The New Year end party was well organized and lively, with good music, a fun crowd, and a festive atmosphere that made the celebration feel special without feeling overcrowded. It was an enjoyable way to welcome the new year in a classy rooftop setting.
Overall, Top Bar is a solid choice for a laid-back yet festive rooftop experience with good service and pleasant city views.

title: SPRING HOTEL - 4SEASONS HOTEL
address: WP46+96X SPRING HOTEL - 4SEASONS HOTEL, 27d Đ. N2, Lái Thiêu, Hồ Chí Minh 75000, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Matt Fisher
user_reviews.Description:
Spring Hotel has been a comfortable and magical experience. My wife and I brought her father here so he could see Vietnam in a more modern time.
The owner Trinh has been very accommodating and helpful in making sure not only our rooms are comfortable, but also making sure we're having the best experience in her beautiful country.
The hotel is located in a comfortable location that isn't overbearing with traffic when wanting to walk down the street for a delicious cup of coffee. But it's still near plenty of market and chopping experience that's only a short walk or Grab (Uber for Vietnam) away.
There's a very nice grocery store next to the hotel if you just want to grab some things and stay in as well.
Come to Vietnam, enjoy everything this amazing country has to offer (the food is out of this world) and most importantly, come stay at Spring hotel!

user_reviews.Name: Malcolm Mcleod
user_reviews.Description:
Fantastic stay here at spring hotel, wonderfully helpful owners, clean rooms stocked with drinks and supplies. Will definitely be staying here again if I am in the area in the future.

Thank you for having me.❤

user_reviews.Name: Thị ngọc ái Nguyễn
user_reviews.Description: The best hotel we've stayed at BINH DUONG province, excellent customer service, both housekeeping and very nice hotel. Would recommend and hope to come back again one day. Cheers!

user_reviews.Name: Amy Fisher
user_reviews.Description: Extremely friendly staff!  I enjoyed our time here very much.  Rooms were beautiful and clean.  I highly suggest staying here if you have the opportunity.

user_reviews.Name: モサのゲーム実況
user_reviews.Description: Smart TV is furnished, VAT invoice cannot be issued.

user_reviews.Name: Djoyjenpao Owen
user_reviews.Description: Very clean, complete amenities compare to other hotel,, new buildings, quite

user_reviews.Name: Johnny Le
user_reviews.Description: Good price, good service, good location and cozy environment.

user_reviews.Name: nanang pudya Kristiana
user_reviews.Description: Clean ,fresh..and comfortable..😎

title: Amanaki Thao Dien Hotel
address: 10 Nguyễn Đăng Giai, Thảo Điền, An Khánh, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: RP2P+Q7 An Khanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: We had a wonderful stay! The hotel staff went out of their way to make us feel comfortable and were always ready to help, even with the Vietnamese language. Their kindness, service, and hospitality made our experience truly enjoyable.

user_reviews.Name: Allen1208
user_reviews.Description: Marvellous! I enjoyed my stay here - location (away from Central Quan 1) , the hotel set up and the team service is exceptional top class. It is located near to Thao Dien metro station and less than 10 mins walking to hip and happening Xuan Thuy street where you can find lots of cafes and eateries. The hotel is really amazing once you stepped into the lobby with it's unique antic decoration and set up. The hotel offers me a free upgrade to Executive Room without balcony and the room was spacious enough with walk in wardrobe, separate pantry area and toilet - best of all, window view to Landmark 81 . Special mentioned to the hotel crew for it's warm hospitality and everyone able to speak fluent English. They took extra effort to offer meal vouchers on my birthday and once i returned in afternoon after half day tour, the team offer banc piah as refreshment send to my room with a warm message to cheer me up. Special mentioned to the front office staff named Tuan, his friendliness and care is top notch.

user_reviews.Name: Zhouyuan Xu
user_reviews.Description:
The hotel has its character, so does the service.

I'd say it's a nice unique hotel with different vintage decorations, but definitely didn't reach the standard for 4 stars hotel as I traveled so many places.

Both Japan, HK and mainland China's hotel when they saw girl's period blood on the sheet, they will change it privately, let alone charging the 'fine'. Cause usually, the cleaning fee is included as we paid for the good amount of hotel fee. Fine, it's ok to charge some amount of money. But how to deal with the 'fine' is another thing. Please note that keeping the conversation private and quick is better than shouting it across a lobby. Why should the girl be humiliated by the staff in the lobby while at least 3 male strangers right next by, just because she suddenly hit her certain natural body circle. It is not ok to have this kind of service at a 4 stars hotel.

Also the room cleaning was hitting the door super early, seemed not have any professional way to check if the customers in the room or not.

And for executive room, still dusty desk, dirty slippers, no toothbrushes prepared. Sustainability is not an excuse to have no good service especially if you're marking yourself as 4 stars. You can learn any Japanese hotel they will not provide the toothbrush in the room but can ask for the receptionist for free toothbrushes if the customer needs. Don't tell me you're donating the money to some NGOs, sure, you can just use the money we already paid for the room.

But yea, the hotel is in a nice spot, not noisy at night during the stay, and some cool walkable areas near there.

user_reviews.Name: Quỳnh Trần
user_reviews.Description:
I had a really great stay at Amanaki Thảo Điền. The hotel feels different from the usual spots — the whole place is filled with Vietnamese art, handcrafted furniture, and little touches that make the space feel warm and intentional. Even the room had this artistic, homey vibe that I really enjoyed.

The staff were genuinely friendly, and the fresh coconut welcome drink was such a nice surprise after the drive. The pool is huge, the gym has everything you need, and breakfast at Núc was honestly a highlight. It’s simple, clean, and made from really good ingredients — light but satisfying, with flavors that feel natural rather than overly seasoned.

Overall, it’s a calm, beautifully designed place with a lot of character. I’d happily stay here again.

user_reviews.Name: Patrick Hayes
user_reviews.Description: Wonderful staff! They go out of their way to be kind and helpful. My room is nice, the executive king with balcony and a lovely view.  I will say that the room looked much larger in the photos but still a smidge larger than your average king room.  I would absolutely stay here again, in fact i will make a point of it.  3 minute walk to the heart of Thao Dien or 15 minutes via grab (avoid taxis, stick with the grab app wherever possible) into D1 for shopping, wilder night life, etc. Lovely place.

user_reviews.Name: Christian Breitkreutz
user_reviews.Description:
Beautiful hotel with great value for money. From the outside it looks like a modern-kind of building. But they put a lot of attention to the interior. Everything is kept in a classic kind of set up. Lobby, rooms, even the gym. Classic yet modern and very spacious.

The room comes with a little kitchen and a very good bathroom. Great rain shower with very good pressure. The gym is well equipped too.

user_reviews.Name: Duong Pham
user_reviews.Description:
Amanaki Thảo Điền was such a lovely stay.
The space feels cozy, artistic, and full of character, giving me a nostalgic sense of the old Southern Vietnam charm.

The customer service was excellent — friendly, attentive, and genuinely welcoming throughout my stay.

I stayed during Christmas, and the decoration truly stood out. The hotel had a Christmas tree made from recycled jeans, which was both creative and adorable, adding a thoughtful, sustainable touch to the festive atmosphere.

Highly recommended if you’re looking for a stay that feels warm, artistic, and personal.

user_reviews.Name: Cris
user_reviews.Description: Amanaki Hotel Saigon is a lovely eco-friendly stay right in the heart of the city. The hotel focuses on sustainability with thoughtful details like natural materials, reduced plastic use, and an overall calm, green atmosphere. I was impressed to see that absolutely everything is eco friendly -shampoo and body gel ,robes ,and even the clothes the staff is wearing .Visiting the spa is a must ,to make your stay even more amazing .Rooms are clean, stylish, (Tv is 85”,large kitchen and even snacks are provided )comfortable, offering a peaceful escape from the busy streets outside. The location of the hotel is perfect ,multiple options for food around and the details of the hotel are absolutely amazing ,looking like a museum and good taste .I will definitely come back .

title: Huong Thien Phu Hotel
address: 111 11, Kp Tây A, Đông Hòa, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: VQXJ+R5 Dong Hoa, Binh Duong, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Manh Pham
user_reviews.Description: Ok

user_reviews.Name: Ngo Vinh
user_reviews.Description: Good

user_reviews.Name: Hằng phựợng
user_reviews.Description: Like

user_reviews.Name: Nam Bùi
user_reviews.Description: Ok

user_reviews.Name: hiền huỳnh thị thu
user_reviews.Description: Very good😍

user_reviews.Name: Nguyen Thang
user_reviews.Description: Good

user_reviews.Name: Ngọc thể Trần
user_reviews.Description: Khách sạn thì ok. Nhưng tivi thì thuộc dạng tivi nhà nghỉ. Vào mới biết tivi không xem được youtube nên nói trả phòng. Chưa sử dụng bất kì 1 vật dụng gì. Mình cũng vào 1 mình nên mình kêu trả phòng mà thu người ta 100k.

user_reviews.Name: HỒNG HỒNG
user_reviews.Description: Ks Cũ lâu đời, mình đi công tác thỉnh thoảng ở đây. Gần quán nhậu khá tiện đi nhậu. Nữ chủ nhà thái độ hách dịch. Còn lại thì OKi

title: Lotte Hotel Saigon
address: 2A-4A Tôn Đức Thắng, Phường, Sài Gòn, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QPH4+FP Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Upscale rooms & suites in a posh hotel with 4 restaurants, a palatial lobby bar & an outdoor pool.

user_reviews.Name: Kanika Khanna
user_reviews.Description:
I had a wonderful experience staying at Lotto Hotel Saigon. From the moment I arrived, the customer service was absolutely amazing. The staff were warm, welcoming, and always ready to help with a genuine smile. They went above and beyond to make sure my stay was comfortable and smooth.

The rooms were clean, well-maintained, and very comfortable. The location is also fantastic — convenient to explore the city and close to key attractions, restaurants, and shopping areas.

What truly stood out was the hospitality. Every request was handled promptly and professionally, making me feel valued as a guest. It felt like a home away from home.

I would highly recommend Lotto Hotel Saigon to anyone visiting Ho Chi Minh City and will definitely stay here again on my next trip!

user_reviews.Name: S S
user_reviews.Description:
They deserve 10 stars!

We visited Ho Chi Minh City on a family holiday and, to be honest, we were very skeptical about booking this hotel at first since we had never experienced this brand before. But the location was excellent and the surrounding area looked convenient and lively, so we decided to book three rooms for our family and I’m so glad we did.

From the moment we arrived the staff (Mr Jhonny and Ms Nab.e ) made us feel genuinely welcome and looked after us throughout our stay.

They allowed us to check in 3 hours early without any extra charge, which was such a relief after a long flight. ( informed them as our flight was )

That small gesture really set the tone for our entire stay. The rooms were exactly as shown in the pictures clean and very comfortable.

Housekeeping did a fantastic job every day, and everything was spotless.
The breakfast was honestly amazing so many options to choose.

As an Australian traveler, I can confidently recommend this hotel and its services is absolutely fantastic!

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: Convenient and Comfortable StayHad a great stay overall. I didn’t use the pool, but managed a 30-minute gym session before enjoying the excellent breakfast buffet. The bed was very comfortable, and I appreciated being able to set the room temperature to 20°C for a restful night.

user_reviews.Name: jdf
user_reviews.Description:
Had a most wonderful stay at the Lotte Hotel Saigon from 3-7 Jan, in a Deluxe Room City View. Over my four nights spent at the Lotte, I was thoroughly impressed with the service provided and the speed of the room service/housekeeping team. Room design was a little dated but well equipped and furnished, i.e bidet toilets, nice plush beds and no real complaints.

Location wise, it is still in District 1 and is walkable to the major attractions i.e Notre Dame, Coffee Apartments, but not as central as other hotels.

Fortunately, Lotte's shuttle service is very useful in this aspect.
They provide a shuttle bus service to Notre Dame Cathedral, the Opera House and Ben Thanh Market. However, do note that the shuttle has to be booked with the concierge (Either call them or approach them in-person at the counter) an hour in advance.

Shuttles depart from the hotel only at 8am, 10am, 12pm, 2pm and 4pm. What impressed me was that even though they said it was a "shuttle bus", we were pleasantly surprised to be driven in their Toyota Sienna minivans instead, though it could have been because there was just two of us... but yeah that was pretty impressive. Unfortunately, did not manage to get the driver's name, as he was extremely polite and drove steadily and calmly despite HCMC's wild traffic.

Other facilities:
1) Pool

Didn't use it but looked pretty big and decent to swim in

2) Fitness Centre

Well-equipped, comes with showers and a sauna room too, good for a workout

The staff were as a whole, amazing. Don't know how else to put it. They were all extremely willing to help, from the security guard who'd open the doors of the car for us when we returned, to the concierge, to the housekeepers. Thank you for making my stay in HCMC such a pleasant one, and for showcasing the best of Vietnamese hospitality. Great job to the Lotte team and I would definitely stay at Lotte again when I return to HCMC.

user_reviews.Name: Rhys Travel
user_reviews.Description:
Very nice interiors, facilities and rooms. Excellent service from staff. The river views we had were beautiful. The breakfast buffet was probably the best in all the hotels we stayed at in Vietnam. They should pay more attention to customer quiet room request. Though it was acknowledged, our room was under a busy lounge which woke us up around 6am from the noise from moving furniture as the soundproofing to the ceilings wasn't ideal. They did move us to a better room but our energy levels were already affected from a bad night sleep.
The sauna is tiny, can only fit one ore two person max.
When there is live music performance on the river, the sound can be heard quite loudly in the river view room we had. Luckily they seemed to wrap up by midnight.

user_reviews.Name: Hongick Kim
user_reviews.Description:
I had a very pleasant stay at the hotel.
The room offered a beautiful, open view, creating a comfortable and relaxing atmosphere throughout the stay. The room condition and overall maintenance were excellent, and the view was definitely one of the highlights.
I would also like to commend the reception team for their professionalism and kindness. In particular, Veronica, Mia, and Tien provided outstanding service. From check-in to handling inquiries during my stay, they were consistently attentive, polite, and efficient. Their proactive and customer-focused attitude truly reflected the hotel’s high service standards.
Overall, the hotel delivers a high level of quality in terms of facilities, views, and service.
I would gladly recommend it and look forward to staying again.

user_reviews.Name: SUJIN LEE
user_reviews.Description:
At Lotte Hotel Saigon, I met Pinky — a beautiful soul with the most radiant smile.
Meeting her on the very first trip with my son felt like such a blessing. Her kindness was just as beautiful as her smile, and her thoughtful care made our stay incredibly special. Thanks to her attention and warmth, I even had the unforgettable luck of watching the most amazing fireworks right from my room. ✨
Because of Pinky, my trip to Ho Chi Minh City will remain a treasured memory for a lifetime. I want to say thank you once again to our lovely Pinky.
Yesterday we had other plans and stayed somewhere else, but today I am coming back to the hotel just to see her smile again. I truly hope we can meet her once more!
And I must mention — the breakfast at Lotte was absolutely outstanding! The Korean kimchi was especially amazing — the best taste of home abroad! 🇰🇷
See you soon, my dear Pinky. 💕

user_reviews.Name: 조길현
user_reviews.Description: I had a fantastic stay at this hotel! A huge shout-out to Pinky and Wendy for their exceptional service. They were incredibly kind and spoke excellent English, which made communication so easy. They went above and beyond by guiding me through local tourist attractions and explaining all the available guest benefits. Plus, the check-in process was impressively fast. Highly recommended!

title: La Vela Saigon Hotel
address: 280 Nam Kỳ Khởi Nghĩa, Xuân Hòa, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QMQP+F5 Xuan Hoa, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Posh high-rise hotel featuring a rooftop bar & an infinity pool, plus a spa & 3 swanky restaurants.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: I have stayed at La Vela Hotel on several previous occasions and have always liked it, particularly for the SPA and the spacious gym. Its location is very convenient, being only 10 minutes from the airport.My Luxury room was quite large, an improvement over the Standard room I had in the past, and it featured a balcony on the 21st floor. However, the in-room amenities could be improved; for example, by adding an espresso coffee machine and higher-quality toiletries.The breakfast was very good with a large choice of food, and it's served on the 25th floor with a great view. I also tried the VIP lounge at T2 floor, which had a good food selection. I would suggest they add wine to their evening drink offerings.The rooftop swimming pool is exceptionally large and offers a beautiful panoramic view of the city. The gym is spacious, but on this visit, I found the treadmills, a key piece of equipment for runners, to be poorly maintained. They seemed to have too much oil or the wrong type of oil on the belt, making them dangerously slippery at speeds over 10 km/h (faster than a 6:00 min/km pace). It felt like running on ice. As a runner, this significantly affected my overall evaluation.The SPA remains one of the hotel's best features. A consistent negative point, however, is the elevators. The waiting times are far too long because there are too few elevators for the size of the hotel, and they are quite slow.

user_reviews.Name: Shubhangi Srivastava
user_reviews.Description:
Staff was good however the management of the hotel might want to pull up their socks.

The hotel claims to be 5 star however it seems like an old and ill maintained property. Pool tiles were broken, room didn’t have proper wardrobe for storage, there was nothing on which you could keep your luggage on , simple things which someone would expect from a hotel publicised as a 5 star property.
The rooftop pool bar took ages to bring food and drinks, however, this could be due to the fact that lunar new year was approaching and they could be short staffed.
On the reception there is a document which basically lays out the “house rules”. What struck me was the point that the hotel would not be liable for any thefts or things missing from your room if the valuables were not kept in the safe. What this implies to me is that the staff is not reliable or the security is missing. I have traveled extensively however never came across such blatant shrugging off of responsibility by a service provider. All this while claiming to be a high end property.
One comes for a holiday to relax and enjoy and pays to be in a secure place so that one doesn’t have to worry about his/her stuff being stolen from the room while they are out.

After I checked out, 15 mins later I realised I left my fitness tracker on the side table. I called up the reception to check so that I can arrange for the pick up. What happened afterwards is anybody’s guess.

Again, the staff seemed friendly but the stay was disappointing for me.

user_reviews.Name: V L
user_reviews.Description:
If you’re looking for the lowest end of what called a 5-star hotel, La Vela Hotel is highly recommended.

The staff are indeed friendly—if by friendly you mean willing to talk back and demonstrate a charming lack of manners. Breakfast is another highlight: despite having a barista on site, the hotel proudly serves coffee from an automated machine, ensuring every cup tastes consistently… awful.

Accessing the rooftop is an adventure in itself. Guests are treated to a scenic detour: up to level 25, then a winding trek upstairs and around corners until you finally arrive. Once there, you’ll be greeted by a pool with cracking tiles that have been “under repair” for over a year. The lights are so blindingly bright that relaxation feels more like interrogation.

The bathroom is a marvel of design efficiency—tiny enough to suggest it was added as an afterthought. Meanwhile, the front lounge offers a unique aesthetic: a chaotic display of guest baggage scattered everywhere, creating an atmosphere of perpetual disorder.

Of course, there’s always room for improvement. A complete overhaul of hotel management might be a good place to start. Until then, La Vela remains a shining example of how not to run a so-called luxury hotel.

user_reviews.Name: Nick Drenth
user_reviews.Description:
Very luxurious hotel. The staff is friendly and professional. Had a great stay here and would stay here again. The rooftop pool is amazing and decent amount of seating at the pool and bar. 360 views from the rooftop are great!

The rooms are spacious and beds are comfortable. Not too much noise from outside as we were in the 23rd floor.

We tried the steak restaurant. That wasnt that great. Ordered stayed medium, but was baked through. And pretty high prices for Vietnam.

user_reviews.Name: Carmen Menzel
user_reviews.Description:
I stayed here 3 weeks ago	just before Christmas. The hotel was a visually stunning place that kept wowing from the moment we arrived. A foyer full of Christmas decorations , including a massive gingerbread house, stunning infinity edged pool and bar area. We sat and watched the sunset on a picturesque evening.

It's close to hidden dining gems in a clean part of the city, the resort also has a fabulous buffet on offer, the biggest I've seen which was visually exciting and tasty.

Friendly staff and outstanding service was the icing on the cake.

user_reviews.Name: Derek Jones
user_reviews.Description:
This hotel is a hotel on an “industrial” scale. The location is very good, 15 minutes from the airport and the same, more or less to Saigons main attractions.

There are three restaurants here, a casino, ballroom and a huge rooftop swimming deck.

The welcome is very warm from the friendly staff and check in was very quick and efficient. Some of the staff could do with a little training, I found some of them a little cold edging on rude!

The room we had was very good, on the 16th floor, with a tiny terrace to watch the chaotic ballet of Saigon traffic!  Loved it!!

All very clean and very tidy. With a comfortable bed, good sized shower and bathroom with a bath. Plenty of cupboard space. Excellent.

So why is this hotel “industrial”. It’s busy all the time. The price point must be spot on because the reception is always, but always busy, a constant flow of people coming and going, however there were always piles of bags in corners for late or early check ins/outs. Chaos…!

Breakfast is also  a chaotic affair, which is served in the seafood restaurant. The breakfast is well presented and varied but has the worst hash browns ever!!  Like the rest of the hotel it’s just too busy, maybe the time period needs to be extended. Can’t really call it a relaxing start to the day.

The same goes for the pool deck. After breakfast until late afternoon it’s busy busy busy!!! The waiting staff can be a bit urgent demanding payment for food and drink.

Because the hotel is so ‘full on’ everywhere, you can spend a long time waiting and riding in the lifts.

Stop moaning!!!!  In all this is not to bad a hotel, great location, great price, some lovely staff, oh and I forgot to mention the reasonable gym. Lovely comfortable rooms with a complementary 25 bucks for the casino.

Just be ready for a chaotic breakfast, a packed swimming deck and doing a slalom through the reception after spending a bit of time experiencing the lifts.

In your room it can be relaxing, step outside and it’s something else. If you are looking for a calm and relaxing stay after a chaotic day in town, then maybe this place is not for you.

However it does provide a good place for a night or two while visiting Saigon.

user_reviews.Name: Anna
user_reviews.Description: The hotel rooms are great - very clean and comfortable and well set up. The staff are very friendly and helpful and really wanted to support guests. Lovely buffet breakfast if you go earlier in the 4 hour window. Beautiful pool to swim in with great views of the city. Convenient location for airport. However, this cost a lot and the organisation of the hotel was not great for such a high cost. My aim in booking was to relax by the pool at the end of a busy holiday. There were maybe 15-20 seats / loungers total (despite there being more deck space to fit more seating in) for a hotel with hundreds of rooms and guests staying. While beautiful, don’t expect to be able to use the pool as a guarantee during your stay.

user_reviews.Name: zoltan MOLNAR
user_reviews.Description:
Good hotel with comfortable rooms and great service

The hotel is in a good location, with the airport only 20–30 minutes away, which makes arrival and departure very convenient.
The rooms are spacious, and the beds are extremely comfortable. Premium rooms offer a great view, definitely worth choosing if available.
The rooftop pool and bar have a nice atmosphere and are great for relaxing, although the bar selection is rather limited and the food is more average than outstanding.
Breakfast offers a wide variety, but the selection is somewhat limited for European tastes. On the other hand, the Asian and Indian options are very rich and well prepared.
The staff is exceptionally kind, friendly, and helpful, which really enhances the overall experience.
Overall, a solid choice with comfortable rooms and excellent service.

title: The Reverie Saigon Hotel
address: 22 - 36 Đường Nguyễn Huệ Bến Nghé, Sài Gòn, Hồ Chí Minh 71006, Vietnam
plus_code: QPF3+FV Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Polished rooms in an upscale hotel with 5 drinking & dining options, plus an outdoor pool & a spa.

user_reviews.Name: Allen R and Robert B
user_reviews.Description:
This hotel is, without question, one of the truly great hotels of the world. From the moment we arrived, we were struck by how stunningly beautiful the property is — every detail thoughtfully designed, every space elegant yet welcoming.

The service was exceptional: professional, polished, and genuinely kind. The staff anticipated needs before we even had to ask, yet everything felt effortless and never intrusive. The executive lounge was excellent too.

The atmosphere was wonderfully quiet and serene, creating a sense of complete escape. The food was outstanding — beautifully prepared, delicious, and worthy of the setting.

A highlight of our stay was the private Rolls Royce tour, which was simply excellent and added an unforgettable touch to an already extraordinary experience.

This is truly one of the best hotels I have ever visited anywhere in the world.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: Convenient and Comfortable StayOverall, a great experience. I didn’t get to use the pool, but I enjoyed a 40-minute gym session before breakfast. The breakfast buffet was excellent. My room was spacious, the bed was very comfortable, and I could set the temperature to 20°C for a restful sleep. The hotel is located in the heart of the city, with plenty of restaurants nearby—very convenient!

user_reviews.Name: Philippa Pham Hughes
user_reviews.Description: I loved many things about this hotel but one of my favorites was that the light switches were labeled! It’s so annoying at most hotels when you have to try every switch to figure out how to turn the lights on and off. The service was exquisite. The location is great. The gym is well equipped. The room was beautiful and very comfortable. One small complaint: the faucet in the sink sprays water on you. :(

user_reviews.Name: m kit
user_reviews.Description:
Wow, what can I saw This place is amazing.  From the outside the tall building that lights up at night.  Then you walk inside and the interior.is over the top.  Truly a "Wow" experience... Everywhere you walk is amazing even the elevators... Luxurious   rooms, large bathrooms, clean and comfortable.
The Breakfast buffet has so many items to chose from, you could eat all three in one sitting....
Great staff making you feel welcomed and did everything to make your stay enjoyable.
Most definitely will come back on our next trip.

user_reviews.Name: Leanne Dobrota
user_reviews.Description:
We stayed at the Reverie for 3 days as part of a retirement/65th birthday for my husband.
I have very mixed emotions about the hotel.
After we spent a few hours in the room we asked to be moved to another room as there was a very strong musty order, the room was very damp, even under the bed covers. We also got a headache and sore throats immediately.
The front desk was very helpful to find us another room. The first room we looked at still had a musty smell but finally we found one that was suitable. We stayed here for 3 days and although the room didn’t have an odour we still were contested and had sore throats for the remainder of our stay while spending time in the room.  Oddly enough when we left the room for the day our symptoms cleared up.
Onto the positives. The bed, and linens were the nicest I’ve ever slept in, so luxurious! The toiletries were very high quality.
The breakfast was part buffet and part a la Carte and everything was excellent. The staff were all very friendly, only complaint was trying to be upsold upon checkin to a more expensive room and not being offered a welcome drink. We’ve stayed at 3 star hotels in SE Asia that offer welcome drinks!
All in all our stay was ok at the Reverie but because of the hassle with the room I’m doubtful if we will return.

user_reviews.Name: Cory Branton-Speak
user_reviews.Description: The view from the 35th floor is sublime - the corner suite is epic. The quality of the room, chandeliers, full panoramic windows. It is the most beautiful hotel room I've stayed in and most stunning view I've had. The desire for the staff to get it right was fantastic. The marble bathroom. All exquisite.

user_reviews.Name: Linh Ly
user_reviews.Description: My experience at this hotel was exceptional. I stayed for two nights before flying back to Europe, and everything exceeded my expectations. The staff were warm, welcoming, and consistently attentive, providing excellent care throughout my stay. The breakfast offered a wide variety of fresh options, and the room was always clean and well maintained. The furnishings were modern and well equipped with up-to-date technology. If Google reviews allowed more stars, I would gladly give them. I will definitely be back to this hotel for Saigon staying.

user_reviews.Name: Miguel Guzman
user_reviews.Description:
We stayed for one night and had mixed feelings about the experience.

The hotel itself is beautiful and the rooms are elegant and spacious. However, the service did not fully feel at a 5-star level for us.

When we arrived early in the morning after a long journey, we understood that early check-in was subject to availability and that early access to the room was only possible by paying an additional 50% of the nightly rate. That was not the main issue for us. What disappointed us was the arrival experience. There was no welcome moment, no drink offered, and the conversation felt quite cold and transactional. We were told we could use breakfast, but only if we paid for it. At that moment, we did not feel welcomed as guests and the disappointment started there.

Shortly after entering our first room, we unfortunately found a cockroach on the table, which was quite unpleasant. The hotel relocated us to another room quickly, which we appreciated. Later, we received a fruit platter, wine, and an apology letter from the Front Office Manager.

While we appreciated the gesture, we were expecting a more personal response, such as a direct apology in person or a stronger service recovery, especially for a luxury hotel. The experience felt more procedural than personal.

Overall, the hotel is visually impressive, but the service experience felt closer to a 4-star level rather than a true 5-star hospitality experience.

title: Mia Saigon - Luxury Boutique Hotel
address: 02-04 Đường số 10, An Khánh, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: RQ62+29 An Khanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Refined quarters in a plush property offering dining & river views, plus a spa & an outdoor pool.

user_reviews.Name: H. Do
user_reviews.Description:
We’ve had the chance to visit Mia Saigon 3-4 times now, and while it remains a beautiful property, we noticed that the service has become a bit less attentive over time. If you like architecture and a boutique feel, this is definitely a place for you to take in a building with a lot of character and style right by the river.

The rooms are still lovely and well-designed, but the location is quite far from the usual touristic sites and the main city center. Traffic in Saigon can be very full, so definitely plan ahead and leave early if you have a reservation or appointments in town.

Staff was okay, but in comparison to our earlier stays, it felt like the 5 Star attention to detail has slipped a bit. We still love the atmosphere and the quiet escape from the city, but hope that the team finds back to their initial high service standards. All in all: a great place for a staycation if you don't mind the distance, but there is room for improvement to get back to that 10/10 feeling.

user_reviews.Name: Fati Se
user_reviews.Description: 5 stars is not enough to rate this hotel. Best experience ever. I was there for business but i felt i was on holiday. The rooms were exceptionally clean and amazing views. The food was amazing. Only that there is a lot of pork, in case you are muslim, or cegan/vegetarian, then you will be kind of hungry. Great rooftop. The location is super nice walking distance to the metro/train.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: Mia Saigon feels like a film‑worthy hideaway, as if it’s outside the city. The room was clean, spacious, and very cozy, with a balcony facing the river. Breakfast was amazing, and the pool is lovely for relaxing. The only downside was the slow Wi‑Fi.

user_reviews.Name: Thao
user_reviews.Description:
An exceptional stay at Mia Saigon!

From the warm, attentive service to the beautifully designed, spacious room, everything felt thoughtfully done.
I loved the luxurious bathroom with its large shower and bathtub, as well as the private balcony overlooking the river with a glimpse of the city center in the distance.  The hotel’s Indochine-inspired architecture adds a unique charm throughout the property.

Breakfast buffet by the river was a highlight, with an excellent selection of Western and Vietnamese dishes.  The location of the hotel, away from the busy city center, made it feel like a peaceful retreat while still being convenient.

Highly recommended for a refined and relaxing stay.

user_reviews.Name: William Tsai
user_reviews.Description:
The hotel is a peaceful oasis with top-notch maintenance and world-class service. ✨
A huge thanks to the team for organizing my son’s birthday celebration! 🎂 The room decorations and the cake in the fridge were such thoughtful touches.
Highlights of our stay:
🏊‍♂️ The saltwater pool is incredibly refreshing and unique.
🚤 The 3 PM speedboat service to the city pier is a must-try—convenient and scenic.
Highly recommend this boutique luxury hotel to anyone visiting HCMC!

user_reviews.Name: Norbert Ehlert
user_reviews.Description:
A Truly excellent Stay at Mia Saigon - Luxury Boutique Hotel

As someone who is a long-time fan of the Mandarin Oriental brand, I rarely come across a hotel that evokes that same sense of quiet luxury, thoughtful design, and genuine hospitality. Mia Saigon comes remarkably close—in fact, if Saigon had a small Mandarin Oriental sister branch, this could be it.

The hotel is beautifully appointed, with nothing missing and nothing excessive. Every detail has been considered. The rooms are spacious, elegantly designed, and the large balcony overlooking the river is a standout feature—peaceful, private, and perfect at any time of day.

The staff truly elevates the experience. They are warm, attentive, and consistently helpful, always with a natural smile, never over-the-top. It feels sincere, and it makes a real difference.

Breakfast is another highlight: excellent quality, well presented, and made even better by the calm riverside view.

The location adds to the charm—set along the river, slightly away from the bustle, yet well connected. The boat taxi to downtown is not only convenient, but also a lovely way to experience the city.

All in all, Mia Saigon exceeded our expectations. It is a refined, welcoming hotel that delivers true hospitality elegantly. A wonderful stay from start to finish.

user_reviews.Name: Marketing HAGA Smartech
user_reviews.Description: I went to Mia Thao Dien to enjoy sunset time with a friend, and wow — such an amazing place. The sunset view is beautiful and very relaxing. We enjoyed cocktails and food, and everything was delicious and well presented. The atmosphere is cozy yet stylish, perfect for hanging out with friends and unwinding after a long day. I really love the location and the vibe of this place. Definitely a spot I’d love to come back to.

user_reviews.Name: El-Share Ahmad
user_reviews.Description:
Our FAVOURITE Hotel so far !!

We were blown away by how amazing this hidden gem is.
Everything we experienced was so fantastic that I don't even know where to begin from.

For reference, we loved it more than any Four Seasons, Ritz Carlton and similar brands we stayed in. Even better than Claridge's and Connaught of London (which cost 4-5x more).
That's how insanely good this property is.

We booked a Grand River Suite (highest category below the Presidential which was unavailable during our dates) and paid around £220 a night, however these rates change over time, of course. I've seen the same suite going for double the price.

At around 90sqm it was very spacious and extremely focused on small, beautiful details. The patterns, textures, colours and lighting were very purposefully chosen to create a beautiful ambiance.

NOTHING squeaked or made unpleasant noises when in use (for example using the door or a drawer). Everything was well oiled, and the furniture and fittings had a pleasant weight to them, showing the fantastic build quality. I am mentioning these things because you cannot tell it by looking at the photos.

It had the CLEANEST balcony we've ever seen. Also, the rest of the suite was of course spotless.

It's not just beautiful, but it's also extremely practical with the 2 bathrooms, 2 separate wardrobes, beautiful balcony with ceiling fan, plenty of seating and so on. Plus the couches and bed are really plush and soft.

Unexpectedly, the FOOD was the HIGHLIGHT of our stay. This really took us by surprise. Absolutely everything we tried from their F&B outlets was made by beautiful angels, and blessed with divine textures and flavours.

We had plans to visit a few restaurants in the city but we completely abandoned these plans in favour of the hotel's restaurants.

The only food which was a bit hit or miss was in the breakfast but I will give them a pass thanks to their massive selection of items to choose from. They even have LAURENT PERRIER CHAMPAGNE for breakfast. As much as you'd like. That's mind boggling. Please don't be a villager and abuse this perk.

We also used their private boat shuttle which in only 20 mins takes you to the most important and central part of the city. And that's completely FREE multiple times a day. Insane.

Also, their afternoon tea was THE BEST we ever had! And we tried a few dozens of them around the overpriced hotels and restaurants of UK.

You know what's the most shocking part of this hotel?
It's only 51 rooms !!!
And it's huge + fully staffed + it has massive outlets and facilities.

I don't even care about the other hotels in Ho Chi Minh. You cannot beat this. Amazing.

title: COMMON INN Thao Dien Hotel
address: 19 Đ. Số 38, Thảo Điền, An Khánh, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: RP3M+53 An Khanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Relaxed, modern hotel featuring free breakfast, plus a self-service bar & a rooftop terrace.

user_reviews.Name: Ryan Albert Grepo
user_reviews.Description:
I love this hotel so much because of it’s location. It’s very accessible because there’s a nearby train station, a convenience store is also a stone’s throw away. There are a lot of good coffee shops and restaurants in the area for both local and international cuisine.

The size of the room is adequate, drinking water stations are provided per floor and the housekeeping team does a good job in keeping your room nice and clean (I stayed a total of 6 days and never had a problem).

The receptionists are always warm and event the other hotel guests are friendly. Would totally recommend this accommodation to my friends. :)

user_reviews.Name: pauljamest2024
user_reviews.Description: A new gem found. I often travel to Thao dien but it wasn’t until a friend told me about common inn, so I tried it. Love it. There is nothing not to like about the place. Thao dien is BOOMING, it’ll soon be on the ‘places to go’ list. Food, bars, beautiful sight. Plus a great fish & chips place which is hard to find outside of home.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: Common Inn is a great place to station yourself to enjoy Thao Dien and Thu Duc on foot. It's also convenient to connect to downtown for food, drinks, and entertainment. The fifth floor has a great rooftop area with coffee, laundry, lounge, and coworking spaces. There is also 24 hour front desk service and the rooms have lots of well-placed outlets to stay charged up.

user_reviews.Name: Екатерина Мозжухина
user_reviews.Description:
Loved the stay here!
We had a nice cozy room with timely roomservice.
The rooftop with shared kitchen and laundry room is definitely worth mentioning since we had nice evenings there.
The district all in all is more European-like with lots of go-to places. But the hotel itself is located on a little street with no noise.

user_reviews.Name: Derek Saw
user_reviews.Description: Room is okay. They have laundry (need to Queue), rooftop room where you can play guitar. Water has to refill outside of the room by yourself. Please note that they don’t have bidet spray which is supposed to attach to the toilet. For me as an Asian was not comfortable with that. The rest are fine.

user_reviews.Name: Anthony Cameron
user_reviews.Description: Every time I come to Thao Dien I stay at the Common Inn. Staff are friendly and helpful. Everything runs smoothly and is clean and well maintained. It is close to the Metro Train and lots of great restaurants, coffee shops and bars. Also close to supermarkets. I am already booked in for my next stay.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: We stayed in a two-bedroom unit for two nights. The location is very convenient, with nice coffee shops and restaurants within walking distance. There’s also a common area where you can eat and do laundry, which made the stay very comfortable.

user_reviews.Name: E7275QTjohnd
user_reviews.Description: Very nice well located hotel with very affordable price. I had single bedroom which is not large but everything I required. Bed very comfortable, good air conditioning and was very clean. Premises overall are clean and well presented with friendly and helpful staff. Great location very easy walking distance to many restaurants and cafe and is in a nice neighbourhood.

title: 22Land Hotel Saigon
address: 25 Lê Thánh Tôn, Sài Gòn, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QPH3+PG Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Nina Tran
user_reviews.Description:
I had an amazing stay at this hotel in District 1, Ho Chi Minh City. The location is absolutely perfect—right in the heart of the city, within walking distance to major attractions, restaurants, cafés, and shopping areas. Despite being so central, the hotel was quiet and very comfortable.

The room was clean, modern, and well maintained, with a very comfortable bed and great amenities. The staff were exceptionally friendly and professional, always happy to help and making sure everything was perfect throughout my stay.

Breakfast was delicious with a good variety of options, and the overall atmosphere of the hotel felt welcoming and relaxing. I truly felt well taken care of from check-in to check-out.

Highly recommended for anyone visiting Ho Chi Minh City. I would definitely stay here again!

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: Booking with mixed reviews made us nervous, but we really enjoyed our stay at 22Land Hotel Saigon. Every staff we interacted with was warm, friendly and hospitable. Upon checking in, we were greeted with smiles, and a room upgrade. Spacious and clean room with full windows albeit could do with more pillows. Room was cleaned and refreshed with amenities and clean towels daily. Love the breakfast spread. I would say it is meat focused. If you are a vegan like me, some days I only had hash browns to eat if they served them. There are sliced bread, baguette, and fruits. Location is about 15 minute walk to Chợ Bến Thành Market, which I prefer - away from the bustle of the main attraction. There is Vincom Center (mall) nearby for light shopping, and where we get our groceries from - Vinmart. A few highly rated massage places here and there. In conclusion, would recommend, would book again. I truly hope they serve up plant based breakfast foods in the future!

user_reviews.Name: petersD3427YQ
user_reviews.Description: We were looking for a location to celebrate the last night of a 20 day Vietnam tour, with a group of 11. |The staff were friendly and willing to assist escorting us up to the sky-bar to assess suitability. Looked perfect. And booking made to return at 7pm.|Upon return for drinks and dinner, staff friendly and attentive.|Location was great and we had the run of the place as the only people in the skybar on a Friday night.|Drinks and Cocktail prices were a little high but comparable to in house facilities of equivalent standard Hotels.|When it came to meals, the food was great, though the meals took forever to be brought out, to the point most had finished their meals whilst other were still awaiting their arrival.|The view and intimate location was perfect for what we wanted.

user_reviews.Name: Vina Tran
user_reviews.Description: Cute hotel, location was easy to find byt licated on a one way street. Room were clean and have a see through shower concept (you can close the blind). Hotel provide breakfast in the morning. Staff were sweet, friendly and quick and also at the same time, very detailed oriented. We left an eye mask in our room and they caught us in time during check out!

user_reviews.Name: Xander Le
user_reviews.Description:
Even with the Tet interruptions, the service was fantastic.
Skybar is a vibe (for the night I got to experience it)

Clean rooms and beds daily.
Daily breakfast is solid. Just enough to get you on your days trek.

Lots of good restaurants nearby, and Japanese Food in Little Japan actually hits.
A GRAB scooter is like $2USD max wherever you need to go in the area anyway.

Shower designs were cool and viewed more as another piece of art in the room.

user_reviews.Name: Christoph Wallbaum
user_reviews.Description: We had to switch hotels because of a bit of a scam, but we found this lovely, flexible hotel in a great location. There are lots of attractions, food choices and shops close by. The staff were incredibly friendly and went out of their way to help us. I would definitely recommend staying there.

user_reviews.Name: Ashleigh
user_reviews.Description: Had a wonderful trip to Saigon staying at 22Land, the staff are wonderful and the hotel itself is very modern and clean, offering a good quality breakfast (including a chef making personalised omelettes), sky bar is a great addition but the best feature in my opinion was the spa! The team are so lovely, and after a long flight a good quality Thai massage will have your back feeling fresh and new, would reccomend to anyone staying in Ho Chi Minh City but it is especially good for couples and professionals.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: This hotel located at the D1 Japanese Street that is quite convenient. I feel i am quite safe while staying in this hotel as guest visiting policy is implemented. The lobby staff will ask the entourage at night whether the people regiistered in check-in counter.

title: La Opera Saigon Hotel
address: Ngô Văn Năm/01 Ward, street, Sài Gòn, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QPJ4+9F Sai Gon, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Thammanoon Rattanatham
user_reviews.Description:
I had a lovely stay at La Opera Saigon Hotel. The hotel is quiet, comfortable, and conveniently located near cafés and a convenience store.

The room was clean, beautiful, and had a nice bathtub. One small note is that the bathroom glass has no curtain, which may be slightly inconvenient if staying with a friend, but it’s not an issue for couples.

The hotel offers great value for money. All staff were kind and welcoming, especially Gon, who provided excellent service and proactively helped us without being asked. His hospitality truly made our stay even better.

Highly recommended, and thank you to the wonderful team.

Focus
From Thailand 🇹🇭

user_reviews.Name: Gio
user_reviews.Description:
This is a wonderful spot for staying in the area. We highly recommend this for it's convenient location and also for it's professionalism!

Free breakfast is also pretty good (I have a bias for chicken wings, so any place that serves good wings is always a huge plus for me)

The location is little hidden, but not hard to find!

The staff are all very kind as well and are very friendly too!

user_reviews.Name: elijahafrica
user_reviews.Description: The service provided by the hotel staff was impeccable. Every staff member we encountered exuded warmth, attention to detail, and a genuine desire to ensure our comfort and satisfaction. From the friendly greetings at check-in to the prompt and efficient assistance throughout our stay, their commitment to exceptional hospitality was truly commendable.- Premium 5 Star Experience! ||My  room was a haven of modern lux, meticulously designed to create a warm, serene and inviting ambiance. The tastefully appointed furnishings, plush bedding, and homey vibe  added to our overall sense of relaxation and serenity.||Beyond the extraordinary services the hotel offered, it was the exceptional attention to even the smallest details that truly set this establishment apart. Whether it was the personal touches in our room, the genuine care of the staff, or the thoughtful gestures throughout my stay, I felt truly valued as guests- my home away from home. ||In conclusion, our time at this remarkable hotel was an experience of pure bliss. From the warm and gracious staff to the fabulous accommodations and a stone throw away to what  Ho Chi Minh is all about.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: The room was clean, well-designed, and had everything I needed — comfortable bed, strong Wi-Fi, and a great location close to cafes and attractions. Staff were polite and check-in was smooth.Only downside: the soundproofing could be much better. I could hear hallway noise and conversations from nearby rooms at night, which was a bit distracting.Still, if you’re a light sleeper, bring earplugs — otherwise, it’s a solid choice for a short stay in the city.

user_reviews.Name: Natalija Kert
user_reviews.Description: Really cute hotel in a great location! The rooms were clean and the staff was super friendly. Since it’s a smaller hotel, the breakfast selection is a bit limited, but you can still find enough to have a decent meal. Overall, a lovely stay.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: Exceptional Stay at La Opera Saigon HotelFrom the moment I arrived, La Opera Saigon Hotel exceeded all expectations. The staff were incredibly warm, attentive, and professional, making me feel genuinely welcomed. The room was beautifully designed—elegant, comfortable, and spotlessly clean, with thoughtful touches that added a sense of luxury.The location is perfect, nestled in the heart of Saigon with easy access to key attractions, cafes, and cultural spots. I especially appreciated the quiet ambiance despite being so central. The breakfast buffet was a highlight—diverse, fresh, and delicious, with both local and international options.What truly stood out was the personalized service. Every interaction felt sincere, and the team went above and beyond to ensure my stay was memorable. I would absolutely recommend La Opera Saigon Hotel to anyone looking for a refined and relaxing experience in Ho Chi Minh City.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: Bad smell and wet feeling from the air conditioner, water not hot enough and I am ichy when sleeping . Lucky sleep one night and then gone. Service is good but sorry the bad smell and wet feeling cannot be rid off.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: Thanks to Hotel, upgraded our room, Hotel is on perfect location easy to walk to many places around Ho Chi Minh city downtown area. No complaints

title: The Concept Hotel HCMC- District 1
address: 13-15 Nguyễn Thái Học, Cầu Ông Lãnh, Hồ Chí Minh 712162, Vietnam
plus_code: QM7W+MX Cau Ong Lanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

complete_address.state: Cau Ong Lanh, Ho Chi Minh

user_reviews.Name: Alexandria Gail Gonzales
user_reviews.Description:
We had such a wonderful stay, and we would like to extend a very special thank you to Duy and Minh for making my husband’s birthday truly memorable. Their kindness and effort meant so much to us. They went above and beyond to make the celebration special, and we really appreciated their thoughtful gestures.
Throughout our stay, they were incredibly accommodating and attentive. Their warm hospitality made us feel so comfortable — it honestly felt like being at home. It’s rare to experience service that is both so genuine and thoughtful.
Thank you again, Duy and Minh, for your kindness and for making our stay extra special. We will definitely book again when we return to Ho Chi Minh. Highly recommended!

user_reviews.Name: Dana Mamaril
user_reviews.Description:
We had a wonderful stay at Concept Hotel in District 1, Ho Chi Minh City. All the staff, from the security guard to the front office team, were incredibly friendly and helpful throughout our stay.
