An additional big storage locker in the room for your luggage ( I was able to fit a 50L bag, full backpack, shoe bag, tote bag with a decent amount of room left) the. Breakfast in the morning is nice as they have multiple options to choose from and a drink menu as well. Breakfast is included in the price. Additionally they give you a free beer as well (for those who like beer) the location is great. A lot of people assuming that since it was on Bui Vien street it would be loud and chaotic but it was actually just far enough that you couldn’t hear anything even late at night. Overall great experience here. During my time in HCM I moved hostels twice and landed at Chill Hostel and ended up extending another night before leaving the city.

title: Surf Hostel
address: Hoang Hoa Tram, 160 22\20, Phường 9, Vũng Tàu, Hồ Chí Minh 78000, Vietnam
plus_code: 83MP+CG Vung Tau, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Keshav Chandna
user_reviews.Description:
Finding Surf Hostel in Vung Tau was a happy accident that turned the city into one of my favorite destinations. The hospitality here truly transcends the typical hostel experience; the entire team makes you feel like you've joined a close-knit group of friends co-living.
The accommodations are spotless—the non-AC rooms are clean and sufficient, but the AC rooms are absolutely worth the small upgrade. The washrooms are consistently pristine and well-maintained. Aesthetically, the common areas are beautiful, particularly the 1st-floor working kitchen, which became my favorite spot for seamless work and coffee breaks.
Even as a non-surfer, I quickly found myself engrossed in the surfing culture, making fantastic friends and getting inspired to return just to learn. The magic truly happens in the evenings: late-night, friendly conversations on the rooftop bar, sharing stories and laughs with travelers from around the globe.
As a bonus, the kitchen offers surprisingly authentic and excellent Western cuisine, thanks to a true culinary master on staff. This week-long stay was defined by the incredible friendliness of everyone, solidifying Surf Hostel’s big role in making Vung Tau an unforgettable favorite.

user_reviews.Name: Mật Mật
user_reviews.Description:
A lovely hostel.
I stayed in the dorm on the ground. Basic room, clean bathroom, well-equipped kitchen, cozy shared area. The owner is so nice and friendly. I love the vibes here.
The beach is only 5 min walk away.
The only minus point is that the bed was not really comfy, some didnt have curtains

user_reviews.Name: Mishaslayer (Mishaslayer)
user_reviews.Description: I stayed at that place for 2w. My experience was so good, there is very friendly staff and great atmosphere. Ty

user_reviews.Name: Hoàn Huỳnh
user_reviews.Description:
Everything here is wonderful!!!
After randomly finding this hostel on Google Maps, I came to the front door but was still a bit hesitant, standing at a distance. Then an old lady walked by and asked: “Have you found a place to stay yet? Stay here.”
After asking, I realized she was just a neighbor living nearby. How interesting!!!

user_reviews.Name: Natalia SunShine
user_reviews.Description:
One of the best hostels I've ever stayed in. Such a chilly atmosphere. You feel so easy and relaxed. The interior is amazing. So much beauty in every corner. I always pay attention to the details. I feel that the owner is doing his best to make the hostel even better. There will be a bar on the rooftop in a few days. And the view from the rooftop is breathtaking. Slso you can try yourself in surfing or take up skateboarding classes.
I'll be back for sure.

user_reviews.Name: Simon Myrvold
user_reviews.Description:
We have travelled all over Vietnam, and this is handsdown the best hostel we have visited while traveling! The room for two people were beautiful, comfortable and very big!! The interior design was also really cool, looking like a surfers palass.
The staff was so helpeful and kind! I love this hostel and recommend everyone to visit it while starting in Vung Tau. The surf class experience was also a blast and so fun, I recommend participating in this as well!!
It was also very affordable.

A must stay hostel, dont miss out on this one😁

user_reviews.Name: thomas gastinel
user_reviews.Description:
Very nice place ! People are so friendly, all is clean, it’s a perfect place to meet people, chilling, learn surf…
I will come back for sure !

user_reviews.Name: Angela P.
user_reviews.Description:
Vung Tau Surf Hostel is an exceptional place for both beginner and advanced surfers. While it’s perfect for novices with its top-notch surfing lessons and peaceful environment, it also caters brilliantly to more experienced surfers, especially in winter when the swells can get quite impressive.

The hostel’s location is a major plus, nestled amidst vibrant nightlife and delectable eateries, yet maintaining a tranquil atmosphere for relaxation. Its cleanliness and quietude are commendable.

The hosts are the heart of this place – extremely accommodating, friendly, and knowledgeable about Vung Tau and Vietnam. Their tips and guidance are invaluable. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay and would definitely return for another surf trip, eager to tackle those winter swells. This hostel seamlessly combines great surfing opportunities for all levels, convenience, serenity, and warm hospitality.

title: The Common Room Project
address: 250 Bùi Viện, Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Bến Thành, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QM8R+87 Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

complete_address.borough: Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Ben Thanh

user_reviews.Name: Malthe Holm
user_reviews.Description:
This place is a haven in the bustle and hustle of HCMC, it is located right in the heart of the action, but is quiet, clean and relaxing.
The staff are superbly nice, very helpful with everything from tailoring to booking bus tickets, to giving food recommendations.
The rooms are lovely, and never had issues with lack of privacy or noise, even in the 14 bed dorm. The beds are comfortable, the showers and facilities are great and everything is kept super clean.
Family dinners are great, good tasting and the hostel is even very social. It has a kitchen and fridge for guests to use, which is so nice to have access to, and not at all the standard travelling in this part of the world. Would recommend to anyone staying in HCMC

user_reviews.Name: Kate Lagoe
user_reviews.Description:
Perfect hostel - an oasis of calm in a fab location. Beds are comfy and private, bathrooms very clean and modern and most importantly staff are so so kind, friendly and helpful. The nightly family dinners are a great way to meet people - I found the hostel v social without being party central. Would definitely highly recommend!
I didn’t notice much noise from the street, but if you have a decent pair of earplugs you won’t hear anything at all ☺️

user_reviews.Name: Giulia Fortuna
user_reviews.Description: Probably the best hostel experience I’ve had so far. Perfectly social without being a party place, the family dinners were a great chance to connect and the common area is very welcoming. The dorms are comfy and clean, and the team is always on it to help with anything you may need. I got excellent recommandations for food spots, architecture tours, private co-working spaces and what to check out for my trip to the Mekong delta. Thank you everyone for making my stay in Saigon extra special ✨

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: The staff there were so welcoming! Went there during non peak season but still able to make pretty good social interactions. If you want to have a chill social hostel this is it😌. Location is strategic(next to bar street) and surrounded by many food options. Beds are nice and clean toilets are super clean too 😗😌 Will definitely come back here again next time if I’m back to hcmc 💕

user_reviews.Name: Belinda Thorne
user_reviews.Description:
Really amazing hostel. It was the first hostel I stayed at when I started my solo traveling. The bedrooms are clean, the sheets and beds are super comfortable and family dinner is a must to do while you are there. I got some washing done at the hostel it was very cheap and was done so quickly. The staff are so incredibly helpful ♥️

The only thing to mention is if you are a light sleeper bring some ear plugs especially if you stay in the female dorm as you can hear the street music until about 2 am.

user_reviews.Name: Henry Dike
user_reviews.Description:
I stayed at this hotel/hostel in Ho Chi Minh and I can honestly say it was an amazing experience. The place is beautiful, well designed, and above all spotlessly clean. The rooms, bathrooms, and common areas are always perfectly maintained.

The staff is fantastic: friendly, helpful, always smiling, and ready to assist with anything you need, from city tips to travel arrangements. They really make you feel at home.

It’s not just a hotel, but also a very social hostel, perfect for both solo travelers and those who enjoy meeting new people. The atmosphere is relaxed and welcoming, ideal for connecting with others while still enjoying comfort and privacy.

The beds are comfortable, the spaces are well organized, and the environment is quiet despite the central location. It’s truly the perfect mix of comfort, cleanliness, and social vibes.

I highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Ho Chi Minh. One of the best accommodations I’ve ever stayed in  I would definitely come back!

user_reviews.Name: R S
user_reviews.Description:
I had a really great stay at The Common Room Project and would absolutely come back.

The service was genuinely friendly and very easy to communicate with via WhatsApp, which made everything feel smooth and personal. One thing I really liked is that they organize shared dinners every evening for everyone staying there — perfect if you’re traveling solo and want to meet people.
I stayed in one of the private rooms, which I highly recommend. It’s honestly the best of both worlds: you get the social hostel experience without having to share a room or bathroom. I really appreciate that they offer this option.

The hostel is located right on Bui Vien Walking Street, which is a full-on party area with bars and nightclubs everywhere. Despite this, there was no noise at all coming in from the street. The only minor downside is that the private rooms are a bit sound-sensitive from inside the hostel, but people were very respectful, so it never became a real issue.

When I checked out, I accidentally forgot some belongings. They handled it incredibly well and even sent my things to my next hotel without any hassle. They also quickly arranged transport for me, including a motorbike transfer, which was a great and very smooth experience.

Summary:
I’d definitely recommend staying here for a few nights if you’re traveling solo, want your own private room, and still want easy access to social activities and a friendly, social atmosphere.

user_reviews.Name: jien
user_reviews.Description: Very accommodating staff! Had to make some last minute changes to my booking and they were kind enough to accommodate and help me figure things out. The rooms and facilities are clean and modern. Despite being in Bui Vien, the atmosphere is very laid back—just how I like it as an introvert. Props to them for whipping up great meals for the nightly community dinners as well! Bit pricey imho but I didn’t mind much because it came with good conversations

title: Vy Da Central Market Hostel
address: 47 Phan Chu Trinh, Bến Thành, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: QMFW+2R Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: CELESTE COMMUNITY
user_reviews.Description:
I tried the hostel and the restaurant.

it's well placed in front of Ben Thanh market. still quiet inside. well at least on my side.
the team is very helpful and competent.
hostel is cheap, but offers a morning breakfast.
restaurant food is good too.
an easy choice any day ✨

user_reviews.Name: Wanderer Soul
user_reviews.Description: It’s actually a good place to stay, cleaner beds, nice dorms and you get hot showers in your washrooms. Breakfast options are decent. The one good thing about this hostel is its location. It’s   just in front of the Ben Thanh Market, so yeah you can do shopping with very ease. The only drawback is that they don’t have space to socialise, so you cannot connect with the fellow travellers.

user_reviews.Name: Julian Aguilar
user_reviews.Description:
I stayed in a 8 people shared dorm (101)

- EXCELLENT A/C
- Room and bathroom clean
- Breakfast included 7:30am - 10am
- Restaurant in ground floor
- Very comfortable bed

Room:
- EXCELLENT A/C (24h) + 1 fan
- 4 bunk bed (solid structure, no noise or movements)
- Great matress, great pillow, excellent blanket
- Window lets natural light come inside room
- Blackout curtain available in bed
- Enough space in room
- Night light available
- 3 small hooks in bed

Bathroom:
- Inside and outside room
- Hand soap available. NO body wash or shampoo
- NO hot water, only warm/cold (not freezing cold)
- Good towel (big size), gets you dry.
- Ground floor: 2 toilets and 1 sink separate.
- 1st floor: Room 101 (inside x1), Room 102 (outside x3)
- 2nd floor: Room 202 (inside x1)
- 3rd floor: Room 301 (inside x1), Room 302 (outside x2)

Inside room = separate toilet, shower and sink
Outside room = together toilet/shower/sink

Lockers:
- Outside of room 101
- Just enough for my 50L backpack, a little bit narrow
- Rooms facing the street have the locker below the bed

Location:
- Ben Thanh market (right in front/10 seconds)
- Nguyễn Huệ (750m/11min)
- Bui Viện walking street (900m/14min )
- Water bus (1.6km/22min)
*Time on foot

Overall:
- Great place and clean
- Excellent location
- Good sleep

Improve:
- Cover the A/C switch to prevent people from constantly turning it off.
- Add a towel rack in bed
- Add bodywash in shower
- Add hot water in shower

Date: 4/1/26

user_reviews.Name: Agent MPZ919
user_reviews.Description:
No hand soap, toilet paper, body wash, or shampoo in any of the bathrooms. The beds aren’t cleaned properly — I checked two on arrival, and both had visible dirt and a lot of hair when I opened the blanket. There are also no hooks in the showers to hang your belongings. Basic hygiene standards like providing hand soap should be obvious for any hostel, especially when hosting international guests, we are not all uneducated Asians whom don't understand basic hygiene, so why would they think this is acceptable. Overall, the place feels poorly managed and far below acceptable standards.

The receptionist was unprofessional; her attitude was completely unnecessary. If that had been a man speaking to me like that, I would have smacked him — she needs a lesson in femininity and customer service. On the other hand, the cleaning girl was very friendly, professional, and cute. Give her a pay rise for her customer service. 👍

user_reviews.Name: Zander Vinocur
user_reviews.Description: Room was comfortable and clean. Shower was hot with great pressure. AC worked well. The yogurt and fruit breakfast was really lacking.  Location is like being in the middle of Time Square in NYC.

user_reviews.Name: Anthony “Tagada” Delavaquerie
user_reviews.Description: I don't get it how people can put 4 star for this kind of hostel. It is cheap that's pretty much all. The hostel is on top of a restaurant, is it convenient ? No. You have smell of the kitchen most of the time coming up the room. Room that are full of humidity (it's a wet country I know but that also means if you have door that close (and it was the case) with some aircon (that will never be clean trust me) you can manage to get something at least not too smelly. I don't know how can people says the shower/toilet were actually clean as I never seen anyone cleaning them and it was clearly not clean (hair, pee on the toilets seat and they're next to the shower so always full of water). Staff were nice. Bed were actually super comfortable and you have quite a lot of space for your luggage even if it's located under the bottom bed (not really convenient when you need access to your stuff on a daily basis like me). I may be rude on my review but I'm sick of being fooled by people with really low expectations and giving 5 stars because they made friends along the way after staying two days where they barely used the actual hostel. So I would have give 3 stars but I really want to lower the rating of hostels that are not worth 5 stars. Also no social area, there's only the restaurant where's located the 'office' and two tables outside were half of it is under water when it's raining.

user_reviews.Name: Sankha Chakraborty
user_reviews.Description: All over great experience, on the heart of the Saigon city. Every penny is value for money. Hope they will help me to find my DJI mic which I lost just over the step of the hostel. See you soon.

user_reviews.Name: R RR
user_reviews.Description: I stayed here for just one night because I missed my flight (an airport worker gave me the wrong directions, so I waited two hours in the wrong queue and ended up missing it). I wandered around the city and got too tired to look for other hotels since I was covered in sweat and dirt, and this place was conveniently located in the center of the market (location: 5 stars). I was just relieved to find a place with an adapter. Surprisingly, the room was clean and comfortable, and the shared shower and toilet were fine too (there was free soap, shampoo, and other essentials). It was a 10-bed dorm, but it was so quiet and pleasant—like a Japanese capsule hotel (rooms: 5 stars). The best part was the staff. The male night shift clerk was punctual and polite, but the lady, who seemed to be the owner, was incredible. I was rushing to the airport but didn’t have enough cash and couldn’t even call a cab. She helped me get a taxi and gave me about 20k VND so I wouldn’t miss my flight. I repaid her with 10 AUD as a token of gratitude, even though she refused it. She was extremely helpful and kind (service: 5 stars).

title: Vy Da Backpackers Hostel
address: 33/1 Nguyễn Trung Trực, Bến Thành, Hồ Chí Minh 70000, Vietnam
plus_code: QMGX+23 Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Curious K.
user_reviews.Description:
Considering the price, the service I received here was excellent.

The common area is nice and comfortable. The shampoo and body wash provided are good quality, which I really appreciated. Breakfast was more than enough, and the homemade yogurt was a big plus.

The staff did a great job with both service and cleanliness throughout my stay.

The location is also very convenient—close to food spots, places to explore, and everything you need.

For this price, this is honestly the best hostel I’ve ever stayed in.

user_reviews.Name: GeRi041894
user_reviews.Description: I tried to walk in at 1PM hoping to get a place where I could leave my stuff because my flight is at 1AM (I left my initial worst hotel in 15B Anne Home Le Than Ton on the last day). I haven’t got a chance to stay in their bed because I told the receptionist that I’ll be leaving in a couple of hours, after hearing that, she offered to nest my luggages without a charge, and even offered for a shower and free towel. So yeah, I didn’t spend a single penny, I offered to pay but they refuse. This hostel is strategically located near almost every tourist spots. The staff is accommodating, jolly and friendly. Does not rip you off and willing to help you without any cost! This is the first time I’ve experienced that kind of services in my entire life! I promise to go back and stay in Vy Da! This hostel deserves more than just a good feedback. So, if you’re thinking where to stay? This hostel is highly recommended!

user_reviews.Name: Juan Magallanes elcano
user_reviews.Description:
The photos don't resemble reality.

I stayed at Vy Da Backpacker Hostel, and while the hostel has potential, my experience was disappointing.

The building has three floors and no elevator. If you are traveling with large or heavy luggage, you will likely have difficulty carrying it upstairs. This is something to keep in mind before booking.

Unfortunately, cleanliness was a major issue during my stay. I arrived late and very tired, so I didn’t check the bed sheets before going to sleep. The next morning, I realized I had slept on dirty sheets with visible stains. I don’t want to directly blame the hostel management, but clearly whoever was responsible for preparing the bed did not properly change or clean the sheets from the previous guest — there really isn’t another explanation.

Another common issue in this type of hostel is that some long-term guests start acting like they “own” the room. They take over the space, leave their belongings everywhere, and often maintain poor hygiene. Some even eat on the beds, and the smell of food lingers in the room, making the environment uncomfortable for others.

It’s a shame because the hostel has potential, but better cleaning standards and improved room management would make a big difference.

user_reviews.Name: Khristian Alfoja
user_reviews.Description:
For the price, this place is really good. It’s probably the cheapest hostel I’ve ever stayed in! The staff were nice and friendly, and I felt safe there the whole time

The rooms were pretty quiet so I was able to rest well after my long trip from cambodia. It actually stays quiet most of the day, so you can sleep anytime

Even though there are lots of people, the bathroom was pretty decent and not crowded since there are plenty on each floor. The internet works everywhere in the hostel, so if youre working remotely, you can work pretty much anywhere

Its also easy to make friends in the lobby or yhe common room, they also have breakfast which is amazing considering how cheap the price is

The only down part is, its not friendly for people with disability cuz its all stairs and no elevators

user_reviews.Name: Alyssa
user_reviews.Description:
Update: I'm giving 5 stars now instead of 4 because the one thing I said is that the hostel just needs a refresh and literally the next day there is an entire crew here putting up a fresh coat of paint on all the walls. It's looking so much better and brighter! Impressive! Plus now that I've spent some time here, I realize all my needs are met and this place is everything it should be! 👏🏽

This hostel is not particularly tidy nor nicely decorated but it is a decent place to stay for a low price.

- The bed is comfortable enough.
- A/C is not too hot or cold, just right.
- The privacy of the beds with curtains and bathrooms was sufficient.
- Staff are nice and helpful.
- The breakfast is actually pretty good (eggs, fresh fruit, yogurt, toast, meat), but I didn't like the sausage.
- No issues with the wifi

The best part is the location as it's central and there are so many amazing cafes and restaurants around, very walkable!

I would be happy to give them 5 stars but the place needs a good tidy and some interior design help, basically an update and a good refresh before it's 5 stars.

user_reviews.Name: Travel Bug Sean
user_reviews.Description: This is by far the best, most convenient spot to stay in Ho Chi Minh City. I recommend this place to all my fellow backpackers and travelers. Especially first timers in ho chi minh. It was my first time here solo traveled, I originally only booked for 3 days here then plan to switch to another hostel but i enjoyed my experience so much I extended my stay. In my opinion this was a hostel you felt everyone you interacted from fellow travelers to the super friendly staff to even the funny and super nice coffee lady next door. Got my coffee every morning from her. Rooms are clean, AC on and shower/toilet maintained everyday. Almost everything from attractions to foods within walkable distance [ 15 min walk ] Once you stay in vietnam or walked around you'll realize its not a long walk. like Cafe apartments and the party street Bui Vien Walking Street within distance. The hostel has a nice little rooftop to just chill and relax. I highly recommended to fellow traveler to give this place a try and stay. It was my first time here and I've had the best experience. Honestly I did. Just like when we backpack or travel we never really know what gonna happen, Who we meet or we just go and plan later. That's basically what happen. I do know I will stay here again. 👌

user_reviews.Name: Dinda Astuti
user_reviews.Description:
Wenever i go to saigon i stay in this hostel, room is cleaned everyday, and so is the bathroom. Bed is very comfy, not hard.
My favourite part of this hostel is the rooftop garden, I hung out there every night, either the sound of the city and cool saigon breeze 10/10!! Last night they threw a free dinner bbq party for new year and it was very nice.

My least favourite part is the stairs, get me out of breath everytime, would be great if they will install an elevator 😅

Overall great experience!! Will come back soon :)

user_reviews.Name: Jennifer Franke
user_reviews.Description: Good budget option to start your travels in the south of Vietnam. You get what you pay for. The hostel is outdated but clean and maintained. You can feel the springs in the matras, but beds are spacious with curtains and private light. Good AC. Free breakfast is great (eggs, toast, yoghurt and fruit). Showers are cold but not freezing. Staff is very friendly. Good location to visit tourist areas, not gery social. All in al, I enjoyed my 4 night stay here :).

title: Khoi Hostel
address: 373/11 Phạm Ngũ Lão, Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Bến Thành, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QM8Q+PV Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Straightforward rooms & dorms in a simple hostel offering a communal lounge & computer room.

complete_address.borough: Phường Phạm Ngũ Lão, Ben Thanh

user_reviews.Name: Rezzia Pearl Acu
user_reviews.Description: Value for your buck if you're a solo traveler looking for a hostel near the city centre. It's walking distance. Freshly changed linens. Soft bed and pillow. My privacy was valued even if I was inside a 6-bed room. Felt safe even after late-nights

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: The receptionist lady has bad attitude and no hospitality service. Stayed for 5 days here, asked the houskeeper directly to clean u the room but didnt clean the floor. Room is small. Nothing special

user_reviews.Name: wanderawr
user_reviews.Description: Quiet hostel situated in the backpackers’ area of district 1 in an alley full of several other hostels not far from the nightlife of Bui Vien.||Originally booked 4 nights at Long Hostel, but after a mistake on Expedia’s part, I arrived at 1am with no confirmed booking. The staff there directed me to Khoi Hostel directly across instead, and I had a pleasant experience with no complaints.||I stayed in a private double with en suite bathroom that was clean, larger than expected, and included AC, fan, mini fridge, and reliable hot water for the shower. There was free breakfast every morning and the staff helped me arrange tours for the Cu Chi Tunnels and Mekong Delta, both of which I thoroughly enjoyed. ||Overall I had a great stay at Khoi Hostel and am quite happy I was sent there after my original booking didn’t work out.

user_reviews.Name: Bar Co
user_reviews.Description:
So here is the deal. People who give this place low reviews just expect to get 5 star hotel for a price of a budget hotel.
I came for few days and stayed for few weeks. Over all the place is clean quite safe and good value for the location. U are few minutes walk from everywhere party street restaurants museum markets coffee etc . The lady who manages the place is a helpful darling .
So don't worry book a room .

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: Unfortunately, my stay was unpleasant. I was placed in a dorm with a sick guest who had a severe cough, stuffy nose, and sore throat. He admitted he had been sick for 3 days. No warning from the staff, no isolation, and no mask. I had to sleep in the hallway to avoid getting infected.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: Very convenient location and room was clean. Lots of good restaurants nearby

user_reviews.Name: Putu Ditta Agastya
user_reviews.Description:
If you're looking for an affordable place to stay in Ho Chi Minh City, I highly recommend Khoi Hostel! The accommodation is super comfy, clean and well-maintained. All common areas, including the bathroom, are cleaned every morning.

The location is strategic, and the staff are very nice. Although they don't speak English fluently, communication went very smoothly.

It's a perfect place to meet locals and try local food since it's located near a traditional market. Every morning, my husband and I went to the market for breakfast—such a fun experience!

Hope the pictures attached speak for themselves!

PS: I took the time to post this review in the hope of convincing others to choose Khoi for their stay. I don’t understand why some people left negative comments, as they don’t reflect my experience.

Thanks, Khoi Hostel!

user_reviews.Name: THIHA
user_reviews.Description: Lovely coliving apartment. Recommended for backpackers. Near to the local market.

title: The Grand Ho Tram
address: ấp Hồ Tràm, Hồ Tràm, Hồ Chí Minh 790000, Vietnam
plus_code: FFQ3+4G Ho Tram, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam
description: Elegant property featuring free Wi-Fi & breakfast, plus a spa, an outdoor pool & a golf course.

user_reviews.Name: Công Định Nguyễn
user_reviews.Description:
Just got back from a short stay at the Grand and honestly… it was exactly what I needed. After long work days, this little escape felt like a reset. Huge shoutout to Jayden for upgrading my room to a higher floor — the ocean view was insane (just check it out at the picture below). Waking up to that endless blue, seeing the infinity pool blend into the sea, and just soaking in the quiet morning breeze… unreal. Check-in with Andy was smooth and easy. Ms. Neko gave such a warm welcome right from the start. Ms. Ngan took great care of me and recommended an amazing cocktail (10/10 btw). Ms. Tran at Fuel was super kind and attentive, and Mr. Khang was always helpful with info whenever I needed anything. Breakfast was fresh, simple, and really good — sitting there and just enjoying the moment made everything even better. What stood out most wasn’t just the view (which is stunning), but how genuinely cared for I felt the whole time. The team here really knows how to make guests feel comfortable and appreciated.
Can’t wait to come back.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: We've grabbed a special discount for this stay. Our stay is perfect, the room is outstanding. This will be my favourite for future vacations.

user_reviews.Name: Lisa
user_reviews.Description:
I had an amazing stay at Holiday Inn Ho Tram! The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming from the moment we arrived. They went above and beyond to make our experience special.



The restaurant staff were fantastic, especially during the buffet meals. 



A special highlight for us was the kids' quarter & Game zone which was an excellent space for our children to play and have fun. 



Overall, the resort offered a fantastic experience, and we can't wait to return. Highly recommended for families!

user_reviews.Name: Far Gh
user_reviews.Description:
Great hotel overall and very family-friendly. The food was very good, the vibe was wonderful, and the staff were extremely kind, welcoming, and polite. The facilities are well maintained, and the pool is beautiful with an amazing ocean view.

The only downside is the pool floor. While it makes sense for the edges of the pool to be rough for safety, the floor of the pool itself is also very rough, which does not make sense since this is where guests and children walk in the water. After being in the pool, when the skin becomes soft, it easily causes scratches and cuts. Both of my kids ended up with bleeding toes because of this, which was very upsetting and limited our time enjoying the pool.

The hotel should inform guests in advance to bring water shoes or provide them for safety. Aside from this issue, it is still a great place to stay and enjoy a family vacation.

user_reviews.Name: Duc Duong
user_reviews.Description:
Exceptional Service and Wonderful Stay at The Grand Ho Tram:
​My recent check-in experience at The Grand Ho Tram ultimately turned into an exceptionally pleasant one, thanks entirely to the world-class staff. While I ran into an issue where I mistakenly booked a basic room through a third-party site, Reservation.com, assuming I had secured an Ocean View room directly, the hotel team handled the situation with grace and professionalism.
​The front desk staff, especially Lilly, were incredibly welcoming and accommodating upon our arrival. When the mix-up was confirmed, manager Daisy immediately stepped in. I truly appreciated her empathy and understanding; she went above and beyond by offering a complimentary upgrade to a Golf View room, which turned out to be beautiful and offered stunning views of the lush course. Daisy's intervention turned a potentially frustrating situation into a memorable positive experience.
​The accommodation was superb, and the positive impressions continued throughout our stay. We had the pleasure of dining at both Ginger restaurant and the Italian restaurant. Both venues offered delicious food and the service was genuinely excellent—attentive without being intrusive.
​Beyond the dining, the hotel's amenities are fantastic. The beach is clean and well-maintained, and all the staff members we encountered were helpful and polite. The smooth check-out process, handled efficiently by Sam, capped off a perfect trip.
​The staff at The Grand Ho Tram are clearly well-trained; everyone spoke with excellent English and outstanding manners. I wholeheartedly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for five-star service and genuine hospitality. I look forward to returning on my next visit.

user_reviews.Name: Juanita Medina
user_reviews.Description:
It's always lovely to stay at The Grand Hotel, everything is taken care of.
There are so many things to do as well, perfect for a couple get away or a family trip.
All the staff are very friendly and willing to help.
My boyfriend got a cake for his birthday, we found it when we got back to the room, such a nice detail made us feel special.
We look forward to coming back soon.

user_reviews.Name: Sochi
user_reviews.Description:
This review is for the casino only. The casino website states they had Texas Hold em Poker so I drove 1.4 hours from Vung Tau to play only that game. I was disappointed to learn they actually do not have it!
I settled for the blackjack table instead, it was a good table with fair payout and buy-in. The floor staff and dealers were all great.
The casino is acceptable if you wanna get some gambling in but if you're use to places like Vegas it does not compare.

user_reviews.Name: Phil Barber
user_reviews.Description:
We tried to go here to buy a day pass, to use the pool etc. They weren’t able to tell us what we were getting. It was very expensive, anyone over 4 is an adult, and a reminder the weekend is Friday/Saturday here.

Instead we took a taxi to Tropicana 15 minutes up the road. 1/3 of the cost. Less arrogant. Give them a look

title: Marina Bay Resort & Spa
address: 115 Trần Phú, Phường, Vũng Tàu, Hồ Chí Minh 790000, Vietnam
plus_code: 93H4+X6 Vung Tau, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Connor
user_reviews.Description: We really enjoyed our stay here. Conveniently located just a couple hours from HCM making it a great weekend getaway spot from the city. We especially loved the pool and buffet breakfast. The rooms were oversized and the TVs were large too, great for a relaxing holiday. The hotel is situated about 10-15 minutes from town, however, access to the town is quick, cheap and easy via grab or other taxi service. The staff were attentive and friendly throughout our stay too. I’d definitely visit again if I wanted some time away from HCM.

user_reviews.Name: I Heart Huffing Gasoline
user_reviews.Description:
Cool place. They don’t have a beach, but they have a saltwater pool and a normal pool, no beach.
The rooms are ok, sometimes connected to a shallow pool.
The service is good with many perks.
One BIG thing, the food is bad. I don’t mean it tastes bad, I mean it has gone bad. I ordered a double shot espresso at night and it tasted acidic.
In the morning there is an all you can eat buffet, but the food doesn’t look very fresh. I actually got food poisoning, and even the taxi driver who took me to the hospital said they reuse food.

user_reviews.Name: Tony V
user_reviews.Description:
Nice infinity pool but thats where it stops.

Service felt like 3 stars more than 5 and my wife's products had portions stolen from her jars.

Bathrooms were poorly maintained with bad smells and during the night geckos that were in our bungalow make noises which ruined our sleep. We complained and staff said they removed them however they fail as we encountered more sleepless nights.

Wont be coming back here again.

Other better places we've stayed at are the mecure and imperial.

user_reviews.Name: Binh Duc Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: I was traveling to Vung Tau with my partner and we had a great time at Marina Bay resort. The room had an amazing view to the ocean. The swimming pool with ocean water was my favorite along with the buffet breakfast every morning! Would recommend this place to all my saigon friends for a mini weekend vacation!

user_reviews.Name: Hayley
user_reviews.Description:
Have been here several times and have no complains about this lovely resort. It’s all good from hotel quality, staff and services. What made me impressed is their caring when they give me birthday cake, really appreciate👏🏼
Surely I will comeback 👍🌊💯

user_reviews.Name: CHOW BABES
user_reviews.Description:
Toilet clog after taking #2
Shower drainage issue
Tiles were black and mold
Patio chairs were dirty and used bath towel to cover the chair, get yellow spot and charged me d50,000 ($1.90 USD)
Honestly, I gave everyone tips 4x that amount. I even gave d100,000 everyday to housekeeping. I usually don’t write comments, after bath towel charge and they dare to ask me to give them a better review.

user_reviews.Name: Anne L.
user_reviews.Description: We were here for a night wedding. Service was attentive and professional. The karaoke is exuburant, and the noise level will send you running for cover.

user_reviews.Name: Minh Ly Nguyen Vo
user_reviews.Description:
Located in a secluded area away from the city central which is very quiet if you want to enjoy a peaceful vacation with your family.

The resort does not have its own private beach, however, they offer 2 large swimming pools, one with saltwater pumped directly from the sea, one with freshwater.

Our room is very clean and spacious. It has a terrace facing the ocean shore, chilling out here and listening to the waves constantly hit the rocks is very relaxing.

Breakfast is mainly local Vietnamese dishes but there are bread, butter, jams and sausage if you want to go for a minimal western style one.

Overall, even it’s a bit pricy, it’s worth the experience of enjoying a quiet and relaxing stay.

title: Can Gio Resort
address: 167 Thạnh Thới, Long Hoà, Cần Giờ, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: 9WP9+XW Can Gio, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: gohabsgo2028
user_reviews.Description: The only reason I would recommend going there is if you go by motorbike and drive around the area. There are mangroves, a monkey forest and some beautiful scenery. With regard to the resort, the only two good things are the pool which is pretty big although maintenance is bad and the night market opposite which can dish out some really tasty seafood.||||As far as everything else goes, getting there on your own is pretty much a hassle even if it's not that complicated or long (it basically involves a bus from Pham Ngu Lao station, a short ferry ride and then bus 90 to the resort). There is also a direct option but it has ridiculous hours such as 4:30 am for the return... In any case, make sure you get the help of a Vietnamese before you embark on this trip.||||Now for the bad which is pretty much everything else, the only thing reception seems  to really care about is keeping your passport. Besides this, they spoke no English, did little to help, would not change money, rent or even try to help with renting a motorbike, and were basically rather unfriendly (even the Vietnamese who accompanied thought so). Oh, and the resort is more than 1 km away from the main street and no one offers to pick you up when you arrive, even if you call. Motorbikes will probably show up and offer to "help" at an inflated rate. They certainly have a lot to learn about customer service or making this place remotely interesting for foreigners, but this is clearly not part of their objectives.||||What else? Included breakfast was a joke (we simply skipped it the following day) and although I've seen worse maintenance, the rooms are pretty bad and old. Oh, and room service cleans when THEY feel like it, in our case they knocked on our door at 8:45 am basically telling us to leave so they could clean the room. ||||Most importantly and sadly, the beach is dirty not to say disgusting. First off, there is a gigantic wall that covers a road between it and the resort, and then you do get across to the beach you see that people throw garbage everywhere and that the hotel makes no cleaning effort whatsoever. As a result, you pretty much need shoes to walk around safely and if you want to swim you have to use the pool. ||||There is clearly a reason why everyone prefers Vung tau, but it is quite unfortunate because with a bit of effort and a lot of cleaning this could be a pleasant beach and really pleasant resort/area.

user_reviews.Name: Goma404
user_reviews.Description: The good things: Paid $35 a night for a standard room, which was clean  and serviceable. I came with a big group of friends and the staff was accommodating when we wanted to stay up late by the pool. And they also let us keep our cooler full of drinks by the poolside. There was decent wifi throughout the resort. The bad things: It had just rained so there was a sewage smell at the pool. There should be more seating at the pool (there's plenty of room for more chairs) because my friends and I had to share chairs. The food at the restaurant was pretty bad and very overpriced. These are forgivable offenses when paying only $35 a night. We had booked in advance to get this price but our friends who booked at the last minute paid triple the price we did for the same style of room. When paying $100 a night, this place is not worth it. It's advertised as a three star, but I would say it's more of a two star.

user_reviews.Name: tuantq222
user_reviews.Description: No longer active as it becomes a real estate agent

user_reviews.Name: 457deanm
user_reviews.Description: Quaint, very very very isolated place, stayed 3 days.||||Ive tried three times to write this review, hmmmm||||Its a 1 to 2 star hotel||||The hotel is ok at best, nice staff (non English), nice grounds, nice breakfast area overlooking the big pool. Nice warm pool. The Photos over sell the place.||||The bad, breakfast area Saturday and Monday was Asian soup and I begged for a coffee, Sunday the place was a packed Smorgasbord with bus trippers and young couple getting away for the night and seafood on the beach front.||||Tennis courts were run down not for use, pay for a game of pool, gym is a stationary bike and a treadmill, they hire bikes but don't use them on the road you can get fined.||||The room had luke warm water at best, and no Wifi. (Wifi at pool and restaurant was great).||||I wanted to keep this review to just the hotel....BUT... There is nothing at Can Gio to want to stay more that 1 night, ||||Monkey, Crocodile, Boat run is a rip off, promised 1 hour 30 trip, your done in 45 min 6000,00 dong a boat is crazy, Staff very unhelpful, overpriced||||Goods Market is a few shops that wont barter, Seafood Market will barter good.||||From what i could tell there are 4 separate places to eat across from the hotel but there all mixed together with red plastic chairs and tables so wait till they come to you to with the menu. food is nice and cheap, don't touch the animals.||||Seafood on the beach is a deck chair / small plastic chair and table experience but very nice and soooo cheap, barter per kg for your seafood or walk next door to the next restaurant or buy your own at the seafood market and they will cook it for a price. Your expected to drop what you don't eat on the ground my Gf loved it, me im a clean eater, hahaha.

user_reviews.Name: Dan Harley, Jr.
user_reviews.Description: I live in Can Thanh and come here to get away from the house. you can tell this place used to be very beautiful and very nice. Looks very run down now. However, room rates are unbelievably cheap. Restaurant is pretty good and beautiful setting.

user_reviews.Name: 585ngocn
user_reviews.Description: If you book the accommodation here in weekdays, it would be perfect. Less people, more quite, cheaper and better service. I always come here for staying because only few steps to get to the market with many variety of seafood. Breakfast is ok. Only few choices to pick it. The room isn't nice and many mosquitoes. The swimming pool is clean.

user_reviews.Name: frequenttraveller63
user_reviews.Description: According to the hotel description "this beautiful eco-resort is situated along the romantic beach". Well, don't expect any of those things! It consists of a rather ugly set of concrete buildings, managed by Saigontourist. It overlooks some abandoned shrimp ponds and derelict buildings. Nothing eco about it. The rooms are basic but OK (lots of nylon fabrics, shiny wooden furnishings, leaking shower, etc.). The restaurants serves just-about edible but somewhat overpriced food. And the pool is big but not very clean (especially after the weekend, when a lot of families with children come and use it). The so-called "beach" is absolutely horrific - behind a locked gate for the most part, strewn with rubble and garbage. I guess the hotel would be fine as a stopover (there are few or no other hotels in the vicinity), but I really wouldn't recommend it as a destination in its own right - you would be very disappointed.

user_reviews.Name: Ben Herman
user_reviews.Description: An ok enough place for a weekend getaway. Absolute garbage WiFi and the restaurant is SO EXPENSIVE - and the included the breakfast buffet was terrible. Best to eat fresh seafood at the market across the street. The pool is ok but there was no shade, but the lounge chair I chose was actually broken and just kind of propped up for show. Our rooms toilet was broken and they didn’t fix it after we informed them. We had to take the lid off and replace the floating device on the stick every time we used it or it would just keep flushing forever. Overall, expect nothing and you’ll be pleasantly surprised.

title: An Tùng Retreat
address: 32/68 Võ Văn Hát, Long Trường, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: RRF3+9G Long Truong, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Maaike De Vries
user_reviews.Description:
This place is truly a hidden gem! The accommodation is brand new, beautifully designed, and spotlessly clean. The staff are incredibly welcoming and kind, and the food is absolutely delicious. It’s located in a quiet, non-touristic area, which we really loved.

During our trip through Vietnam we were sometimes disappointed by accommodations because the reviews didn’t match reality, but this place is actually even better than the photos.

We were able to fully relax during our stay, and it genuinely felt like a peaceful escape. We highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a calm, clean, luxurious stay, with the chance to experience the real Vietnam in the surrounding villages.

user_reviews.Name: Anastasia Wolf
user_reviews.Description:
My boyfriend and I stayed here for his birthday, and we were absolutely thrilled with our experience! The rooms are brand new - extremely clean, cozy, and beautifully designed.

The whole place feels peaceful and charming, with a lovely pool where the water is pleasantly warm. There are also plenty of interesting spots to explore around the city nearby.

The hosts were incredibly friendly, and the entire staff was kind, attentive, and always ready to help. 💞

They stayed in touch with us throughout our stay and assisted with anything we needed. There’s also an on-site kitchen - the food was absolutely delicious, with generous portions and beautiful presentation. The chef even came out once to make sure we enjoyed our meal! 🤩

Everything was fresh and tasty, and we found ourselves coming back to eat there again and again.

We were so happy and relaxed that we even decided to extend our stay. It was the perfect getaway, and we can’t wait to return. Highly recommended! 🌸📈

user_reviews.Name: shane gard
user_reviews.Description: I'm here now, and the bad reviews are fake,  the place is amazing and the staff are beautiful and I suggest you stay here and eat here also

user_reviews.Name: Trung Del
user_reviews.Description: The best and only choice to stay in this area. The atmosphere and services are super great

user_reviews.Name: Cie Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: It's very comfortable here.It's very comfortable here.

user_reviews.Name: Jodie Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: The ultimate sanctuary for peace and recovery.

user_reviews.Name: Hậu Trần Văn
user_reviews.Description: Ok

user_reviews.Name: Nhựt Lê Minh
user_reviews.Description:
Không gian yên tĩnh, nhiều cây xanh, thiết kế mộc mạc nhưng tinh tế, tạo cảm giác rất thư giản khi bước vào. Phòng sạch sẽ gọn gàng, ánh sáng tự nhiên, nội thất tuy đơn giản mà ấm cúng .
Nhân viên thân thiện, hỗ trợ nhiệt tình check in hay check out đều nhanh gọn. Khuôn viên được chăm sóc kỹ lưỡng, buổi tối lên đèn nhìn rất chill và lộng lẫy thích hợp cho nghĩ dưỡng, thư giãn khi đi cùng gia đình và người yêu.
Vị trí không quá xa so với trung tâm, di chuyển thuận tiện. Giá cả thì hợp lý phải chăng khỏi phải bàn. Chất lượng dịch vụ đều chu đáo tận tình. Những điều đó đã tạo nên”An Tùng Retreat - nơi nghĩ dưỡng đúng nghĩa”

title: Lakeview Villa
address: 18 Đường Số 2, khu phố Giản Dân Thành phố, Long Bình, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: VR7H+M2 Long Binh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

complete_address.borough: khu phố Giản Dân Thành phố, Long Binh

user_reviews.Name: ShanilB
user_reviews.Description: The distance from the airport to this property scared me at the beginning but then the awesome golf course and the lake views from the villa soothed me. I did not care anymore that this place was 45 mins away from the hustle and bustle of the city. The villa had full French windows on the ground floor for an unrestricted view of the private back garden and the lake beyond. The hall was spacious and comfortable and had a separate dining area. The kitchen was fully equipped but did not have any cooking pots or pans. That was a real let down. |The garden outside has a small seating area with a foldable umbrella in case it gets too hot. We were lucky that the weather was perfect during our stay with short spells of rain only. |There are 3 bedrooms upstairs which are tastefully done with minimum fuss. The toilets are clean and tidy. |The restaurant delivers to the villa till 7 PM only.  The food is average and not economical either. It is better to use the food delivery app like vietnammm.com for more delivery options. |This is one place you can relax and have a nice time at the course.

user_reviews.Name: Thu Tran
user_reviews.Description: The place is a complex of accommodations and golf. It is worth escaping busy life from the centre of  the city and find a corner here. Nice golf course for any golfer. For me, it is an amazing time to wander along the green lawns, throw into the forest and find a cool corner under the tree to relax. Landscape here is exquisite.

user_reviews.Name: Lifeinmovement
user_reviews.Description: We had a great stay at the Lakeview villas.  Away from the crowd, the pollution, this is a very peaceful setting.  We stayed at a huge four-bedroom-villa facing the lake.  Every morning was such a pleasant time. The villa itself was huge.  Three main bedrooms had their own bathrooms, TVs, closets, balconies.  There is also a powder room on the first floor.  Each area had a great working a/c.  The laundry room was great.  We used the washer every day and we were able to let our laundry dry on the patio as we had a rolling drying rack.  The kitchen itself had a fridge, oven, stove, microwave, electric kettle, instant coffee and tea, plates, cups, knives, forks, spoons.  At one point, I had to request a pot to make pasta, and it simply took a phone call for them to bring me one.  Service at Lakeview was really fantastic throughout our whole stay of five days.  The whole staff is kind, warm, and very responsive.  We used their shuttle service to go to town and back,  It is very prompt and although it takes about 40 min to get to town, it was totally worth it. You can go to Ben Thanh or the Diamond mall by using the shuttle.  Call the reception in advanced and the shuttle picks you up right outside your villa.  Also, it can drop you off and pick you up at the grocery store (Metro) if you need.  Just make sure you arrange yourself with the reception.  Our kids loved the amenities that were available: playground, pool, furs all/ping pong room, little indoor play area and also the store at the reception.  If you desire to dine around, look no further than the Golf.  We tried the restaurant and to our surprise, it was really good.  A couple of times, we also had the food delivered to the villa.  The reception will arrange picking you up at the villa and driving you back as well!  We warmly thank the staff at the Lakeview for their above and beyond service.||We had a great stay a the Lakeview and I definitely recommend staying there if you have small kids.  It was a great place away from the crowded city center.

user_reviews.Name: Roméo Dimier Degrange
user_reviews.Description: Nice and quiet residence place at walking distance from the French International school. Swimming pool and some shops. But still quite far from downtown. Good for French families missing nature. Otherwise, district 2 would be better.

user_reviews.Name: BigPoppaPauley
user_reviews.Description: We played on a Monday which was a lot quieter than our Sunday round which was good. Still very hot and humid in early April so keep up the fluids. The course is very nice, fairly established with tall trees fringing the fairways which is a nice change from the links style courses. We ate in the clubhouse after our game and that was disappointing, basics like toasted sandwiches came out cold, one was sent back, and the same sandwich came back out, still cold, still with a bite out of it...!|Caddies were OK, nothing special and still lack the basics in English.

user_reviews.Name: GarnetCara
user_reviews.Description: Moving here full time - an absolute oasis, clean outdoor living with no mopeds and lots of activities! Thankful to have found it. The club house is great and the food is brilliant - can have everything delivered to the villa.

user_reviews.Name: brendak272
user_reviews.Description: Despite being billed as a 5 star resort, this falls far short of the expectations for such.||For example, on arrival there were no bath towels provided until requested,no pots or pans or sharp knife in the promised kitchen, no tea or coffee, no hairdryer,no iron, not even an electric kettle until requested. Add these inadequacies to the enormous distance away from any shops or eating places and it makes for a frustrating stay.||There is a shuttle to the city, and the staff tried to be very helpful within the management constraints, but I'm afraid I would not stay there again

user_reviews.Name: Alessio Barbagini
user_reviews.Description: Not my genre of residential area, but if you like golf and quite surrounding is perfect. Bit far from everything, be sure you dont forget something in the grocery list before heading there/home

title: Le Palmier Hồ Tràm Resort
address: Đường Ven Biển, Phước Thuận, Hồ Tràm, Hồ Chí Minh 70000, Vietnam
plus_code: FCCG+F5 Ho Tram, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Passport699164
user_reviews.Description: I’m travelling with my company. Everything in resort was excellent. The staff always smile, helpful and kind. Breakfast buffet was delicous. I will be back in the future

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: The hotel resort is very nice and clean, the service super friendly and helpful, definitely I will come back again in future

user_reviews.Name: Lain Duong
user_reviews.Description:
We spent a couple of nights here during the week. We booked the combo package that give us transport to and from HCMC, accommodation and vietnamese set lunch and dinner. The room was lovely, the pool and garden are sooo pretty and tranquil, and the FOOD WAS DELICIOUS! Pho was just right, seasoning was on point, drinks were yummy.

Highly recommended.

Check their website - promotions section for the combos.

user_reviews.Name: Alicia M
user_reviews.Description: We loved our time at Le palmier. The hotel is modern & serene. The staff are very friendly & helpful. Extra shout out to Nguyen on front desk & the afternoon manager who were so accommodating. The food & beverages were such high quality, including the breakfast buffet, & also well priced.

user_reviews.Name: makri achour
user_reviews.Description:
This hotel is very bad, don't be fulled by the high review because it's given by local and seems like their expectations are low... This hotel is not a resorts or a 4 stars hôtel and it should be labeled 3 stars at most... Here are the reason:

1. The beach is super small I wouldn't even call it a beach... Their is this super ugly concrete platform which takes most of the volume of the beach and in high tide you don't have beach anymore , only water...
2. The food at the restaurant is terrible, my son got sick overnight so it's either not fresh or not well cooked...
3. The swimming pool is dirty especially the corner for children
4. The playground is surrounded by high coconut trees, a coconut can fall anytime and it can kill a children instantly.

All this to say that I do not recommend this place , don't be fulled by the high review which is probably from people that never been to a true resor, I've booked 2 nights but the experience was so terrible that I checked out after the first night

user_reviews.Name: Sabrina Engelstad
user_reviews.Description:
I had an incredible stay at Le Palmier Resort in Ho Tram, Vietnam. The resort is absolutely stunning — we stayed in a villa with a private pool that was spotless, spacious, and beautifully designed. Every staff member we met was so kind and accommodating.

The managers, Joseph and Steven, went above and beyond for us. They helped my brother plan a surprise proposal for his girlfriend, and it was perfect — private, beautiful, and so thoughtfully arranged.

A special shoutout to Thao and Chi, who took amazing care of us at the restaurant and even brought food to our room after hours. The breakfast buffet was fresh with plenty of great options.

Overall, the service, the atmosphere, and the warmth of the team made this stay unforgettable. I highly recommend Le Palmier to anyone looking for a truly relaxing getaway. It’s paradise.

user_reviews.Name: An Phan
user_reviews.Description:
Rooms: Spacious, used but spotless, fresh sheets and comforters, upkept daily with room cleaning. The room cleaning team Ha, Dung, and Nguyet do a consciencious job even though we have a toddler.
Excellent services: all employees are courteous, friendly, going the extra miles for us- frontdesk, pool, restaurants, beach guards, transportation to beach.
Location: gorgeous. Our family has a safe, good, and relaxing time.

user_reviews.Name: Tam Ngo
user_reviews.Description:
I had a 2 night stay at this beautiful resort. Everything was perfect. I booked a luxury ocean view and the room was super spacious and worth the money. The facilities are clean, modern and new. Bathroom was very huge and good ventilated. Room was bright and i got a breathtaking view of both the ocean and the pool.
Restaurant is spacious with vibrant atmosphere. But food is what i love the most here. All dishes were super tasty with large portion, from Asian cuisine to international cuisine. I dont want to drive out for meals because i already got everything i wanna eat in this resort. You can reserve the seafood you wanna eat before 7pm and the restaurant will cook it the way you want. Everything was fresh and super delicious. Loveeeee the coconut and dragonfruit here. Coconut is a MUST TRY. It was so good and fresh. I had like 5 coconuts during my 2night stay here. You can never go wrong with the coconut. And the breakfast was so great either it is ala carte or buffet. And again, everythinf was so tasty that i wish my stomach is super big in order to consume all the food at this resort!!!
All staff are super friendly, attentive, accommodative, helpful and kind. The lifeguard at the pool is also super attentive to the guests. He taught us how to kayak!!! My deepest gratefulness to all of the staff at this resort! It was a memorable experience!
The pool is pretty large and they even have a jacuzzi! The landscape is phenomenal. Every corner is green which brings you closer to nature. They even have a lot of koi fish next to the pool.
A walk to the beach takes around 5 mins and yes it was a private beach and there is a dedicated lifeguard of the resort as well so you feel super safe there.
Overall this experience worth every penny! Would definitely come back and highly recommend to anyone who wants to have a few days off the city and feel a touch of fresh & vibrant ocean splash! It is only 2.5hrs driving from Saigon so go experience! Perfect choice i guarantee!!!!!

title: Phuong Nam Resort - Thuan An, Binh Duong
address: 15/12 Khu Phố Trung, Bình Hòa, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: VPF3+WC Binh Hoa, Binh Duong, Vietnam

owner.name: Phuong Nam Resort - Thuan An, Binh Duong (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Mayinn Yoyi
user_reviews.Description:
Needless to say more! Among all the accommodations I’ve tried, this one is the best by far! 💯

It’s truly great value for money I booked 3 rooms and paid so much less than expected, yet it’s not a cheap hotel at all. Everything felt premium  from the rooms to the service.

The buffet was incredible, the kind that makes you not want to leave the place! We were supposed to stay only 2 nights, but ended up extending our vacation in Ho Chi Minh just to enjoy more time at this resort. Also, its my son's bday, and I told the reception, as we booked on the same day, he did not disappoint as I booked a dinner for 8 people, they surprised me a cake for my son, not a small cake but a proper one with his Full name on it lol and matching bday song from the staff! OMG I love this place!

The spa is amazing, and the staff, food, and rooms were all excellent. Definitely my favorite stay ever  can’t wait to come back soon! 🌴✨

user_reviews.Name: NeZhZhLi
user_reviews.Description: Beautiful resort, staff very friendly, but have limited English. Really hard to communicate. The breakfast is mostly catered for Chinese. If you want a fried egg, you have to communicate with sign language. The shower is inside the bath and very slippery. The resort is 30 to 40 min out of the centre. So there is nothing to do, no restaurants or shopping opportunities.

user_reviews.Name: Nadja Konopka
user_reviews.Description: My stay at Phuong Nam Resort was  miserable. When I arrived they already told me that the restaurant is closed, so I have to order by Grab or go out. But there are not many options to go. The room was okay and cleab, but a lot of Mosquitos. When I walk trough the resort I realized that everything is closed. So, No Restaurant, No Spa, No Sauna, Non Gym. And I did not see any other guest. So, I want back to the reception and ask for a solution because I booked a Resort to have everything in one place and they could not offer me that. The reaction of the staff was just smiling and saying "But we have a Pool". I did not feel that they take me for real. I decided just to stay for one night and not for the planned five nights. I said this this to the Manager the same reaction was just smiling and not really reaction. Next day when I checked out I l was forced to discuss with the person on the reception about my refund. Because I wanted my money back for the nights, I am not staying at the resort. It was just a disaster and it's quite the opposite of being relaxed. So, I think if they would run this resort it could be very nice, but at the moment it just a scam.

user_reviews.Name: 倪標
user_reviews.Description:
Had a year end party dinner there, my company order the vegetarian for me, and there are only two dish, impossible enough portions to be full.

Told the manager and they delivered same two dishes again

user_reviews.Name: hoang dao
user_reviews.Description:
I stay at this eco resort and I like it very much. It is very quiet and peaceful. Good place to rest and relax.

The room was clean and nice. Bed is comfortable. I like that it is not crowded and not noisy. Very calm feeling.

People who work there are friendly and helpful. They smile and speak kind. The food is fresh and healthy. I wish there were more different meals, but still very good.

This place is very nice if you want quiet time and nature. I want to come again and stay more days.

user_reviews.Name: Ali
user_reviews.Description:
If you’re looking for a reasonably affordable place to stay in Ho Chi Min City and away from all the noise then Phuong Nam Resort is the place to book. The resort has a decent breakfast buffet, multiple restaurants with great range of food, nice size swimming pool, well priced massage, fishing and more. The staff are super friendly and always very polite and helpful. But the rooms are quite small and the place doesn’t seem very modern.
The location is great if you don’t wanna be around a busy area, but it is a little far from the city and the places you’d want to visit during your stay.
Overall the service and facilities you get for the price you pay is very reasonable and worth it compared to many other places.

user_reviews.Name: Snov Bvat
user_reviews.Description: It seems quiet and peaceful, but they still allow people to obnoxiously blast karaoke at night. Completely unacceptable for a place that advertises itself as a peaceful resort.

user_reviews.Name: Tran Anh Quan
user_reviews.Description:
THEY STILL SERVE SHARK FIN. IN 2025. Absolutely unacceptable.
Sharks are endangered species.

Everything else is standard of what you expect from a resort of this price.

title: Emerald Hồ Tràm Resort
address: Phước Thuận, Hồ Tràm, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: F9CX+F7 Ho Tram, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: NguyenNgocTung70
user_reviews.Description: Wow! Emerald Ho Tram Resort exceeded all expectations. 6-star service, breathtaking scenery, and delicious food. I had a truly memorable stay here. Must-try! Big plus: The private beach is clean, beautiful, and quiet, perfect for relaxation. This truly deserves to be called a vacation paradise; I will definitely return! 5/5!

user_reviews.Name: Han Anna
user_reviews.Description:
We had a truly lovely stay at this resort as a couple. From the very first moment we arrived, we were warmly welcomed by the front desk staff, who were professional, kind, and attentive — they made us feel relaxed even before we had time to get tired from traveling. Check-in was smooth and everything was explained clearly, so we could start enjoying our trip right away.

Our room was clean, quiet, and beautifully maintained, making it perfect for a cozy and romantic getaway. We joked that it was so comfortable we almost didn’t want to leave the room at all! The calm and pleasant atmosphere around the resort made our time together even more special.

Overall, we had a wonderful experience and felt genuinely well taken care of. We left with happy memories (and a lot of photos!☺️) and would absolutely love to come back again. We highly recommend this resort to couples looking for a relaxing and joyful escape

user_reviews.Name: P H A T B A P 2 3 1 1
user_reviews.Description: I had a wonderful weekend at Emerald Ho Tram. From the start, I was touched by the sincerity of the staff. I was fortunate to check in early and receive a complimentary room upgrade, which was a pleasant surprise. All my requests were handled with utmost care and support. A sincere thank you to the reception team for their professionalism. Special thanks to the porter for taking the time to drive me around the resort at night, and to the pool attendant for taking such beautiful photos of us, and so many other little things that made me love this place. It is the people here who make Emerald so perfect and friendly. I will definitely be back soon. See you next time!

user_reviews.Name: Phoebe Do
user_reviews.Description:
Overall it’s a pretty good spot for the affordable price. The room and services are really nice. Love the tub. The pool was great, very clean, well stocked with life jackets and towels. The staff are very nice and professional. Breakfast is phenomenal. Def a quiet place to relax, beautiful sunset.

A few minus points for 4 instead of 5 stars: the food was overpriced and wasn’t the best depending on what you order; there were no adult bikes available, the beach had these giant exposed erosion-control bags which kinda diminish the beautiful ocean scenery. I booked an ocean view junior suite but it wasn’t direct ocean view. The common areas such as the hall way or elevator windows aren’t super clean. You gotta walk by a back area full of junks before getting to the ocean / beach…

Overall for a resort, I expected a bit more. Would recommend a bit more attention to details to elevate the experience for visitors :)

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: A brand new resort with very friendly stuff . My husband and I spent 7 days at the resort in a standard king room with ocean views, the room is spacious and the bed was very comfortable. The best part was having a balcony with 2 chairs and a small table. Although the resort has good facilities 3 days to spend there is more than enough, during the week there is hardly any guest staying at the hotel, on the weekends is absolutely packed.  Breakfast is good with lots of cooked Asian variety , but it can get very heavy for breakfast, apart from bacon and eggs and some pastries there is not much western food variety.  Do not order cappuccino at the hotel restaurant as they don't know how to make it :(There is a pier about 700 m away from the resort - walking distance where there are a few restaurants as well as some water sports activities. Ho Tram city center is about  10 km away which is worth visiting as it is a lovely place, it comes alive at night with all the lights on. Overall a beautiful experience.

user_reviews.Name: Carter Daniel
user_reviews.Description:
💼I was in town for work and chose this resort mainly for convenience, but it turned out to be a really pleasant stay. After long days of meetings, it was great to come back to a place that felt calm, organized, and comfortable.

The food was surprisingly good, which honestly made my business trip a lot more enjoyable.
One thing I really appreciated was how the front desk staff kindly helped me with printing documents and answering my questions about nearby places — it saved me time and made everything much easier.

Everything ran smoothly, from the service to the overall atmosphere. I could relax, get some work done, and enjoy good meals without any hassle. This place definitely made my trip easier, and I would be happy to stay here again

user_reviews.Name: Tomas Šč
user_reviews.Description: We stayed here for 9 days. In short we got the room in the 6 floor, the highest. Room was spacious, had everything you need. The leaf spa was super awesome, had like 6 or 7 massages. As for the hotel ir is a bit old, but taken care off. Would mention very good room cleaning, good breakfast. Pool area is a bit old olso, no bar next by. The bar by the sea sunset is not cozy, no people, would suggest add some bulb light near the hamacs. The beach area was a disapoitment, it has 6 umbrealas, but the sea is wavy and the sand not so clean. Life hack : We went down 20min to diffrent hotel Melia and day time stayed there in there beach club.

user_reviews.Name: Simon Harrington
user_reviews.Description:
Review: Emerald Ho Tram Resort – 2/5 Stars

Summary: Great location, but everything else falls well below resort standards. Poor service, poor training, and an overall subpar experience.

The Pros:
The rooms are clean with a good layout, and the beachfront location is excellent for walking and enjoying the coast.

The Cons:

Luggage delivery was an embarrassment. Upon check-in, our room was at most 100 metres from reception. In any reputable resort, bags are delivered to your room at the same time you arrive, or within 5 to 10 minutes at most. Here, after asking twice and waiting over two hours, I had to physically walk back to reception for a third time and essentially say "the bags are coming with me now" before they were finally delivered. This alone set the tone for the entire stay.

The staff are expressionless and disengaged. Walking around the property, the staff appear flat and have no initiative. There is no warmth and no sense of pride in their work. In a well-run resort, staff are the heartbeat of the guest experience. Here, they are clearly undertrained and undermotivated.

Noise from early morning was a major issue. I could hear loud neighbours through thin connecting doors from 6:00 AM. Kitchen smells began entering the room from 6:30 AM, and staff were using loud leaf blowers directly outside the rooms at 7:30 AM.

The facilities are very average. The decor, gardens, and pool are all very standard. The entire property lacks polish and refinement. It is a very crowded, kid-heavy environment with very few international travellers, which reflects the inconsistent standards on offer.

Breakfast is below average. It was crowded with a basic selection and terrible coffee. I asked a staff member for a coffee from the proper espresso machine at the bar. She flatly told me "No, go to the self-serve machine." The self-serve machine then produced a weak, undrinkable coffee. Why have a quality espresso machine and refuse to use it for guests?

There is a total lack of leadership at every level. Having a background in resort management, I feel qualified to say this: good resorts are built on strong leadership and quality training. Both are clearly absent here. The staff need a complete overhaul in hospitality culture and service standards. This place is severely substandard.

Final Verdict:
The pricing is inflated for what is delivered, likely due to Tet holiday demand, but the experience is firmly a 2-star stay. It is not a horrible place physically, but it is nowhere near the standard expected of a resort. With genuine leadership, proper training, and better guest engagement, this place could be significantly better. Fortunately, I only booked one night and am moving on to a more reputable resort nearby.

title: Fleur de Lys Resort & Spa Long Hai
address: 04 Đ. Lê Trọng Tấn, Long Hải, Hồ Chí Minh 78412, Vietnam
plus_code: 96JV+4M Long Hai, Ba Ria - Vung Tau, Vietnam
description: Polished beachfront resort featuring a chic restaurant, plus an outdoor pool, a spa & yoga classes.

owner.name: Fleur de Lys Resort & Spa Long Hai (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: cameronf679
user_reviews.Description: It’s a quiet, spacious, and peaceful resort next to the ocean. We were mainly impressed with the service and the quality of food at the restaurant. The grounds are quite lush, there are pickleball courts, and the beach access is convenient. Overall, though, the resort felt a bit out of its prime and neglected. The pool closing at 7pm is an example. But the much larger issue for us was the smell of mold in the cabana which irritated my partner’s allergies overnight and was even visible on the curtains in the shower. There is also a clear ant problem; ants would swarm the outdoor toilet and sink. These aren’t showstopping issues for us - it is a resort in a tropical climate, after all - and we would consider staying again, but likely not in the cabanas if we did.

user_reviews.Name: _Ksenia0902
user_reviews.Description: I stayed at the Fleur de Lys Hotel for the weekend, and it was a wonderful experience. The rooms are clean and cozy, the bed is soft, and the linens are white and clean. The grounds are large and well-maintained, with lots of flowers and greenery. There's a large pool and a restaurant with excellent service and delicious food. The grounds also offer access to a clean beach with a gorgeous sea view. |Special thanks to the staff, especially Anh Thu, who was very attentive and friendly, and made sure my vacation was wonderful! After checkout, they gave me some special souvenirs, which was very nice and thoughtful! Thank you, I'll definitely be back and recommend you to my friends!

user_reviews.Name: Andrea Phillips
user_reviews.Description:
Lovely chilled time after visiting Abu Dhabi, Hanoi and HOMC.

The reception staff are lovely and very helpful..
Bungalow is very clean and very comfortable.. area well tended and very quiet.
Breakfast is fab, lots to choose from and staff lovely.. Vu, Kim Linh and Nguyen Rot.

Spa is very relaxing, do opt for the Bamboo massage, the girls are very good.

Nam Khanh and Tiên at the pool bar were very helpful, chatty and  enthusiastic..
As was Phan Thawh Hoi..

The sea brings out the child in you as you can jump about in the waves.. yes we saw plastic so we picked it up and put it in the bin!

Pool area is nice place to chill.
There is a little shop across the road and two restaurants, choose the second one the good is delicious!

We had a lovely time chilling and would recommend this place. 😊

user_reviews.Name: Abong 98
user_reviews.Description: I had an amazing time at the hotel! I was able to go to Vung Tau Beach right from my room, which was super convenient. The hotel design was also really unique and stylish. It’s a great place for couples or families to stay.

user_reviews.Name: petrabrandt999
user_reviews.Description: This resort is a beautiful sanctuary. The stunning gardens create such a deep sense of peace that you can feel it sink into your body. The pool is beautiful, and the beach is perfect for a relaxing swim.||The food was excellent, and the hot bamboo massage was an absolute highlight — leaving me feeling completely relaxed and almost floating afterward. A wonderful place to unwind, and we’re already looking forward to returning.

user_reviews.Name: Trip.com Member
user_reviews.Description: The place was wonderful, pool was warm and beach was clean. No trash on the beach. The restaurant was great enough. Only thing that I wished they had was hot water. No hot water in the bathtub or toilet.

user_reviews.Name: Thuha Ng
user_reviews.Description:
🎬A stunning hidden gem tucked away in nature💫
