Her exceptional customer service, active listening, and profound knowledge of Vietnam were evident throughout the planning process. When Hally's shift concluded, Vy seamlessly took over, demonstrating excellent continuity of service by understanding our ongoing discussions without any need for us to repeat information.
The level of customer care during our trip was consistently impeccable. Hally and Vy were remarkably responsive and attentive to all our inquiries and last-minute changes. The incredible service provided by both of them is truly second to none. We highly recommend EVT and will undoubtedly be using their services again for our next visit to Vietnam.

We exchanged numbers, and from that moment on she helped me throughout my entire stay, no matter which city I moved to. She booked my flights, kept me updated on the weather, and checked in to make sure everything was okay. Anytime I needed something, she was there.
I really can’t thank her (and the whole company) enough. They made my trip so much easier. Highly recommend reaching out to them.

One thing to be aware of: it rained the day before our visit, and there were many leeches in the park. I was with two Vietnamese visitors, and two of us were bitten several times. I recommend wearing proper shoes and long pants to avoid this.

Leo was incredibly friendly, helpful, and always smiling. He has great communication skills and a very positive attitude, which made the whole day enjoyable and relaxed. He explained everything clearly, answered all questions with patience, and genuinely cared about the group. Thanks to his positive energy and professionalism, the tour felt special rather than routine.

The itinerary was well balanced, transportation was comfortable, and everything ran on time. With a guide like Leo, the experience becomes truly memorable.

Special thanks to Leo for making it such a great day!

user_reviews.Name: meghna puyam
user_reviews.Description:
Went to chu chi tunnels and mekong delta. The tour was very well planned with a lot of interesting information as well as activities and snacks for us. Honey tasting, coconut candy tasting, coconut water for the boat ride. The ride was smooth and comfortable!
But the best and most memorable part was our guide Leo, he was very friendly and funny and kept all of us entertained and took care of us.
He was very patient with all of us and guided us thoroughly through the whole thing! We had a nice time with other families and groups as well, overall 5/5 😁😁

user_reviews.Name: Anshika Thakur
user_reviews.Description:
The trip to the Mekong Delta (Coconut & Unicorn Islands) was amazing and memorable.
​Our tour guide, Mr. Leo, was exceptional. He is knowledgeable, hilarious, and kept everyone engaged. He is clearly a superb professional, always smiling and super enthusiastic.
​The entire day was perfectly organized and coordinated by Leo. Thanks to VN Lotus Traveler for the premium, clean purple bus (with "Tom Cruise" driving! Leo introduced the driver with this name 😀). The overall trip was coordinated so well that there was zero waiting timw. Me and My parents absolutely loved the experience.
​Thank you, Leo! God bless you!

user_reviews.Name: Sara Grammatico
user_reviews.Description:
I did today with a friend the morning tour to the Ch Chi tunnels. It was very smooth, it takes one hour and 40 minutes to go there and also to come back to Ho Chi Minh City accordingly to the traffic.
It was a nice bus of 20 people. Ticket is included. Long is a very nice and young tour guide, very friendly. He explained us a lot of things about the war and Vietnam as a country in the past and nowadays. In the Cu chi you can see how the guerilla Vietnamese people did fight the Americans thanks also to a 250km tunnels! The tour includes water, no food. There is a stop at the handicraft & handicaps shop, where people affected from the agent orange are artist who live their life and do some art!

user_reviews.Name: Stacy Woods
user_reviews.Description: I had a wonderful experience exploring the Mekong River in southern Vietnam. Our tour guide, Leo, made the trip truly exciting. His funny jokes here and there kept everyone smiling, and his bubbly personality made the whole journey even more memorable. I’m really glad 🤩🥳

user_reviews.Name: Paula Tudez
user_reviews.Description: We had a very nice experience with this travel agency, the staff was very helpful and kind. We did the Ho Chi Minh city tour and we also visited Cu Chi (the lunch was included in our price and it was absolutely delicious) our guide was Leo he was explaining everything with details and if you had any questions or doubts about the history or the culture he had the answer. I highly recommend to book your excursion or travels with them!

user_reviews.Name: Alexandra B. H.
user_reviews.Description: Absolutely amazing, did the Mekong river tour and had the best time. Our guide was extremely kind and friendly, and along the day thought us a lot about Vietnam’s history. The lunch included was also very nice which was a nice surprise. Thank you for a lovely experience, will comeback and book again in the future.

user_reviews.Description: We had a great 2 days tour in SAPA guided by Mr.Duy who spoke English . He is not just knowledgeable but caring,  considerate and patient. On Day 2, we went up Fansipan but unfortunately it rained and many of it's  views were obscured by the mist.The Rong may glass bridge offers a spectacular views of the Hoang Lien Son mountain range. Despite the rain,the grounds were slippery, Mr.Duy remained professional  and ensure our safety at all times. We highly recommend Mr. Duy as your preferred guide in SAPA!

user_reviews.Description: Would recommend this place for your tours in HCMC, visited the branch near Ben Thanh   Ward District 1. Save yourself time with all the haggling tour operators. user_reviews.Name: Shiela Marie Monceda
user_reviews.Description:
Our first 2 days in Vietnam. We stumbled on this place when walking around. They give good rates in terms of money exchange. The lady is kind and sweet,respectful. So we book the Cu Chi Tunnel tour with them. We asked if we can leave our luggage next day and she said we can.
Next morning we went back to their shop and this man "the boss" was an absolute terror!. He shouted on my partner that he talks too much and my partner responded, why are you angry, why are you shouting? And he (the man)just lost all his temper. He told us to go out and he doesnt know us... terrible horrific attitude. That's just the beginning.....

Worst when he threw water on my partner's face. Such horrible attitude. He should never face customers if that is how he handle customers specially tourist. It gives me trauma the whole day.

And as I am about to write this review, I saw that there is a review on my behalf in which I never did. The only time someone else hold my phone was when the other lady of the shop not the nice lady did my sim card. ... Shocking.....

Hope someone should complain if these things happen...

user_reviews.Name: Jackie
user_reviews.Description:
We booked our Cu Chi Tunnels tour through here, and it was overall very good, morning pick up was between 8-8.30pm. We paid 450k dong each which apparently included a Tet charge, not sure what they usually charge or if this was a good deal.

Our tour guide via Kim Travel (Tommy) was a very nice guide and funny. I’d say our group size was fine, mixture of solo travellers, couples, friends and families.

Two things we didn’t like though, we weren’t bothered to go to the first stop which is called ‘Handicapped Handcraft’, it just ate into a lot of time and it was an early morning start. We would have rather we just headed right to the tunnels.

Secondly, the bus was ok there but got very warm on the way back, it was a bit uncomfortable too.

We got a bottle of water when we arrived and some crackers when we were coming back.

At the Cu Chi Tunnels, there’s no pressure to do anything you don’t want to for people with claustrophobia. We didn’t do the tunnel part, I tried but couldn’t (I came here 10 years ago and also couldn’t but I got a little further than last time - maybe one day ha).

My boyfriend shot the AK47, it was expensive for the bullets in our opinion, 750k dong for 10 that lasted about 3 seconds, but he had fun! I’ve been to a few shooting ranges in my life so I wasn’t overly bothered. In order to go down to the shooting part you have to actually shoot.

All in all, a very interesting day, we had a nice time.

I did Watsapp this place the day before our tour to ensure all was ok, but I didn’t hear back from them so we just hoped it would be ok ha :)

user_reviews.Name: David V.
user_reviews.Description:
Be very careful when booking a Mekong Delta tour, or any other tours, many agencies sell the exact same tour, using the same guides and bus companies, stopping at the same places. But don’t be fooled, the prices vary, and what you’re promised might not be what you get.
The seller told us the tour would be on a 25-seat bus, but she assured us it would never be full, maximum 20 people. Of course, the bus was packed. What was written on the brochure wasn’t what we got either. The actual experience was different from what was promised, with constant sales pitches and requests for tips at every stop.
If you’re looking for an authentic experience, do your research carefully. This is a mass-produced tourist trap, and some agencies charge more for the same disappointing tour.

user_reviews.Name: Manpreet Dhillon
user_reviews.Description: The lady is very helpful!! Gave me good currency convergence and i also rented scooters for 4 days at very competitive prices! 5 star for sure!!

Good experience, good service, and good people!

From the initial inquiry to the final farewell, Miss Lieu's dedication and professionalism were truly outstanding.

Lac Hong Tourist Agency, and Miss Lieu in particular, provided an exceptional Ho Chi Minh City experience. Miss Lieu's personalized itinerary, crafted with her extensive local knowledge, perfectly balanced landmarks and hidden gems. The tours were seamless, with comfortable transport and engaging guides. Her warmth and dedication shone through, making the trip truly memorable. For a reliable and personalized Ho Chi Minh City tour, Lac Hong and Miss Lieu are highly recommended.

user_reviews.Description: We are booking private tours every time we visit Vietnam. This year was our 4th stay in Vietnam during the past 8 years and we were able to go to Cambodia for 6 days too, also organized by Luco Travel with a German speaking tourguide for my German visitors. Yet we want to use the opportunity to review our Travel Guide of Choice for Vietnam and surrounding countries. user_reviews.Description: I want to express my heartfelt appreciation for the incredible travel experience organized by Luco travel. The tour exceeded all expectations and left me with unforgettable memories. The attention to detail in planning, from the unique itinerary to the thoughtful accommodations, showcased the team's dedication to creating a seamless and enjoyable journey. The guides' expertise and enthusiasm added an extra layer of enrichment, making each destination come to life. I was particularly impressed by the flexibility and responsiveness of the team, ensuring that every special request was met with a smile. Luco travel has truly set a high standard for exceptional travel, and I can't wait to embark on another adventure with them in the future.

user_reviews.Description: Louis is one of the reasons why we've fallen in love with this country. Even before our stay in Vietnam, he offered to help me out with a problem I was having with a hotel, and he quickly solved it without asking for anything in return. He answered each and every of the questions I had regarding the tour I was about to book with great manners and kind words. And, once there, we were welcomed with a big smile and amazingly fluent English skills that made our day a very special one. Besides knowledgeable and fun, Luong did his best to avoid the crowds and to make us feel comfortable all day long. We had had some bad experiences in Vietnam before getting to Ho Chi Minh and to Luong, so we were a bit wary. However, booking a tour with him is one of the best things we did during our stay. If you're thinking about giving him a chance, don't think it twice. You won't regret it.

Thank you Louis for making.this a trip I won't forget!  Highly recommend to anyone wanting to visit Vietnam.

user_reviews.Name: Nguyen Nguyen
user_reviews.Description: It was my first time taking a tour by electric vehicle, and it was truly enjoyable—smooth and quiet, no noise, no exhaust fumes, and it even helps protect the environment. It was wonderful.😃

user_reviews.Name: Sun Kind
user_reviews.Description:
I truly gained a deeper understanding of Saigon while traveling with Alice.
She is an excellent rider, kind and incredibly thoughtful, always ready with water and tissues whenever she sensed I might need them.
Alice’s knowledge is impressive, she not only knows Saigon inside out but is also very familiar with the United States.
The food was high quality, and even though the tour lasted more than four hours, they did not charge me any extra.
I absolutely loved this tour, everyone should give it a try!

user_reviews.Name: Rachel Walpole
user_reviews.Description: I would recommend doing the Saigon E-bike tour. You get to see the city and some really interesting/local spots including the markets, the pagoda and trying some Vietnamese refreshments! Tracey is a fantastic driver, I get so safe! Thanks!

user_reviews.Name: Khánh Vy
user_reviews.Description:
I really loved the food experience on this tour. We tried a variety of Vietnamese street foods and everything tasted amazing.
It was fun discovering new dishes and local flavours.

user_reviews.Name: Thịnh Lê
user_reviews.Description: Really unique tour outside the busy center of Saigon. Thanh Da Peninsula was peaceful and felt very local. I also enjoyed walking around the small market and tasting fresh fruit. Binh Quoi was beautiful and relaxing. Great experience!

user_reviews.Name: Khanh Nguyễn
user_reviews.Description: Saigon E-Bike Food Tour was an absolute highlight of my trip. The food was authentic, delicious, and carefully selected, from famous local dishes to hidden street food spots that I would never find on my own. Riding the e-bike made it easy and fun to move around the city while enjoying the vibrant street food scene. The guide was very friendly and knowledgeable, explaining not only the food but also the culture and stories behind each dish. Everything was well organized, clean, and safe. Highly recommended for food lovers who want to experience the real taste of Saigon. 💃💃📍📍

user_reviews.Name: Thành Tâm
user_reviews.Description:
I’m Vietnamese but grew up in Seattle and honestly this is the first time I actually explored Saigon properly instead of just visiting relatives. I booked in last minute and it turned out to be the best decision of my trip.
Our guide spoke perfect English and explained history in a way that was easy to understand, especially at the Independence Palace. Everything felt smooth and well organized.
Highly recommend 🤌🏻

user_reviews.Name: Ánh Ngọc
user_reviews.Description:
This tour was a great way to explore Vietnamese street food.
We visited multiple local food spots and had the chance to try a wide variety of dishes.
Everything was well organised and the food was absolutely delicious.
A must-do experience when visiting Vietnam.

title: Saigon Adventure - Tours & Experiences
address: 86/8A Mạc Đĩnh Chi, Tân Định, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QMQW+7J Tan Dinh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Loraine Dc
user_reviews.Description:
We highly recommend Tom and his team.
They were very accommodating and genuinely caring throughout our trip. They made us feel safe while traveling and helped us experience the unique culture of Vietnam.
Tom also speaks good English and explained many interesting trivia and facts about Vietnam in a very clear way. He was always willing to help whenever we had questions.
This was truly one of my best experiences in Vietnam, even though I was traveling solo.

user_reviews.Name: Marie-Soleil Cordeau
user_reviews.Description:
A truly memorable experience. Our guide, Whisky, was incredibly enthusiastic and made the whole evening fun and easy. He took us to several places we would never have found on our own, which made the tour feel authentic.

I loved the variety of food we tried, and doing the tour by motorbike at night added something really special. Visiting the flower market was also a beautiful part of the experience.

Overall, a fun, delicious, and unique way to discover the city. I would definitely recommend this tour.

user_reviews.Name: Jelaine Safran
user_reviews.Description:
One of our highlights during our trip! Kai and his gang were very friendly and accommodating. I love how I left vietnam very satisfied as this was our last activity in the country. You’ll get history facts that are very interesting and also a glimpse of a local life which I think is the crucial part when exploring saigon.

Highly recommend this! 5 stars all the way for the team ❤️

user_reviews.Name: ian inkson
user_reviews.Description:
Just finished an incredible street food tour in Ho Chi Minh Vietnam and it was honestly one of the highlights of our trip! Riding on the back of a moped through the busy streets made the whole experience feel authentic, exciting, and unforgettable.

I rode with our fantastic driver Ann, while my wife rode with Nancy — both ladies were amazing. They were friendly, professional, and made us feel completely safe navigating the lively traffic. You can really tell they love what they do and are proud to share their local food culture.

The food stops were perfect — delicious, fresh, and full of local flavor. We tried dishes we would never have found on our own, and every stop came with great explanations about the food and the area.

If you’re visiting Ho Chi Minh , I highly recommend doing a street food tour like this. Riding with Ann and Nancy made it extra special. Thank you both for such a fun, safe, and tasty adventure!

user_reviews.Name: Amabely Rodriguez Solis
user_reviews.Description:
⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
We had an amazing food tour with Helen and her team. From the very beginning, they were incredibly patient and kind, especially with my daughters who were very nervous about riding the motorbikes. Thanks to the guides’ calm and caring attitude, the girls quickly felt safe and ended up enjoying it so much.

The food and the overall experience were far beyond our expectations. Everything was well organized, fun, and made with so much heart.

Highly recommended! Helen and her team truly made this experience unforgettable.

user_reviews.Name: Maria Beatriz Balcueva Amao
user_reviews.Description: Rae & Vady were the best food tour guides especially for our first time in Ho Chi Minh! The first thing they did was made sure we were well protected with helmets and instructions on how to get on the motorbike. They are very skilled drivers! They were also very helpful and knowledgeable about the local scene and history. They really made sure to make our experience not like any other tourist experience. We got to try for ourselves the food many locals love and go for, but also kind enough to make sure we were always safe and having fun. It was nice because they gave a lot of insight on life in the city like the upcoming Lunar Festival traditions, Vietnamese culture and way of life. It was also good that we could explore with guidance like buying from the local vendors and suggesting what to try. It was also cute of them to give us little challenges like posing for pictures in busy alleys and trying new food and flavors. The whole time they made sure to make it enjoyable. Overall it was a very great and I would recommend this experience especially with Rae and Vady as tour guides. Thank you so much!

user_reviews.Name: John Robin Carrasco
user_reviews.Description:
Amazing Food Tour Experience in Vietnam!
I had an incredible food tour in Vietnam with Kai as our guide. He is extremely nice, informative, and always helpful, making the whole experience smooth and enjoyable. Every food stop was delicious — honestly, everything we tried tasted amazing. One of the best parts was riding on the scooter between food spots, which made the tour even more fun and exciting and gave us a real local experience. I learned a lot, ate great food, and had an unforgettable time. Highly recommend this tour, especially with Kai as your guide!

user_reviews.Name: Julie Fingersh
user_reviews.Description: Epic. Mind blowing. Divinely delicious and exotic. Don’t let fear hold you back from the most fun and inspiring tour and tour guide ever—Canon! Absolutely the most extraordinary night of our month long trip to Asia. The private scooter food tour, led by Canon and his friends, was truly one of the most unique, exciting, fun, illuminating, delicious, and memorable experiences of our lives. For 3 1/2 hours, we rode the city streets on the back of scooters into the most intimate, local neighborhoods, where we feasted on dish after dish of the most delicious Vietnamese specialties. So far off the beaten path, not just in terms of the food — which it was, but of the tour of the city. We saw Saigon in a way we never could have dreamt, looking through the windows and intimate alleyways and lives of the people of Saigon. It felt like a big leap of faith for a bunch of middle-aged Americans to hop on the backs of scooters driven by strangers— But it was the best decision of the trip and we instantly felt safe at the hands of the joyful, hilarious and highly competent Canon and his three expert and wonderful drivers. The most magical night and truly, one of the most exciting and fulfillingu travel experiences of our lives. DON’T MISS IT!

title: AN Tours Vietnam - Vietnam Travel Tours/ Transfer/ Visa
address: Hoàng Sa/85 Ward, Đa Kao, Tân Định, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QPV2+2P Tan Dinh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

owner.name: AN Tours Vietnam - Vietnam Travel Tours/ Transfer/ Visa (Owner)

user_reviews.Name: Juan M. MEMEL Cárdenas M
user_reviews.Description:
We recently use the AN Tours Vietnam agency, and words will never be enough to describe how awfully interesting and entertaining our experience was.
Jane (Jne) was our guide around Ho Chi Minh  and her wide knowledge of the history of the city, the culture, and her English language skills were beyond astonishing.
Definitely recommend 10/10 both the agency and Jane for a tour around Ho Chi Minh, its culture, the culinary experience, and its history!

user_reviews.Name: Catherine
user_reviews.Description: We took the Long Tan tour today and we would highly recommend it. Our guide Chris was exceptionally knowledgeable and provided well researched information on the involvement of Australians in this area of the war. Chris presented a photographic account of the conflict and detailed maps which made it easy to understand and appreciate the topography and reflect on our involvement. He was extremely respectful of the emotional aspect and gave us quiet times to reflect. Chris' English is of a very high standard and he communicated easily with us on all stages of the tour. Our driver negiotiated the HCMC traffic with ease. A delicious lunch was enjoyed at the end of the tour. We'd highly recommend AN Tours and Chris personally.

user_reviews.Name: Jay Bastia
user_reviews.Description:
We recently used AN TOUR VIETNAM for their visa and immigration fast-track service, and the experience was absolutely excellent. From start to finish, everything was handled with great professionalism and care. The process was so smooth—no unnecessary waiting, no confusion—and the staff made us feel well looked-after the whole time.

Although we didn’t go for a tour package this trip, because of how impressed we were with their service, we’ll definitely include it on our next visit. The team at AN TOUR VIETNAM listens, responds, and genuinely helps with anything you need. For anyone travelling to Vietnam and wanting hassle-free arrival and support, this is the agency to choose.

Highly recommend AN TOUR VIETNAM to anyone looking for reliable, friendly, and efficient assistance.

user_reviews.Name: Mel Cheng
user_reviews.Description:
I did the street food tour which took me off the tourist trail to District 7. Eating with locals and learning local insights.

My guide Win was very lovely and kind, full of passion and stories. I was solo and managed to eat 5 meals in an hour so come HUNGRY and don’t stop even if you’re full 😅 thanks so much Win. I’ll definitely recommend him as a guide and share this tour with my friends!

user_reviews.Name: Deb
user_reviews.Description:
Private English Tours Ho Chi Minh City
We did a number of tours with AN Tours. Thank you Henry for putting a package together and also accommodating some last minute changes due to unavoidable circumstances. Jeep food tour with Tracey was very knowledgeable and enjoyable and was great walking through the flower market with her too. Other tours with Chris were also exceptional. Chris is a mountain of knowledge and a fun go lucky personality that is infectious! Transport car was immaculate, water provided at all times with all tours. Guides always having our best interest at heart! Thank You!

user_reviews.Name: Abha Devasia
user_reviews.Description:
Kain, Olivia, Kay whipped us, family of 3, around HCM on the bikes, stopping for vegetarian and seafood meals along the way. We checked out food stops, flower markets, street food and.smaller resturants. Felt like we were hanging out with friends, showing us around. Kain was my driver, knowledgeable and passionate about the city he calls home.

They were super safe drivers, never felt unsafe - our 13 year old wanted to di it again the next day!  Do it on day one and fall in love with saigon.

user_reviews.Name: phuong tran
user_reviews.Description: This tour was an incredible way to experience Vietnamese food from farm to table. Walking through the farm, picking fresh ingredients, and learning about local agriculture made the cooking class even more special. The chef was engaging and made every step easy to follow, and the dishes we prepared were absolutely delicious. A great mix of culture, hands-on learning, and amazing food. If you love cooking or just want a unique experience, this is a must-do!

user_reviews.Name: Rob L
user_reviews.Description: We took the Nui Dat tour and were well catered for. Our personal guide Chris was a font of information, highly knowledgeable on the subject matter pertaining to the Vietnam war era’s. Chris was able to present a view from both sides of the war, the North and South. He was unbiased and showed compassion for both our Australian soldiers and also the North Vietnamese Army. We saw where my father actually was based at Nui Dat Australian headquarters. To stand on the same ground was a very touching moment. The actual vehicle we were chauffeured in was a new high end vehicle, extremely comfortable and the driver Thien was so very professional. We were able to stop as needed on the tour, and this was beneficial with our four year old daughter with us. We highly recommended An tours to anyone wanting the best service.

title: SST TRAVEL
address: 57 Lê Thị Hồng Gấm, Phường Nguyễn Thái Bình, Bến Thành, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QM9X+G3 Ben Thanh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

complete_address.borough: Phường Nguyễn Thái Bình, Ben Thanh

user_reviews.Name: DM Pradhan
user_reviews.Description: One of the best value trips in Ho Chi Minh City. Our family of 6 had a great time. Great food, fruit snacks and coconut water. The tour was very enjoyable amd Mr Khoa our guide was the best providing information in details. Will definitely book with them very trustworthy and safe

user_reviews.Name: RealReviews
user_reviews.Description: The tour was amazing, and we had a great time from start to finish. Anna, our tour guide, knew exactly how to explain everything and answered all our questions with patience and experience. You could feel that she really cared about giving us a good time and making sure everyone felt comfortable. The monkeys were super interesting to watch — calm, relaxed, and totally fine as long as you don’t try to play with them or tease them. Overall, it was a beautiful experience that I’d definitely recommend to anyone.

user_reviews.Name: Arthur Giles
user_reviews.Description: 10/10, such a great experience and would absolutely book again! MinHee was an amazing tour guide, so friendly, knowledgeable and full of life. Best way to see the Mekong River or any other part of Vietnam.

user_reviews.Name: Hari Pillai
user_reviews.Description:
We had an amazing experience visiting the Cu Chi Tunnels in Vietnam with this tour company. Everything was well organized from start to finish, making the whole trip smooth and enjoyable. Our guide, Tom, was absolutely fantastic – knowledgeable, friendly, and passionate about sharing the history of the tunnels and Vietnam. He explained everything clearly, answered all our questions, and made the tour both educational and fun.
Tom also took the time to make sure everyone in the group was comfortable and engaged, which made a big difference. The stories he shared gave us a much deeper understanding of the history and culture, and his sense of humor kept the journey lively.
I would highly recommend this tour to anyone visiting Vietnam, and especially recommend asking for Tom as your guide – he truly made the experience unforgettable!

user_reviews.Name: Siti Andhina Ramadhani
user_reviews.Description:
A Stunning 4-Days Trip to Bai Dinh Pagoda, Trang An, Halong Bay & Sa Pa Fansipan with SST Travel. We were accompanied by a friendly local tour guide who is bilingual: English and Vietnamese.
Bai Dinh Pagoda is a large pagoda complex, and the Trang An Boat ride through the caves offers beautiful views of the river.
Halong Bay has a very scenic view and Sa Pa Fansipan with a breathtaking view of the landscape.
This tour was attended by participants from various countries and locals.
The hotels and transportations were good and comfortable.
An unforgettable tour with SST Travel !

user_reviews.Name: huh no
user_reviews.Description:
Fraudulent and Incompetent
We booked their Trang An package in Hanoi through Klook.
Our tour guide told us that Mua Cave is just about hiking and recommended those who did not wish to hike to stay outside.

The truth is that there were plenty to see inside Mua Cave without any need to hike. He just wanted to pocket the 100k vnd entrance fee from those who did not enter.

He was also late in picking us up, causing us to miss out completely on the Trang An boat ride. He also insisted that we pay the new year surcharge even though we missed out on an entire attraction.

user_reviews.Name: B LG
user_reviews.Description:
Went on the Monkey Island tour and it was one of the highlights of our trip. Kevin was an exceptional guide. Was picked up and dropped off at our hotel by a bus and group was about 25-30 people. I will caution that although it says for ages 2-99, you really do need to be vigorous enough to do the 2km hike—it was a tough hike in the heat and humidity for my elderly family members. Give yourself the whole day, especially on the weekends, the wait for the return ferry is long (more than 2 hours for us) which is no fault of the tour operator. The “canoe” is actually a speedboat and you only take it 1 way on the return trip. Bring a zippered bag or backpack to tuck your hats, glasses, and water bottles inside so they don’t get swiped by the monkeys. Yes, we saw it happen to 2 different visitors. On the way out, saw a monkey with a popsicle so there probably was a third victim too. They provided water bottles on the bus, but I didn’t realize that the monkey island, crocodile area and hike were all at once together so I had left the water on the bus thinking we were returning in between itinerary stops. There were vendors inside the reserve, though, and water and drinks were not overpriced like you’d expect from a captive audience.
The buffet lunch was exceptional and filling. The stop at the seafood market displayed the most variety of all the markets I’d visited in Vietnam.
All in all, highly recommend the tour from this operator.

user_reviews.Name: K H********ti
user_reviews.Description:
I booked a half-day Cu Chi Tunnels Tour for my family and me with SST Travels. SST Travels maintained excellent communication about the tour details, departure time, and conditions. The tour departed on time, without a single minute of delay—I was impressed. Our guide, Chin, was extremely knowledgeable about the history of Vietnam and the Cu Chi Tunnels. He kept all participants engaged, despite their diverse backgrounds. Hats off to SST Travels and Chin for this superb experience!

If you are travelling to see Cu Chi Tunnels recommend to carry water and wear clothing made breathable quick dry material. It is humid. Also carry some mosquito repellent.

title: XO Tours - Saigon Food Tours and City Tours Led by Women
address: Hẻm 611, 611/111 Điện Biên Phủ, Phường 1, Quận 3, Bàn Cờ, Hồ Chí Minh 700000, Vietnam
plus_code: QM9H+57 Ban Co, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

owner.name: XO Tours - Saigon Food Tours and City Tours Led by Women (Owner)

complete_address.street: Hẻm 611, 611/111 Điện Biên Phủ, Phường 1, Quận 3

user_reviews.Name: Heather Mass
user_reviews.Description:
I booked the Foodie tour for our first night in Vietnam and it was an incredible way to start the trip and get our bearings in Ho Chi Minh. The ladies were an absolute blast, the food was excellent, and they were able to accommodate a few of us vegetarians.

We loved it so much we booked the Sights of Saigon for the next morning. While a very different vibe we were equally impressed with this tour. We got in a lot of sightseeing and Thy was such an excellent guide, providing a lot of history. We would not have been able to come even close to this experience trying to see the city on our own. My driver, Chi, was a real highlight of my whole trip to Vietnam and I’ll remember her and her infectious laugh for years to come. Absolutely recommend XO tours! Best way to experience HCM.

user_reviews.Name: Kevin Chen
user_reviews.Description:
This was the best tour we've had in all of Vietnam and it's because of the tour guides.
Our guides Nhi and Dieu were kind, friendly and we had great conversations. They made the tour.
All the guides are really nice, thoughtful, funny, energetic, and wonderful. There's time to get to know them, ask them questions about Vietnam's culture/history/personality,
The food was delicious and riding around on a motorcycle in HCMC is great. Riding around felt like I could get to know the city more than taking a car around. The food places the picked felt really local and authentic.
Would absolutely do this again. And will book tours through XO exclusively next time we're in HCMC.

user_reviews.Name: Sarah Long
user_reviews.Description: This was far and away the best night of our entire trip. 10 years ago a friend and I went to Vietnam while backpacking south east Asia, and while we were there we met some people who convinced us to do a foodie scootie tour. They said you ride on the back of a Vespa and go around to local restaurants trying out delicious food. I have been talking about that night / tour for a decade! So when my husband and I, and another couple went on this trip, I said that we must do it again. This time though we wanted to book with XO Tours because we loved the idea of an all female company, and it seemed as though they would show us more unique restaurants and foods. We were right! We had already tried the most popular dishes, so going around and trying foods we had never heard of was so fun! All the female drivers / tour guides were so kind and fun, and they made the evening the best night of our whole trip! They are smart, curious and gave us loads of knowledge about customs in the big city and in Vietnam as a whole. We loved how insightful they were, they drove really safe and just made the whole night such a blast! We laughed hard, played games, learned how to properly cheers beers and it made us feel secure taking scooter rides around town on Grab because they helped us with etiquette of riding on scooters. Thank you again for such a memorable night!!! It’s an absolute must book with this company! Do not second guess it.

user_reviews.Name: Monika Gablowski
user_reviews.Description: Friends and I took the City Tour, and what an incredible experience it was! I have traveled the world and have done 100s of tours. This absolutely ranks as one of the best tours I have ever taken. We were given overviews of the plan for the day. Nhu, the leader, had maps that we could look at as she explained Saigon to us and showed us the various districts that we would be visting. We heard incredible history, got some great local insights along the way, had a fun food stop and ended in nirvana. I learned so much. It was so fun to ride the scooters and  travel the way the Vietnamese do. You definitely need to do this tour. Nhu and her entire team were so fun. The tour was absolutely fabulous!

user_reviews.Name: Bradley Storm
user_reviews.Description: XO tours gave us a memorable ride around Saigon with excellent food stops.    My GPS recorded 22 miles of cycling through multiple districts, starting and ending at our hotel.  Two of my friends were hesitant about bike safety but were soon at ease with the safe driving and skills these women exhibit.    While riding and eating, we learned so much about Vietnamese life from their life stories.  Our evening was during some downtime during a Viking river cruise and was definitely a highlight of our 3 week trip.   I highly recommend to others.

user_reviews.Name: Lana Rickey
user_reviews.Description: This food tour was such a unique and memorable experience! The dishes were incredible, and I loved trying foods I’d never had before. The hosts were extremely friendly and welcoming—they truly felt more like friends than guides. My scooter driver  Hang was so attentive and I had such good conversations with her! The main host was very knowledgeable about the city’s culture and shared interesting insights throughout the tour, which added so much depth to the experience. They were also incredibly attentive to each customer, making sure everyone felt included and well taken care of. The fun games along the way added an extra layer of enjoyment and made the whole experience interactive and lively. I would highly recommend this food tour to anyone looking for great food and an unforgettable experience.

user_reviews.Name: Elisa Hetmanski
user_reviews.Description: I can't say enough good things about this experience. The XO ladies are an absolute delight! We learned more about the culture, traditions, city, and (of course) the food than we could have possibly expected. Our tour guide (Cam) was amazing - thoroughly explaining the dishes, answering questions, and getting to know everyone in our group. Our individual drivers (Han and Lam) were also wonderful! Such confident drivers in the chaotic traffic of Saigon! They shared so much knowledge with us and were total sweethearts. And finally, the food was delicious and special. We have been in Vietnam for a month and every dish was new to us. If you are considering this tour - you won't regret it. It is a bit more expensive than some of the other food tours, but totally worth it IMO. Thank you so much, XO!

user_reviews.Name: Divya Jain
user_reviews.Description:
XO Tours delivered one of the best experiences I had in Ho Chi Minh City! This women-led initiative pairs you with local women who take you around the city on their bikes, and it was absolutely fantastic.

I opted for the vegetarian food tour and was blown away by the variety. We started with delicious vegetarian phở chay, followed by an amazing array of dishes including lotus stems, sautéed greens, and with mung bean rolls. Everything was paired with plenty of local bia from Tiger and Saigon - the perfect way to experience the local drinking culture!

Our route took us through fascinating neighborhoods, including the local Koreatown area and bustling food markets. Our bikers were incredibly friendly, professional, and made us feel completely safe through the evening. You can tell they genuinely loved sharing their city and culture with visitors.😊🇻🇳

This tour gave us exactly what we were hoping for: authentic local cuisine, real cultural immersion, and the chance to connect with local people. It was a highlight of my trip.

Highly, highly recommend XO Tours to anyone visiting HCMC who wants to experience the city like a local!​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

title: Saigon Happy Tour
address: 191 Phú Định, Hồ Chí Minh, Vietnam
plus_code: PJFH+VW Phu Dinh, Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam

user_reviews.Name: Dinesh Adithan
user_reviews.Description:
We had a fabulous time with our tour guide, Stag on our visit to  Mekong Delta. He is a lot of fun and very engaging.

The tour is nicely organized. We were picked up at the hotel on time and given a delicious vegetarian banh-mi for breakfast.

We got to visit a wet market, cruise on the Mekong river, went further inside to the islands on a sempak, walked through a jackfruit orchard, went on a motorbike tour to visit a Durian farm, watched rice wraps, puffed rice and coconut candy being made, and finished with a fabulous home-cooked lunch.

We were also lucky to meet a nice group of people on this tour and we had a wonderful time.

Highly recommended!!

user_reviews.Name: Zuzanna Bryzek
user_reviews.Description:
We are a family of five and honestly, we couldn’t have asked for better guides. We booked 4 with this company  - Food Tour on Motorbikes, Saigon Full Day City Tour on Motorbikes, and a 2-day Mekong Delta tour 😊every single day was absolutely amazing.
Our guides Mimi, Kyle, Hani, and Nga were all fantastic people with incredible knowledge. As local residents, they showed us not only important historical sites but also the real, everyday life of Saigon. Riding through different districts, seeing how locals live and spend their time, and hearing so many interesting stories made the experience truly special.
The atmosphere on every tour was wonderful, very friendly and well organized, and we always felt safe and well taken care of. We recommend this company with all our hearts and will definitely come back in the future. 😄😄

user_reviews.Name: O H
user_reviews.Description:
This is one of the most memorable experiences my friends and I had in Vietnam. My group did the 2 day Mekong delta tour which I highly recommend over the 1 day as there is a lot more to see with the 2 days.

We had an excellent tour guide (Leo) who brought us to not only attractions around the Mekong Delta but also an authentic experience through wet markets, food and culture. It was a very informative tour where we learned about the many different foods and ingredients in the region. Leo also answered a lot of questions on the Vietnamese lifestyle which was greatly appreciated.

The motorbike tour while exhilarating also felt safe so I would highly encourage people to try it out if they feel ok about it.

We tried many different fruits in the region such as durian, pomelo, jackfruit.

This was such an interesting experience, thank you so much for sharing a bit of Southern Vietnam to me and my friends.

user_reviews.Name: Olivia Mittleman
user_reviews.Description: My mom and I only had two days in Ho Chi Minh City and decided to use one of those days in the Mekong Delta with Daniel from Happy Tours - best decision!! The tour was fantastic - a perfect blend of relaxing, exciting and informational. You finish the tour helping to cook some traditional Vietnamese dishes and let me tell you there is a LOT of food. Perfect way to spend a day when you’re in or near HCMC!

user_reviews.Name: Anna Musgraves
user_reviews.Description:
My husband and I took two tours with Saigon Happy Tour in Saigon on December 9 and 10, and both were absolutely incredible. Make sure to carve out time for this if you’re visiting the city!

Our first experience was the Zero Tourist Food Tour, led by Star and her wonderful team. Every stop was delicious, and their passion for sharing their love for Saigon and its food truly shined through. Riding around on motorbikes was a blast, and we felt completely safe the entire time.

The following day, we joined the Mekong Delta One-Day Tour with Daniel, which was equally unforgettable. As a native of the Mekong Delta, Daniel brought incredible insight and depth to the experience. We visited a local wet market, tried different fruits, and saw a traditional musical performance. We learned so much about the local culture and even had the opportunity to visit his family’s home—a truly special touch.

I can’t recommend Saigon Happy Tour highly enough. Every experience felt authentic and genuinely supportive of the local community. We’re already looking forward to booking another tour on our next trip!

user_reviews.Name: Liban Osman
user_reviews.Description:
We had a great time with happy tours.
We initially booked the Cu Chi tunnels with Daniel. We had a wonderful time and learned a lot more than we could have by ourselves.

We then booked the street food tour with Star which led us throught the multiple districts of Saigon for meals we would have never found by ourselves. The food was delicious enough to have us consider move to Saigon and history lessons the city were very interesting.

Lastly we booked a rustic Mekong delta tour with Kyle. The day was packed with so much Information, delicious fruits and fish and lovely boat and motorcycle rides to show case the area. You could tell Kyle was a local with his interactions in the market.

We kept having so much with each tour so we kept booking more. Highly recommended, each tour is full of very interesting information and very lively and fun tour guides. There are no pushy sales tactics a s the guides are only interested in presenting their beautiful city.

user_reviews.Name: Vicky S
user_reviews.Description:
This is an amazing company with equally amazing and fun tour guides. We did the Zero tourist Food Tour first and rode with Vic aka Lucas (hahaha) and Jenny both university students. Saw the real Saigon and ate everyday food that locals eat and went to places outside of District 1. Be ready for the organized chaos of Saigon traffic like no other. Our guides truly took care of us.
Next came Mekong Delta all day tour. Stag our tour guide made sure there is never a dull moment.
I highly recommend Happy Tour as the energy of the guides are infectious and made our first trip to Vietnam memorable.

user_reviews.Name: Talia Marino
user_reviews.Description: My husband and I so enjoyed this tour with our guide, Stag, last week! He was super energetic and kept us well-entertained throughout the day. Felt like we saw and did a lot within the span of the day. About a 2.5 hour drive from HCMC to reach the Mekong Delta. Highlights from the day include the workshop demos where we learned how they make rice paper, candies, and puffed rice along with the visit to the house boat where we got to enjoy fresh coconut water from a woman who has been harvesting and selling coconuts for many decades along the river, and finally the really beautiful scooter ride through the town where we visited a durian farm and learned about the durian farming practices. Lunch was delicious and we got to try a lot of authentic Vietnamese foods. Highly recommend!

user_reviews.Name: Mykyta Karaheorhiiev
user_reviews.Description: Rented a car for 9 days — everything was great. The service was good, they met us and explained all the rules clearly. The car had local navigation showing the speed, the car was provided with a full tank, and the price was exactly as agreed. Very satisfied.

user_reviews.Name: SANJEV KUMAR VARERASHU
user_reviews.Description:
We found Bean Travel through Google Reviews and decided to go with them for our day trip. The total cost quoted was 2,000,000 VND for a full-day private tour that included pickup from our hotel in Ho Chi Minh City, visits to Cu Chi Tunnels, Cao Dai Temple, and Ba Den Mountain in Tay Ninh, then back to our hotel — all in one day.

Originally, we planned to book through Klook, but since we enjoy taking our time to explore, capture photos and videos, we preferred a more flexible arrangement. So we booked directly with Bean Travel.

Our journey started at 6:00 AM and ended around 9:00 PM. It was a long but fulfilling day. The driver assigned to us was Khai — a young and polite guy who really made the trip smooth and enjoyable. He was very helpful, friendly, and tried his best to communicate in English. At one point, we considered skipping Cao Dai Temple due to time constraints after Cu Chi Tunnel overran, but Khai encouraged us not to miss it, saying it’s a beautiful place — and he was right!

The vehicle provided was a comfortable Kia 7-seater, which made it easy to carry our belongings and souvenirs.

Overall, it was a great experience — well worth the value. Highly recommended if you're looking for a flexible and friendly private tour in HCMC!

user_reviews.Description: The trip went well for us yesterday when we visited Vung Tau. Itinerary wasn’t too cramped up and we got to relax for a bit. Denis is also very helpful from the beginning when choosing the services, he told us every details from each of the trips. Much appreciated. Will def choose them again for my next visit

user_reviews.Name: Colin Barrett
user_reviews.Description: I'm a Jamaican living in China and I applied for my Vietnam visa from December 22, 2025. From that time until January 15 i got about 5 emails from the Vietnam embassy stating that i need to enter information in detail without specifically stating what the problem was. I was assuming and making changes every 3 or 4 days then i would get the same email and i would keep making changes and kept getting the same email. I was so frustrated, it was 3 weeks of this. I tried calling the consulate in Shanghai, in Beijing and in Kunming but no one answered. I sent emails and no one replied even now. I got my friends in Vietnam to call the embassy in Hanoi and Ho chi minh for me and they couldn't even get someone on the line, its like nobody works in the consulates or embassies. God as my witness i was just going to give up and go vacation elsewhere and i got introduce to Vikado on Friday January 16 and i explained the situation and on Monday Morning January 19 i got my vietnamese e-visa approval. Quick, fast and professional. U took so much stress off me and now i can go and enjoy my vacation with my Fiance. 1000% recommend for anyone wanting to go travel to Vietnam

user_reviews.Description:

I did a visa run with this company and everything went smoothly from start to finish. The driver was on time, the process at the border was well organized, and I received my Vietnam e-Visa without any issues.
Communication was clear, and they kept me updated throughout. Highly recommended for anyone needing visa run support — very reliable and efficient!”
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

user_reviews.Name: Toby Russell
user_reviews.Description:
We rented a car from Hoang(John) on the 6th of February for our road trip around the entirety of Vietnam.
Never had service like it. He was exceptionally helpful, accommodating and friendly.
We rode it hard for 5000km, it was exceptionally reliable so we gave it a good spruce up and John sent a driver to collect it.

Phenomenal service. Highly recommended

user_reviews.Name: Namn-N Efternamn-E
user_reviews.Description:
Rented a car for a road trip to Sapa. Very happy with the service. It was during Tet and despite this the price was still the same (others raised a lot this time). John delivered the car to me despite being on holiday and we had a nice chat.

I also left my AirPods in the car after returning it and got help getting them back. John refused to accept my tip for the extra help and just said it’s nice to help out.

Very nice experience over all!

10/10

user_reviews.Name: Janusz Cisieński
user_reviews.Description:
I'd like to thank the management for their support throughout my trip to Vietnam.
This included not only renting a car that was exactly as I requested and delivered on time to my destination, but also for the fantastic transfer from the airport to the hotel and helping me resolve other issues.
The method of communication via Whatsapp and the contact itself was brilliant.
I highly recommend Rocket Car Rentals 👌🔝

user_reviews.Name: Gia Uyên Triệu
user_reviews.Description:
Rocket Car Rentals is amazing! From the very beginning, my family and I felt so well taken care of. They weren’t just professional with the rental, they even recommended hidden local spots that we would never have known about.

The car was delivered on time, super clean, and in great condition. The price was fair, and I really liked having many options to choose from, which made it easy to find the right one for our trip.

What I appreciated was their warmth and attention to detail. It didn’t feel like a business transaction at all, but genuine care for our journey. Thanks to them, our trip was smooth, fun, and full of great memories.

My family was very happy, and we’ll definitely rent from them again.
Highly recommended!

user_reviews.Name: Rafel Simó
user_reviews.Description: We rented a KIA Carnival for 7 people (plus luggage) to drive around in northern Vietnam. The car was amazing, and so was the online support by John as well as the kindness and easiness of the car pick-up and return at the Hanoi airport

user_reviews.Name: Māris Ronka
user_reviews.Description: Absolutely excellent service. The car was delivered and picked up at our hotel. There was no need to go to the office. The car was exceptionally clean and in excellent technical condition. Although I have all the necessary mounts and connections for navigation, they were also in the car at no extra charge. Although I have extensive experience driving in countries with extreme driving conditions (such are also when driving in Ho Chi Minh City), I always purchase full insurance with zero liability. I was provided with such insurance, despite the fact that it was not possible in the basic reservation. I definitely recommend this company.

user_reviews.Name: AestheticMillie
user_reviews.Description: Rented a car for a day in Ho Chi Minh City, They delivered the car to our hotel and the car is very reliable and in a good condition. Their staff speak good English. No complaints. Thank you Rocket car rental. Looking forward to rent again. Thanks.

user_reviews.Name: Abishek Rao
user_reviews.Description: We had an excellent experience with Rocket Car Rentals. Rented a car through our travel in HCMC and the road trip through the Mekong delta. The initial service and pickup was excellent - got the car as I exited the arrivals in HCMC. Car was also higher spec and most importantly - clean, well maintained and in optimum working condition. Drop off also was very efficient. Will be our first choice when we travel to Vietnam. Thank you!

user_reviews.Name: Luân Nguyễn Thành
user_reviews.Description:
Sencar is an excellent app that allows users to rent cars in Vietnam. I am really impressed with the simple and user-friendly interface of the app, which helps users easily search and choose the right car for their needs.

Connecting car rental and rental demand through this app is very convenient and time-saving. I used Sencar to rent a car on a trip to Hanoi and had a great experience. The rental process is very simple, just search and choose the right car for your needs, then make an online booking.

Another strong point of Sencar is the quality of the service. I have experienced with a new car and full of modern features. In addition, Sencar also provides excellent customer support services, with enthusiastic and professional staff ready to answer any customer questions.

Finally, I am very impressed with the reasonable and competitive prices of Sencar. I believe this app will become a top choice for those who need to rent a car in Vietnam. With all the benefits above, I am ready to recommend Sencar to anyone who needs to rent a car in Vietnam.

user_reviews.Name: Kevin Sypolt
user_reviews.Description: Rocco and his team picked my wife and I up from a HCMC cruise ship port to transport us to the SGN airport.  He could not have been more helpful.  He was so flexible when I screwed up the cruise ship port at first.  And Rocco even turned around and went back to the ship when we realized our luggage had not been loaded on our van.  So helpful.  I highly recommend his transport servie.

user_reviews.Description:
Fantastic experience booking a car with Thuexe VIP. We used their Range Rover Evoque for a day trip for two to Cu Chi tunnels. The car was magnificent, clean and beautiful and the driver, Duong, was amazing. His English is first rate and he was able to translate from Vietnamese when needed.
The total of our 8 hour trip worked out far less than had we booked a tour company.

Highly recommended.
